Name: SIPLEC - E.LECLERC
Description:
SIPLEC has over 40 years of experience working for E.LECLERC, France's leading retailer. Our mission? To defend our brand's values by making a responsible, high-quality offer available to as many people as possible, at E.LECLERC prices, across all purchasing channels (supermarkets, hypermarkets, e-commerce). Our areas of focus: energy (fuel, electricity, natural or conditioned gas, energy efficiency programs, recharging stations, photovoltaics, etc.) and manufactured products (for our private labels: Sélection d'Experts, Tissaia, Mots d'Enfants and Eco+). What makes SIPLEC special? SIPLEC is a cooperative entity of the E.LECLERC Movement, where employees benefit from feedback from "members", the owners of E.LECLERC stores. 

Our Mission
SIPLEC develops, purchases and markets products and services worldwide. Those are in line with the company’s values and commitments, mainly in the Energy and Manufacturing industries.
While SIPLEC is essentially focused on serving the E.LECLERC stores and national entities, we also work alongside businesses and E.LECLERC customers.

SIPLEC-E.LECLERC certified Great Place to Work
SIPLEC is a great place to work... And our employees confirm it!
In the GPTW survey (86% participation rate), they voted in favor of:
* fairness
* solidarity
* welcoming new employees
* work/life balance
Management was recognized for setting the course while allowing everyone to get involved in key projects to build the company of tomorrow.

Name: Touton SA
Description:
Touton is a leading agro-industrial actor. Our know-how builds on over 150 years’ experience of providing our customers with high quality commodities and services.

In addition to delivering responsibly sourced cocoa, coffee, vanilla, and natural ingredients, we are now increasing our engagement in commodity-producing countries through processing operations in cocoa.  With subsidiaries in originating regions, and agents in key locations, Touton’s strength lies in the skills of its workers, the cultural diversity of its teams, and a deep understanding of the countries in which the company operates.

Dedicated to upholding its shareholders' commitment to sustainability, Touton builds on its strong footing in the countries that produce the commodities it trades and processes, to pioneer inclusive programmes that address the needs of stakeholders all along the supply-chain.

Touton partners with actors from the public, private and civil society sectors to develop innovative projects that support the business-case for sustainable commodity production. By doing so, Touton contributes to the preservation of resources for future generations and to reinforcing individual and institutional capacities of the stakeholders it engages with.

Name: Fortuna Trading FZCO
Description:
Fortuna Trading DMCC, based in Dubai, is one of the world’s leading agri-commodities trading houses. Our Group was established in 1992 and, with over 25 years of experience in the trading world, has been consistently bringing value to the industry, emerging as a trusted and credible partner to both customers and suppliers alike. Since inception, Fortuna has been capitalizing on the Group’s history in trading food commodities and animal feed across the Middle East, Africa, Europe as well as various parts of the world, while paving its own path to further grow and cement our influence globally.

Over the years, our team has been striving to grow its presence globally through JVs as well as own set ups, based on strong relationship management and passion towards excellence in terms of service and customer satisfaction. As a part of its mission and vision, the company consistently endeavor to emerge as “one stop solution” for its counter parties involved in this trade, providing comprehensive trading, sourcing and marketing of various agricultural commodities.

We are driven by our ambitious corporate purpose to re-imagine the essence of global agriculture and food systems within our ethos of growing responsibly.

Name: Agência Marítima Orion Ltda
Description:
ORION is a fully independent agency and port operator, established in Brazil since 1973.
We have been participating along these years in different agency markets, with strong focus on bulk cargoes – namely iron ore, coal, fertilizers, grains, etc -, forming a solid knowledge and an experienced basis in such.

With such traditional presence in main Brazilian ports - 14 own offices -, we have managed to build a solid know-how on port activities and strong relationships with all parties involved in port´s dynamics.

All together, Orion Group nowadays attends an average of 2.000 port calls per year in Brazil.

The volume of calls we have entitles us to achieve a strong commitment from our suppliers in all service chain, enabling us to get the most competitive prices in towage services, holds/hull cleanings and in all ship´s related services which are demanded by our clients.

Always aiming to fulfill with our corporative values – Credibility, Expertise, Promptness, Innovation, Flexibility, Friendliness and Rentability -, all our structure, operational and administrative, is fully supported by innovative in-house produced web-based software, which made it possible to store and promptly recover all relevant data involving all operations in our ports as well as all our procedures.

Our systems are capable also, as from our daily berthing lineup reports, work the analytically saved data in monthly/annual statistics, employing customized/customizable different filters to attend our different clients´ needs. We are always seeking for more flexible and prompt responses.

Our business procedures are ruled by ISO 9001 standards and all Quality System Management procedures are aided by an web-based software, where procedures, general documents, nonconformities, preventive/corrective plans are accessible to all collaborators in real time.

Description:
Wir sind der richtige Partner für Sie, wenn Sie in die arabischen Länder expandieren möchten. Sie haben die Produkte, die Firma ZELLNER Baumaschinen das Wissen und die Erfahrung Ihre Erzeugnisse in den arabischen Ländern verkaufen zu können.
 
Wir bieten Ihnen an, Sie u.a. bei folgenden Schwerpunkten zu beraten und zu unterstützen:
 
Marktanalyse für den gesamten arabischen Raum.
Referent für den Verband Deutscher Maschinen- und Anlagenbau e.V. (VDMA), Schwerpunkt IRAK.
Vertretung deutscher Unternehmen im arabischen Raum insbesondere zur Erschließung neuer Märkte.
Vorbereitung und Vertretung auf internationalen Messen im arabischen Raum.
Übersetzungstätigkeiten (Werbematerial, Flyer, bei Besprechungen vor Ort).
Import-/Exportabwicklung inkl. Beschaffung der erforderlichen Dokumente (z.B. Euro1, Ursprungszeugnisse und Exportanmeldungen).
Abwicklung der Transporte, auch für besondere und Gefahrgüter in Zusammenarbeit mit den zuständigen Firmen. 
Verhandlungsführung und Management vor Ort (insbesondere mit den dortigen Behörden) bei der Neugründung von Niederlassungen und Präsenzbüros.
Planung und Unterstützung für Delegationsreisen von Firmen, Verbänden und NGOs.
Übernahme von Referententätigkeiten ( Vorträge und Infoveranstaltungen ) durch entsprechendes Know-how und Erfahrung.
Erstellung und Organisation ( mit den zuständigen Stellen ) von Sicherheitskonzepten.
Beschaffung von Ausschreibungen der staatlichen Behörden und Stellen, NGOs sowie privaten Unternehmen. 
Trainings (technisch & kaufmännisch) im Irak und in Deutschland in Zusammenarbeit mit zuständigen Fachkräfte .

Die Firma ZELLNER Baumaschinen ist gerne auch bereit für Ihre firmenspezifischen Anforderungen die entsprechenden Geräte und Maschinen bei den Herstellern zu beschaffen und für Sie die Geschäftsverhandlungen zu begleiten.

Die Firma ZELLNER Baumaschinen handelt darüber hinaus mit Nutzfahrzeugen, Baumaschinen, Industrieanlagen, Werkzeugen, und sonstigen Maschinen.

Name: PPECB
Description:
The Perishable Products Export Control Board 

The Perishable Products Export Control Board (PPECB) is an independent service provider of quality certification and cold chain management services for South African producers and exporters of perishable food products.
Established in 1926, the PPECB has delivered valuable services to the perishable products industry for over 90 years by enhancing the credibility of the South African export certificate and supporting the export competitiveness of South Africa's perishable product industries. 

PPECB inspectors, stationed across South Africa, deliver end-point inspection services on over 200 perishable product types destined for export at over 1500 locations. Products approved for export carry the passed for export stamp, regarded as a symbol of quality assurance to clients and consumers around the world. 
In addition to conducting quality inspections of perishable products, the PPECB is also responsible for South Africa's cold chain management and ensuring that products for export are handled, stored and transported at specific temperatures and optimum conditions. 

Apart from product inspections and cold chain management, ensuring food safety is also high on the PPECB's list of strategic focuses. Ultimately the PPECB ensures that Food Business Operators (FBOs) comply with the standards regarding food hygiene and food safety of regulated agricultural food products intended for export. 
The PPECBs Food Safety Services are furthermore supported by its Laboratory which is geared for the delivery of analytical services such as mycotoxin analysis, fats analysis, dairy testing and maximum residue level (MRL) testing of pesticides in a myriad of matrices. 

By combining this vast range of expertise and services the PPECB is perfectly positioned to support South African exporters and enhance the credibility of the South African export certificate in the global marketplace.

Description:

Description:

Visionary thinking continues to drive the development of new and exciting varieties that often set the trend in the industry. We strive to exceed expectations by anticipating our client's needs and to provide them with optimal customer service and superior, fresher products. It is our goal to set the standard for excellence in fresh cut flowers, and be the grower and supplier of choice.

Name: Macroex Importadora
Description:
Macroex: a parceria que importa!

São 19 anos atuando na importação de produtos e equipamentos de alto valor agregado:
Aeronaves executivas, alimentos e bebidas, rochas ornamentais, equipamentos ferroviários, químicos, máquinas e insumos. A Macroex é uma referência em um setor estratégico que impulsiona a competitividade, a inovação e a diversificação no Brasil.

Nossa expertise está em otimizar e simplificar todo o processo de compra e importação de produtos, oferecendo aos nossos clientes soluções completas e personalizadas. Isso é possível por meio de:

•	Negociação com fornecedores, documentação, fiscalização e liberação de carga;
•	Planejamento tributário estratégico;
•	Eficiência logística integrada;
•	Segurança jurídica em todas as etapas.

O que isso significa para nossos clientes? 
Redução de custos, maior eficiência operacional e uma experiência de suporte impecável durante todo o processo, contando com a proximidade dos Macrosferas, nosso time de especialistas que entende as especificidades dos mercados que atendemos, e oferece soluções analíticas inovadoras, indo além das abordagens convencionais!

Com sede no Espírito Santo e filiais em Rondônia e Alagoas, nossos valores são a base da nossa atuação: Cuidado com colaboradores, clientes, parceiros e sociedade; Honestidade, atuando com forte governança; e Ação, para uma resposta ágil às mudanças, gerando alta confiabilidade e desempenho.

Conectamos marcas, soluções e pessoas, transformando as operações de importação em vantagens competitivas e agregando valor real ao seu negócio!

Name: Levarht
Description:
LEVARHT – BRINGING THE BEST TOGETHER

Together. A word that makes a Levarht heart beat faster. Connecting people all over the world is what drives us and our business. We want to bring people together to achieve our shared goal, to make our freshest and most delicious fruit and vegetables available to anyone, anywhere in the world, all year round. 
Together with our partners we want to realise our shared ambitions. We want to conquer the challenges of fresh fruit and vegetables, find the opportunities in our challenging market and make it all happen. 

Our soul
In 1933, Jan Levarht founded his grocery store in an authentic Dutch village, south of Amsterdam. ‘Grandpa Levarht’ had a passion for quality and strove for satisfied customers just like today’s Levarht. He wanted “to discover the flavours of the world and to make them available”. This same passion, curiosity and authenticity is still in our company’s philosophy and in our colleagues’ hearts. 

Worldwide partnerships
Grandpa Levarht always cherished sustainable partnerships, and so do we. We are fully aware that we cannot excel without our strategic partners, growers, seed companies, logistic partners, knowledge partners, colleagues and customers. Together we grow, pack and distribute thousands of fresh products each day, that find their way to kitchens in more than 80 countries all over the world. And we inspire consumers to enjoy fresh products and live a healthy life.

Levarht’s main role in the supply chain is to connect. Our mission is to bring together the best complementary partners, valuable knowhow, knowledge and expertise. By doing so we can inspire and support each other and help each other grow. As our slogan says - bringing the best is not something we can do on our own, we can only do it together.

Sobre nós

Página de Oportunidades de Emprego do Grupo Cavagna: http://www.cavagnagroup.com/contact-us/job-opportunities

O Grupo Cavagna é um líder mundial fabricante de equipamentos e componentes para controle de gases comprimidos (gases de energia, gases combustíveis alternativos, gases medicinais, gases industriais e gases especiais e criogênicos).
Foi fundada em 1949 com sede no norte da Itália, perto de Brescia, historicamente conhecida pela indústria de processamento de metais.

O Grupo é composto por nove empresas de produção verticalmente integradas na Itália e outras nove espalhadas pelos cinco continentes.

O Grupo Cavagna agora vende em mais de 135 países em todo o mundo através de uma rede de distribuição composta por quinze empresas de distribuição adicionais de propriedade total.
Possui boas relações comerciais com grandes empresas de petróleo / gás, empresas de gás industrial, OEMs automotivos, fabricantes de Cilindros e Tanques de gás comprimido e liquefeito e OEMs de Equipamentos a gás.

Tudo isso faz do Grupo Cavagna um parceiro de tecnologia verdadeiramente confiável para o uso ideal de gás, em termos de desempenho, segurança e confiabilidade, em diferentes aplicações.

O Grupo Cavagna está hoje organizado em seis divisões de negócios

1) Válvulas de GLP e tanque de Divisão de Equipamentos
2) Divisão de reguladores de GLP
3) Divisão de equipamentos de alta pressão
4) Divisão de gás natural e medição
5) Divisão de Sistemas de Combustíveis Alternativos
6) Divisão de Engenharia e Serviços

Firma RTK System istnieje od 2015r. Powstała w związku z zainteresowaniem nowymi technologiami bezzałogowych systemów latających BSL, w początkowym okresie firma rozpoczęła świadczenie pierwszych usług w projektach infrastrukturalnych polegających na dokumentacji zdjęciowej inwestycji dla celów projektowych i nadzorczych. W trakcie kolejnych 3 lat wykonano kilkaset różnego rodzaju misji, zdobywając niezbędne doświadczenia i kolejnych kontrahentów.
W odpowiedzi na rozwój technologii BSL i możliwość wykorzystania jej do celów fotogrametrii lotniczej niskiego pułapu oraz modelowania rzeczywistości trójwymiarowej, Firma niezwłocznie rozpoczęła prace nad wdrożeniem takich rozwiązań. W latach 2016- 2017 przeprowadziła wewnętrzny program szkoleń z zakresu fotogrametrii, modelowania przestrzennego 3D oraz nieustannie pracuje nad wykorzystaniem BSL w kolejnych obszarach przemysłu i nie tylko.
Działania Badawczo Rozwojowe, doprowadziły do pozyskania nowych ważnych klientów i w rezultacie, w 2018r. została powołana Spółka z ograniczoną odpowiedzialnością. RTK System Sp. z o.o. świadczy innowacyjne usługi z wykorzystaniem bezzałogowych systemów latających na potrzeby smartBUILDING oraz smartINGEENERING.
RTK System współpracuje w zakresie Badań i Rozwoju z Sosnowieckim Parkiem Naukowo Technologicznym, z Centrum Transferu Technologii i Innowacji Politechniki Śląskiej, oraz z Akademią Górniczo Hutniczą w Krakowie.
Realizujemy usługi wspierające procesy planistyczne, projektowe, budowlane, nadzorcze i kontrolne, powykonawcze. Produkty, które dostarczamy, skracają czas niezbędny na realizację niektórych zadań w terenie, tym samym obniżają koszty bieżące w firmie. W niektórych przypadkach eliminują konieczność wielokrotnego wysyłania zespołów w teren, gdyż analizy mogą zostać wykonane w biurze, przy pomocy komputera, zamiast w terenie.

Name: Office de Gestion du Fret Multimodal
Description:
Description Générale
L'Office de Gestion du Fret Multimodal, en sigle OGEFREM est le conseil des chargeurs de la République Démocratique du Congo. Autrement dit, c'est le syndicat des opérateurs économiques opérant dans le secteur du Transport Multimodal (Agence Maritime, Transitaires, Routières, Ferroviaires). C'est un organisme chargé de défendre les intérêts des importateurs, exportateurs, ainsi que des prestataires et services.

Statut Juridique
L'Office de Gestion du Fret Multimodal, en sigle OGEFREM est un établissement publique ou une entreprise de l’État Congolais (RDC) crée par l’Ordonnance Loi N°80-256 du 12/11/1980 portant création et statut d'un organisme du droit publique, et du décret N°09/63 du 03/12/2009 fixant les statuts d'un établissement publique dénommé Office de Gestion du Fret Multimodal en sigle OGEFREM.

Raison Sociale
1. Promouvoir la productivité nationale dans le secteur du transport multimodal par des mécanismes de régulation appropriées ou par des actions spécifiques, en ayant constamment en vue, la recherche des l'efficacité et de la rentabilité de toute opération du fret multimodal depuis les producteurs jusqu'aux consommateurs.
2. Assurer l'assistance aux chargeurs et promouvoir le commerce extérieur de la République Démocratique du Congo.
3. Fournir les supports techniques au gouvernement dans l'élaboration d'une politique nationale efficiente des transports et veiller à son exécution.

Siège Social et Localisation
Le siège social de l'Office de Gestion du Fret Multimodal est établi à Kinshasa dans la Commune de la Gombe sur l'Avenue TSF au Numéro 9. L'OGEFREM regorge des directions dans presque toute les provinces de la République Démocratique du Congo, notamment au Nord-Kivu, Kongo Central, Sud-Kivu et Maniema, Haut-Katanga, etc.

Հանդիսանալով Հայաստանի խոշորագույն կազմակերպություններից մեկը՝ Դերժավա ընկերությունների խումբը շուկայում ներկայացնում է ավելի քան 50 անուն ապրանքանիշեր, ավելին քան 700 անուն արտադրանք, ունի ավելի քան 2000 աշխատակիցներ:

Մեր գործընկերներն իրենց գործունեությունը ծավալում են այնպիսի շուկաներում, ինչպիսիք են՝ արագ սպառվող ապրանքների շուկան, արագ սնունդը, առողջապահական ոլորտը, հյուրանոցային բիզնեսի ոլորտը, տրանսպորտային և մի շարք այլ ծառայություններ։

Հավատարիմ մնալով իր կողմից որդեգրված առաքելությանը և նպատակներին՝ մեր բոլոր ընկերությունները մատուցում են բարձր որակի ծառայություններ և շուկա ներկրում բացառապես բարձր որակի ապրանքներ:

Դրա վառ գրավականն են հանդիսանում այնպիսի համաշխարհային ընկերություններ, որոնց Հայաստանյան ներկայացուցիչը հանդիսանում է հենց Դերժավա ընկերությունների խումբը:

Description:
Industrial Electronic is a German company founded by Joachim Benöhr, with more than 30 years of experience in the international market, dedicated to the marketing and distribution of machinery and spare parts of European origin for any type of industry; offering the best service and attention to our customers. We have our own warehouse in Kronach-Germany, to be able to consolidate orders and give a quick and timely response; providing cost reduction and process optimization to our customers. We are listed as "secured shipper" for air freight shipments.

What we offer

We ask the customer for the specific details of the parts needed, which usually appear on the nameplate of each spare part (brand, model, type and serial number of the unit). Subsequently, Industrial Electronic contacts directly with the original manufacturer, obtaining competitive prices and giving our customer better costs, and helping to reduce processes and delivery times.

Industrial Electronic has contact with more than 5,000 European suppliers. Some of the equipment and spare parts that we handle are:

- Level measurement, flow measurement, level switches
- Pumps
- Valves, Steam Traps, Actuators
- Pneumatic cylinders
- Chains (Roller and table-top)
- Glasses, viewports, glass tubes
- Motors - Motors reducers
- Compressors
- Automation materials, as well as electrical and electronic components.
- Analysis system for gas, turbidity, etc.
- Bearings
- V-belts, o-rings, strings
- Personal protection
- Stainless steel pipes, elbows and fittings
- Generic accessories and spare parts for fillers, packers, bottle inspectors
- Components and spare parts for any type of industry

At Industrial Electronic, we want to offer you our services as a purchasing agent and we hope you will give us the opportunity to demonstrate our efficiency and our good working system, becoming your “One Source Supplier”.

Name: Gedik Döküm & Vana
Description:
HAKKIMIZDA

Gedik Döküm & Vana döküm ve haricinde kaynak, finans ve eğitim alanlarında faaliyet gösteren Gedik Holding bünyesinde faaliyet gösteren bir şirkettir. Şirket kum döküm, hassas döküm ve vana olmak üzere üç alanda faaliyet göstermektedir. Genel Merkezi İstanbul Pendik'te bulunan Gedik Döküm & Vana’nın burada aynı zamanda kum ve hassas döküm faaliyetlerini gerçekleştirdiği dökümhaneleri ve TERMO vanalarını ürettiği tesisler bulunmaktadır.

Gedik Döküm & Vana Sakarya Hendek 2. Organize Sanayi Bölgesindeki yeni yatırımı olan çevre dostu modern döküm hanesini 2012 yılı başında devreye alarak kum döküm kapasitesini dört katına çıkarmıştır.

KİLOMETRE TAŞLARI

Gedik Döküm & Vana 1967’de TERMO Buhar Ekipmanları markasıyla Türkiye'nin ilk vana imalatçılarından biri olarak faaliyetlerine başlamıştır. Kısa sürede büyük bir büyüme yakalayan TERMO, 1991’de Gedik Holding bünyesinde faaliyet gösteren SIRMETAL Hassas Döküm firmasıyla birleşmiş ve bugünkü adı olan Gedik Döküm & Vana ismini almıştır.

Name: Port of Pensacola
Description: Tracing its history back to the mid-1700s, the Port of Pensacola has evolved into northwest Florida’s leading deep-water port. The 50-acre facility offers a Foreign Trade Zone (FTZ #249), an Enterprise Zone (EZ #1702), and stevedoring and marine terminal services for all descriptions of bulk, breakbulk and unitized freight.

- Rental car companies
- Fleet owners and operators
- Large dealers and importers
- Classic car dealers

Name: Harmanlı Kimya
Description:
Harmanlı Kimya, 40 yılı aşkın tecrübesiyle kimya sektöründe öncü bir rol üstlenmektedir. Şirketimizin kurucuları ve uzman kadrosu, sektördeki uzun yıllara dayanan deneyimlerini modern üretim teknikleri ve yenilikçi yaklaşımlarla birleştirmektedir. Bu sayede, kalite ve güvenilirliği esas alan ürünlerimizi hem Türkiye’nin dört bir yanına hem de dünyanın farklı bölgelerine ulaştırmaktayız.

Ayrıca, müşteri memnuniyetine verdiğimiz önemle, sürekli olarak gelişen ve değişen pazar ihtiyaçlarına uygun çözümler sunarak sektördeki lider konumumuzu pekiştirmekteyiz. Bununla birlikte, Ar-Ge çalışmalarına yaptığımız yatırımlar sayesinde, ürün yelpazemizi sürekli genişletmekte ve yeni nesil teknolojilerle desteklemekteyiz.

Müşterilerimize sadece ürün sunmakla kalmıyor, aynı zamanda kapsamlı müşteri eğitim programları ile bilgi ve tecrübemizi paylaşarak, onların da başarılı olmalarına katkı sağlıyoruz. Bunun yanı sıra, müşteri odaklı yaklaşımımız sayesinde, sunduğumuz benzersiz avantajlarla sektördeki rekabet gücümüzü artırıyor ve müşteri memnuniyetini en üst düzeyde tutuyoruz.

Harmanlı Kimya Loxeal markasının ana distribütörüdür.

Name: Vendor Trade
Description:
Fundada em 2019, a Vendor Trade é especializada em comércio exterior, oferecendo soluções completas e personalizadas para importação e exportação. Nosso objetivo é simplificar processos logísticos e regulatórios, conectando empresas a mercados globais com eficiência, segurança e confiança.

Somos mais do que uma prestadora de serviços – somos uma parceira estratégica. Entendemos que o comércio exterior pode ser desafiador, repleto de burocracias e complexidades. Por isso, atuamos para transformar esses desafios em soluções simples, práticas e que geram resultados sólidos.

O que nos diferencia?
Soluções Sob Medida: Estratégias personalizadas que atendem às necessidades específicas de cada cliente, desde planejamento tributário até logística porta a porta.
Eficiência e Confiança: Comprometidos em reduzir custos, evitar atrasos e garantir compliance, priorizamos resultados que fortalecem a competitividade dos nossos clientes.
Expertise e Parceria: Nossa equipe altamente capacitada age como uma extensão do negócio dos clientes, garantindo suporte estratégico em todas as etapas.
Expansão Global com Segurança: Garantimos operações alinhadas às normas regulatórias, eliminando riscos e abrindo portas para novas oportunidades.

Na Vendor Trade, simplificamos o comércio exterior para que você possa focar no que realmente importa: o crescimento do seu negócio.

Name: M+S Mehrtens & Schwickerath GmbH
Description:
M+S MEHRTENS & SCHWICKERATH GMBH 

Als unabhängiger Linienagent ist M+S innerhalb Deutschlands der offizielle Vertreter einer Vielzahl von namhaften Reedereien, die mit ihren regelmäßigen Liniendiensten Deutschland und Europa mit den bedeutendsten Wirtschaftsregionen der Welt verbinden – und dies mit unterschiedlichen Transportarten (konventionell, Container, Ro/Ro). 

Neben unseren Aufgaben als Linienagent, sind wir im Bereich der Befrachtung von Projekt- und Schwertransporten über See, der Klarierung von Seeschiffen und der Zeichnung von Ladungszertifikaten für eine Reihe von westafrikanischen Staaten tätig. 

Als Gründungsmitglied der internationalen Vereinigung Worldwide Ship Agencies Association (WWSA) bieten wir Reedern und unseren Prinzipalen ein Netzwerk unabhängiger Linienagenten in über 40 Ländern.

Dienstleistungen als NVOCC und in der Container Logistik, sowie weitergehende Leistungen im Transportbereich werden durch unsere Tochterfirma CTL Container Transport Logistik GmbH durchgeführt.

Name: The Bliss Farmer Joint Stock Company
Description:
We are young, enthusiastic people who love safe products, were born and raised in the countryside of Vietnam, in farming families. Our childhood has experienced and endured enough negative effects of chemical corporations, dominating producers and consumers with so-called "chemical inventions" that have potentially harmful effects on residues in food, health, and the environment, spread terror to the community that can be seen in decades, in human lifetimes.

Fortunately, the shift to globalization, and the acquisition of sustainable development knowledge has created our excitement and enthusiasm in asking the questions: Why don't we start safe agriculture? Is there any better way? #TheBlissFarmer was born to bring blessing to farmers who really love their garden, help them believe in themselves, confidently produce safe, delicious, clean and free-chemical agricultural products, which is a cyclical agriculture that has been self-sustaining for so long. In that cycle, you and your childlren will find products that are strictly controlled, certified #Organic and are local specialties of Vietnam #Organic_Vietnam

Name: FILMACH TRADE
Description:
Movemos juntos! Muito além de cargas, movemos conquistas!
Prazer, somos a Filmach Trade!
Conquistar junto com nossos clientes é o que nos impulsiona para sempre buscarmos melhores oportunidades na importação e exportação. 
Nossa prioridade é com a gestão dos detalhes, buscamos sempre soluções para economizar recursos e tempo, aprimorar processos, superar expectativas e melhorar a cada dia o relacionamento com nossos clientes. 
Qualidade é o que norteia nossos passos, para que possamos aumentar o bem-estar de todos os envolvidos no processo e no nosso dia a dia. Estamos sempre em movimento, para sermos cada vez melhores. 
Somos claros e resolvidos com as nossas falhas, caso aconteçam, pois sabemos que elas são agentes de aprendizado, superação e evolução.
Agilidade, atenção e assertividade, com essa tríade, buscamos sempre entregar relatórios e indicadores únicos e personalizados. 
E sabe por que tudo isso? Para facilitar a sua vida. 
Toda a burocracia, leis e trâmites que fazem parte das tratativas do comércio exterior, ficam por nossa conta, pois as analisamos e filtramos. 
E sabe para que?
Para que você tenha um resultado ¬satisfatório, simples, objetivo e de valor, para as suas tomadas de decisões que envolvem custos, prazos e toda a relação de documentos necessários. 
Somos novos, mas há quase dois anos no mercado de comércio exterior, já ajudamos muitos clientes como você a mover o mundo.
Estamos localizados no coração do segmento no Brasil, nossa sede é em Itajaí SC.
Bem-vindo!

Description:
Tüm kırtasiye araç ve gereçleri ile ofis malzemelerinin temininde, kaliteli geniş ürün yelpazesi, yaygın dağıtım ağı ve kesintisiz satış destek danışmanlığıyla en yakın çözüm ortağınız.

Üretiyoruz:  Ofislerinizde sıklıkla kullandığınız polipropilen bazlı, doğa dostu dosyalama ürünlerini, klasörleri, ayraçları ve çocuklarınızın defter ve kitap kaplıklarını, mantar panoları, beyaz yazı tahtalarını üretiyoruz. PP Poşet ve telli dosya üretiminde, Avrupa’da tek çatı altında faaliyet gösteren en kapsamlı üreticiyiz. Avrupa pazarının toplam %15’i Adapazarı tesislerimizde üretilmektedir.

İthal ediyoruz: Yurt dışında çeşitli ülkelerde, dünyanın seçkin markalarına üretim yapan tesislerde kendi markamızla ürettiriyoruz.

Dağıtıyoruz:  Tüm ürünlerimizi 365 gün stokta bulundurarak, Türkiye’nin en seçkin satış noktalarına, online satış mağazalarına, yaygın market ve hipermarketlerine dağıtıyoruz.

İhraç ediyoruz: Avrupa’da 40 ülkeye NOKI markası altında ya da müşterinin markası ile 20 yıldır ihracat yapıyoruz. Uzun yıllardır, Türkiye’nin en çok ihracat yapan ilk 1000 firması içindeyiz.

Koruyoruz: Üretirken, dağıtırken, işimizin her anında ve evresinde içinde yaşadığımız dünyanın sınırlı kaynaklarını sarf ederken, çevremizi koruyor, yeniden kullanılabilir materyalleri kullanıyor, yenilenebilir enerji olanaklarını maksimize etmeye çalışıyoruz.

Saygı duyuyoruz: Her şeyden önce 'insana' saygı duyuyoruz. Ürünlerimizde insan sağlığına zarar verecek hiç bir madde kullanmıyoruz. Tüm sağlık kanun, kural ve yönetmeliklere uygun üretim yapıyoruz ve yaptırtıyoruz.

İnanıyoruz: İşimize, markamıza, çalışanlarımıza ve bayi kanalımıza, Türkiye’mizin geleceğine inanıyoruz. Her yıl yeni yatırımlarla üretim kapasitemizi, ürün yelpazemizi büyütüyor, geliştiriyoruz.
 
1994 yılında çıktığımız bu yolda, değerlerimizden taviz vermeden, üzerine katarak, iş ortaklarımıza da kazandırarak, hep beraber daha üretken ve daha faydalı olmaya çalışıyoruz.

Name: Artmark
Description:
Artmark is a global supply-chain partner delivering performance through high-quality products, trusted industry relationships, and decades of experience. We support customers across a diverse set of markets with tailored sourcing and supply-management solutions designed to improve reliability, efficiency, and long-term value.

Operating through two specialized entities—Artmark Products, LLC and Artmark Associates, LLC—Artmark is structured to serve a broad range of customer needs while maintaining focused expertise and execution. Together, these entities form a unified platform that combines technical depth, sourcing scale, and operational agility.

With a strategic Free Trade Zone (FTZ) location in Miami, Florida, Artmark helps streamline freight importing, optimize inventory positioning, and enhance supply-chain efficiency for global customers. Our extensive supplier network, fast and reliable supplier payments, and dedicated liaison offices ensure consistent sourcing reliability, responsiveness, and strong factory relationships.

We further differentiate ourselves through advanced inventory management, vendor-managed inventory (VMI) programs, and value engineering expertise, enabling customized solutions that reduce total cost, improve continuity of supply, and support innovation across the supply chain.

Artmark’s goal is to be the dynamic, trusted supplier of choice, recognized globally as an industry leader for technical expertise, high-quality products, and custom supply-management solutions—delivering long-term success for our customers and partners.

Name: SBM Stationery

Même si nous cumulons déjà plus de 20 ans d’expérience, notre société remonte à une tradition familiale qui commerce dans la papeterie et fournitures scolaires depuis 1971.
 Notre fondateur, M. SLIMANE BOUASBANA Mustapha perçoit dès 1994 le potentiel de croissance gigantesque du marché algérien et fonda en 1996 la société SBM dont elle porte fièrement les initiales et dépose notre marque originale "Golden sbm"
 Et c'est là où tout a commencé, SBM enchaînât l'introduction des gammes de produits de fournitures scolaires, de la bureautique et de la bagagerie dans le marché algérien.
Faisant de notre marque au fil des années, un gage de qualité et de diversité d'offre auprès des professionnels du domaine et surtout auprès du consommateur final.
 Notre engagement et notre compréhension des besoins de nos clients, nous a valu la signature de plusieurs partenariats d'exclusivité avec des acteurs majeurs de notre industrie partout dans le monde, que ça soit en Chine avec Eagle, en Inde avec le groupe Hamilton, ou en Pologne avec la société 2x3. Tous des piliers et innovateurs reconnus.
  Aujourd'hui, SBM s'épanouit aux nouveaux challenges auxquels notre société fait face, en s'engageant dans une transition de l'importation vers une production locale. Et d'une responsabilité assumée envers notre environnement social, non seulement en tant que fournisseurs, mais en tant que facilitateurs de réussite.

Name: DG IMPORTS
Description:
DG Imports Limited is a UK fresh produce importer with its head office based in Rickmansworth, north west London. Set up by its owner and managing director David Greaney in 1995 the company´s business has grown substantially over the past years. From our original roots as a predominantly retail focused stone fruit and grape supplier to the UK multiples, the company has continued to expand and diversify into supplying other sectors of the industry namely Wholesale, Catering and Foodservice.

In December 2006 we opened our Spanish subsidiary office, DG Imports SL. This widened the company´s portfolio with an effective direct-supply based salad & vegetable business to complement its core fruit lines. This achieved greater economies of scale in both its buying power and logistical approach. The move has strengthened both our customer and grower relationships and provided a clearer understanding of their changing requirements while at the same time developing a more cost effective and efficient direct source of supply. 

Backed by strong balance sheet performances, DGI continues to look for new opportunities across the globe for our customer base through constant investment within the business. In 2009 we began growing as well as importing from our own farms in southern Spain. Investment on this scale, alongside an experienced team of individuals has allowed the company to grow from strength to strength.

A truly worldwide operator, DGI works with growers/exporters in South America, South Africa, India, Morocco, Turkey, and Europe. As a company we are continually looking for new opportunities whilst being fair to our suppliers and protecting the environment for our future.
Location: San Pedro del Pinatar, Murcia - España

Specjalizujemy się w znakowaniu gadżetów, a nasz ceniony serwis nadruków opiera się na nowoczesnym zapleczu maszynowym i wykwalifikowanej załodze.

Połączenie bogatej kolekcji artykułów reklamowych, profesjonalnych nadruków i fachowej obsługi gwarantuje Państwu wysoką jakość usług, rzetelność i niezawodność. Natomiast szeroki zakres działalności pozwala nam na kompleksową obsługę wszystkich zleceń. Zapraszamy do zapoznania się z naszą ofertą produktową i usługową.

Name: Customs Insights
Description:
Customs Insights Consultancy has been offering customs related services for over 15 years. Our aim is to provide high quality customs solutions including comprehensive customs clearance at all major UK ports, customs consultancy, training and import/export duty management bureau operations.

To best serve our clients customs needs, Customs Insights have established dedicated teams with over 100 years combined experience to the various customs procedures it controls. Our main office is strategically located in Dover and provides a range of services related to RORO clearance, CFSP regimes, Consultancy (including AEO), EMCS and Intrastat. This has also allowed us to establish a centre of expertise encompassing all customs activities to help ensure that our clients get the best advantages and benefits from our services.

This investment demonstrates Customs Insights’ commitment to providing our customers with the very highest quality of service no matter what the customs needs of that client may be.

Over the past several years Customs Insights have realised a trend amongst customers to outsource all their customs needs. In response to this we have invested heavily in the training of our team and we feel this gives our customers the best option in the market, as they now have a one stop shop for all customs eventualities.  Whether that be a clearance at any port in the UK or a comprehensive evaluation of an importers customs operation.  Come to us with the problem and we will deliver the solution.

This approach enables us to offer consultancy, training and a CFSP and duty management bureau service that gives our customers the benefits without the requirement for investment in systems and manpower to operate them themselves.

Description:

For more than 30 years we've helped companies like yours put money back into their bottom lines, and keep it there.

Primary Services include:

• Professional recovery of Customs duties and commodity tax overpayments 
• Duty drawback and FTA management
• Customs compliance audit, advisory and benchmarking

Description:

Com tecnologia avançada, o projeto foi criado para atender as demandas de exportação, principalmente de açúcar e grãos. 

Formado por empreendedores brasileiros e empresas estrangeiras, o TGB será uma unidade produtiva destinada ao atendimento de parte da demanda do setor graneleiro no Brasil, que irá trazer soluções para o escoamento de produtos agrícolas brasileiros. 

O empreendimento possui um moderno sistema que utiliza diversos meios de transporte com o objetivo de diminuir custos e tempo. Uma infraestrutura logística moderna e adaptada com a utilização de sistemas integrados de diferentes meios, como ferroviário, rodoviário, e com ênfase no aquaviário.

Med vores produkter indenfor affaldssortering og komposterbare bioposer til madaffald,  har vi mange løsninger til en effektiv sortering af affald i mange fraktioner. Vores sortiment spænder vidt fra nedgravede affaldscontainere til mindre affaldssorteringssystemer og affaldshuse med grønne tage. 

Vores komposterbare bioposer er udviklet til indsamling af madaffald. Jo mere madaffald der sorteres, afgasses og komposteres, jo bedre er det for miljøet og vores landbrugsjord.

BIOBAG ZENZO er en del af BioBag International AS, som er en af verdens førende virksomheder inden for udvikling og produktion af certificerede komposterbare og biologisk nedbrydelige produkter. BioBag International er ejet af forskningsvirksomheden Novamont, der udvikler og producerer biokemikalier og bioplast – herunder biomassen MaterBi til fremstilling af bioplastprodukter.

I BIOBAG ZENZO kæmper vi for gode løsninger, der tager hensyn til miljøet.
Har du spørgsmål til vores indlæg eller har du brug for en pris, så skriv til os på zenzo@zenzo.dk

COMPROMISSO CERTIFICADO

A IPC Brasil atende todas as exigências de qualidade, nacionais e internacionais, de sistemas e de produtos, como as relativas ao selo de conformidade de produto do Inmetro, implementadas a partir das normas, regulamentos e procedimentos da ABNT e do próprio Inmetro. Isso coloca a IPC Brasil como referência técnica no setor, por empregar seus maiores esforços na constante melhoria da qualidade de sua linha de produtos e do seu atendimento.


GIPP - MARCA PRÓPRIA DE CONEXÕES PARA REDES HIDRÁULICAS DE INCÊNDIO

Em 2019 a IPC Brasil lança a Linha GIPP Fire Protection, sua marca própria de conexões galvanizadas de alta performance para redes hidráulicas de incêndio em projetos de PPCI (Plano de Prevenção Contra Incêndios).

A família de conexões de ferro maleável galvanizadas é parte de um conjunto de produtos de alta qualidade, idealizados na própria IPC Brasil e desenvolvidos de acordo com as normas da ABNT, com selo de conformidade do Inmetro e de marca própria: GIPP.


COMPROMETIMENTO COM O SUCESSO DO CLIENTE

O suporte técnico às revendas, empresas atacadistas e varejistas, fabricantes e importadoras e todo o tipo de esclarecimento ao cliente, também são compromissos da IPC Brasil. A transparência e comprometimento na busca do melhor serviço para nossos clientes definem os princípios da empresa, assim como trabalhar pela excelência, trazer inovações, conhecer seus clientes e compreender suas necessidades através de pesquisas periódicas, visando sua máxima satisfação.

Os desafios são permanentes e a vontade de vencê-los acompanha o dia a dia dessa empresa que atua há 12 anos no mercado, mas que possui 27 anos de acervo técnico.

These premium black tiger shrimps are from responsible aquaculture, grown in the south-western regions of Bangladesh and recognizable in the market under brand name 𝗟𝘂𝗻𝗮 𝗦𝗵𝗿𝗶𝗺𝗽 𝗙𝗮𝗿𝗺𝘀 or as a co-branding tag.

At Thompson Ahern, we believe in ongoing personal growth and commitment to excellence. We use the latest tools and technology to work through each import challenge. Name: H. A. Shah Group of Companies
Description:
The H. A. Shah Group of Companies, originally only a singular entity by the name of H. A. Shah & Sons, was founded in 1890 as a leading construction company in Ludhiana, India. By 1975, the company took its roots in the chemical analysis market of Pakistan, and started off as the exclusive distributor of Anton Paar (Austria), setting a milestone in the history of Pakistan's chemical analysis industry, as this was the first time that industrial devices and products relevant to this field and manufactured by the global market leaders were introduced to the Pakistani market. It later went on to represent Agilent Technologies, Anton Paar, ThermoFisher Scientific, Origalys, Foster+Freeman, Sercon, tsHR, and BWB Technologies, as the market of its products expanded into areas like Research & Development (Universities/Health Institutes), Quality Control (Corporate/Govt.), Chemistries & Supplies, Forensics, and Security & Surveillance.

With offices in Pakistan, Bangladesh, and UAE, and more than 3000 major installations all over the country, today the group has two more sister companies H. A. Shah & Sons and Chrom World. Boasting a broad customer base in both the public and private sector, including projects funded by international donor agencies, H. A. Shah helps laboratories all over Pakistan to touch lives and inject hope.

Inversiones Pucara S.A. (IPSA) established its branch in Havana, Cuba, in late 1997. Our company is dedicated to the marketing and distribution of a wide variety of high quality consumer goods. In just a little over a decade, IPSA has managed to establish itself as one of the most visible and respected importers of quality foods and drinks of the Island. 
The dedication and dynamism of our ever growing team of professionals, the unmatched variety and quality of our product range, and the reliability and relentless focus on service shown during our short history have made IPSA a preferred trading partner of Cuba’s government institutions.
The Spanish colonial empire used to refer to Cuba as the “Jewel of the Caribbean”. Our Mission is to introduce and market the best consumer goods the world has to offer. Our Vision is to be the undisputed market leader in quality and service and thereby reinvigorate the well-deserved but sometimes forgotten notion of the “Jewel of the Caribbean”.

Name: SPECIAL FRUIT Sas
Description:
SPECIAL FRUIT Sas di Giuseppe Scalia & C. nasce dall’idea di Giuseppe,   
giovane imprenditore commerciale, che vuole dare continuità all'esperienza, accumulata da tre generazioni, della storica famiglia Scalia, rinomati commercianti del settore agroalimentare della zona jonica-etna.   La passione per la nostra terra, e per i prodotti da essa generati,  fa sì che quotidianamente i nostri rappresentanti scelgano i prodotti migliori direttamente dai campi, dove il lavoro e il sudore dei nostri contadini è indice di elevata qualità e genuinità. Promuovere le tipicità agroalimentari della nostra isola,   
far conoscere le loro peculiarità organolettiche e portarle nelle tavole di migliaia di consumatori rappresenta la mission che ci siamo da sempre preposti.  Facciamo arrivare la miglior qualità sulle tavole di tutti i consumatori, scegliendo sempre il meglio e senza mai trascurare l'importanza di un prezzo accessibile ad ogni segmento di clienti.  Il rapporto diretto con le aziende agricole produttrici ci permette di immettere sul mercato con anticipo, e con vantaggi di costo di cui ne beneficiano in primis i consumatori finali, il top della produzione regionale. La passione per la sana alimentazione ci fa andare oltre, la nostra filosofia della promozione dell'agroalimentare locale, si sposa con la cultura intercontinentale, dando quotidianamente ai nostri clienti l'opportunità di gustare ed acquistare i migliori prodotti agroalimentari della cultura intercontinentale ed esotica.  L’ offerta Special Fruit si rivolge non solo al mercato italiano, far conoscere la nostra terra e le sue tipicità, in quei paesi ove la cultura agroalimentare italiana è ammirata ed apprezzata, diventa un onere, ed un onore, dal quale non ci vogliamo sottrarre, e per il quale nel prossimo futuro intendiamo impegnarci.  
SCEGLIETE LA QUALITA', SCEGLIETE SPECIAL FRUIT!

Elinde değerli firmaların bulunduğu bir pörtföye sahip olan firmamız önce kalite ilkesi ile yola çıkan personelleri ve bayilerine getirdiği hızlı çözümlerle Siz değerli müşterilerimizin en yakın tedarikçisi durumuna geldi.

 

2008 ylından itibaren uzakdoğu ve avrupadan getirdiğimiz ithal ürünleri tüm Türkiye'ye satmaktayız. 2009 yılı başında ithalata hız veren firmamız ithal (muadil) ürünlerle beraber toner dolum malzemelerinin de ithalatını ve satışını yapmaktadır.

 

Firmamız adına tescil ettirdiğimiz FRAGILE markası ile ithal ettiğimiz Muadil Toner, Muadil Kartuş ve Toner Tozları siz müşterilerimizin olumlu geri dönüşleri ile tüm Türkiye'de güvenilir ve kaliteli bir marka olarak bilinirliliğini her geçen gün arttırmaktadır.

 

Ürünlerimizin çeşitini her geçen gün arttırarak sizlere daha iyi hizmet verebilmek için gece gündüz çalışan bir ekip kurduk ve yarınlara daha sağlam adımlarla yürüyen KnB Bilişim'e güvenen ve bizi bu günlere getiren siz değerli müşterilerimize sonsuz şükranlarımızı sunmayı kendimize borç biliriz.

Glass in the broadest sense

Hand-woven baskets
By producing baskets made of rattan as well as other materials in our own factory in Indonesia, we can guarantee the quality and dimensions of these products. Although the delivery time for these products is slightly longer, we always ensure our most important models are kept in stock, ready for immediate delivery.

Corporate social and environmental responsibility
We take pride in the quality of our products but we are also committed to the social and environmental aspects of our production process. None of the workers in our factories have to contend with unacceptable working conditions. We accept our responsibility to help our factories produce more effectively and efficiently while also considering social and environmental issues.

Description:

İş modelimizde, yeni nesil yöneticilerimizle birlikte, 1994’ten sonra satışa da yönelerek stratejik değişiklik yapıldı. Ticari alandaki geçmiş, kaliteli hizmetle pekiştirilerek, yeni yönetim ve operasyonel ekibi ile günümüze kadar yenilikler yapılarak getirildi.. Gerek üretim alanında çalışmalar yapmak, gerekse tedarikçilerimizi çeşitlendirmek amacı ile Almanya’dan, İtalya’ya, Uzak doğu ülkelerinden, İspanya’ya kadar  pek çok ülkede iş ve çözüm ortaklıklarımız kurulmuştur.

Bu çözüm ve iş ortaklıklarının temelinde, dünyada kalitesi kanıtlanmış ürünleri, araştırma ve geliştirme çalışmalarına (AR-GE ve ÜR-GE) ciddi bütçeler ayrılarak yapılmış yenilikleri ve alanıyla ilgili son teknolojileri Türk Sanayisinin hizmetine sunmak vardır. 

Bu anlamda Palamut Group, nihai kullanıcılara satılan Türk Markalarının kalitesine ciddi katkıda bulunarak, Türkiye’ye karşı olan sorumluluğu yerine getirmektedir.

The Smartgrade Group consists of:

At Smartgrade Group, we prioritize quality, sustainability, and customer satisfaction. With over 15 years of experience in repair parts supply chain management, we offer tailored solutions that boost your business profitability.

We combine the strengths of China and Europe, serving major industry players. By maintaining an official distributor network and conducting continuous quality control, we have gained respect as a spare parts supplier.

Partnering with us means more than just a business relationship. We are dedicated to fueling your growth and taking your business to the next level. Join us in redefining excellence and sustainability as we lead the way in wireless, making a positive impact globally.

Name: Mullege Coffee Export
Description:
Mullege PLC is one of the leading coffee exporters in Ethiopia and has been in the coffee business for over three decades. We exclusively trade Green Arabica Coffee Beans from Ethiopia and offer the naturally pulped washed coffee and the Naturally Sun Dried Coffee Beans.  Our clientele has now expanded to four continents across the globe. 

Our Beginning
Mullege’s inception began in 1955 by Awal Ishaq who had a great vision but with little means to fulfill it. Awal began as a small coffee supplier to exporters and educated his son Mustafa who used to unilaterally negotiate prices with farmers to sell to exporters by using donkeys as transportation in the early 1970s. Mustafa’s sagacious business approach allowed the business to blossom, and by 1996, Mullege went from a small supplier to an exporter with fully loaded coffee containers.  
 Mullege now has clients in twenty-seven countries in four continents worldwide. From the vision of a small coffee supplier, to an internationally known exporter, within three generations, Mullege has soared to unprecedented success through a strong foundation, innovative ideas, and persistent dedication.



We now have two major plants located in the capital city of Addis Ababa in Ethiopia that processes and exports green coffee beans, with fully equipped logistic operations. Our annual production capacity of coffee is 22,000 tons. We have our own exclusive state-of-the-art warehouse with a capacity to hold over 5,000 tons of coffee. We own and operate forty-five trucks that transport coffee from our warehouse to the ports. In the last ten years, we have grown to a nationally recognized freight service provider with an annual revenue exceeding 3.5 Million USD. Furthermore, we have one of the best coffee quality control centers at the heart of our main office, ensuring that each order gets the special attention that exceeds clients’ expectations.

Posicionarnos en el mercado internacional como uno de los mejores referentes de la unión entre el pacifico y el atlántico siendo nuestra socia estratégica la Cordillera de los Andes.

Name: North American Plywood Corporation
Description:
Since our inception in 1948, North American Plywood Corporation has built and maintained a status and reputation as a high-quality plywood importer and wholesale distributor.  Today, our line of products has evolved and grown to include value-added items like in-house UV Finishing and Lamination.  Based out of Parsippany, NJ and Santa Fe Springs, CA, North American Plywood Corporation utilizes state-of-the-art equipment to supply businesses with various products to suit their needs.

Unique to North American Plywood Corporation is its ability to machine pieces and parts in-house.  Utilizing  CNC (Computerized Numerical Control) saws and routers as well as PUR Lamination and one of the largest UV coating lines in the country, NAPC can transform plywood into customized parts that are ready for assembly or installation.

Many customers purchase plywood in its raw form. However, many others produce end products ranging in size from small items like jewelry boxes up all the way up to Class "A" Motorhomes and Motor Coaches. While its customers may require differing components, North American Plywood Corporation consistently meets their needs by providing high-quality plywood sourced from responsible, reliable companies around the world.

Please visit www.naply.com for product specifics or for more information on the entire line of NAPC products and services.

Name: Leftech Group
Description:
Importación, Agencia,  Distribución y Exportación de Equipamiento e Insumos para la Industria Gráfica. Principalmente en los segmentos de Flexografía (Equipos, Fotopolímeros, Tintas UV, etc) y Terminación de Productos Offset (Laminación, Cajas rígidas, Tapa dura y Serigrafía).

www.leftech.com.ar

En comienzos del año 2003 cuando todavía el país era todo incertidumbre luego de la gran crisis post convertibilidad, nace el proyecto Leftech con la misión de ofrecer un producto y servicio de calidad a todo el mercado Flexográfico Argentino. Volcando a la industria la experiencia y el conocimiento recogido durante años de trabajo junto al impresor argentino.

Los años pasaron y con el apoyo de los clientes y amigos de antes, más los de ahora, logramos consolidar una trayectoria exitosa en los dos nichos de mercado objetivo :

1. Impresión de Etiquetas en Banda Angosta : 
     Lideramos el mercado Argentino en la provisión de polímeros de    procesado con agua (frente al viejo standard de solvente) con una participación superior al 75% del mercado. Tambien tenemos una fuerte participación en la provisión de tintas de curado UV. En los últimos años consolidamos la posición de proveedores de equipamiento para procesar polímeros, ampliando nuestra línea Ecoflex de procesadoras de polímeros a la instalación de dispositivos de computador a plancha (CtP) bajo la misma marca de Leftech Group : Ecoflex. Asimismo, somos AGENTES REGIONALES de TOYOBO para Latino-américa.
2. Terminación de Productos Offset :
    En los últimos años la venta de más de 200 equipos que ya están instalados en los talleres líderes de Argentina nos proyectó como un jugador de prestigio en este mercado, contamos con equipos instalados desde Costa Rica hasta Chile, pasando por todos los países de la región. Nuestra participación de mercado de provisión de BOPP para laminar nos catapultó al liderazgo en la instalación de equipos de laminación gráfica, para luego ampliar nuestra oferta a demás equipos.

Bu heyecanı müşterilerine aktarmak ve birebir çözüm ortaklığı kurarak, heyecanlarına ortak olunmasını temel amaç olarak kabul eden MEKOSER, bu hedef doğrultusunda yurt içi ve yurt dışı faaliyetlerine devam etmektedir.

Kaliteye verdiği önem ve zoru başarma azmi sayesinde kısa sürede Tarım sektöründe tanınmıştır. Firmanın değişmez prensipleri daima kalite, daima hizmet, daima müşteri memnuniyetidir.

Üretimde başarı ve sürekliliğin teminatı hizmette dürüstlük ve kalitedir prensibiyle çalışan MEKOSER, sizlere bugün ve gelecekte hedef ve sonuç odaklı modern seralar projelerinde çalışmalarına devam etmektedir.

Description:

Para ello contamos con una completa gama de productos fabricados con la más avanzada tecnología europea y maquinaria de última generación, que junto al trabajo de nuestros profesionales, avalan la calidad de los productos INTERCAL.

Nuestra amplia línea de evaporadores, condensadores, unidades de tratamiento de aire y serpentines para frío o calor, permiten satisfacer todas las necesidades de nuestros clientes tanto en proyectos desarrollados para la gama de los nuevos refrigerantes ecológicos, amoniaco y refrigerantes secundarios tales como agua, propilenglicol y etilenglicol.

Del mismo modo para vapor o agua caliente según la aplicación. Las características técnicas de los productos INTERCAL son permanentemente testeadas tanto en nuestras instalaciones como en terreno, verificando así su funcionamiento en condiciones de trabajo reales.

Sin perjuicio de lo anterior, los productos INTERCAL están siendo testeados bajo la norma EN328 que controla capacidad y flujo de aire en condiciones de operación. Nuestros evaporadores comerciales cuentan con certificación TÜV conforme a los ensayos realizados a la fecha en Alemania para el modelo EVC5–302/22, representativo de nuestra gama comercial.

Minerva Global is an international edible nut trading and import organisation based in the United Kingdom, focusing on almond, hazelnut and other nut imports into Europe.
Minerva global provides honest market information, logistical support including customs clearance and delivery, 100% contract performance and foreign exchange services where required.

The edible nut industry can be difficult to understand for both buyers and manufacturers. Keeping up to date with the pricing of the many items they need to buy, buying when the market is right and avoiding quality issues are just a few of the critical areas. 
Without specialist advice and navigation, business suffers. This is where the experts at Minerva Global come in. The team assembled at Minerva Global has a wealth of experience in building close relationships with its clients, particularly those in Germany, France, Scandinavia, Netherlands, Switzerland and Austria thanks to its multilingual capability. 

Minerva Global's strong involvement in the industry has included running a global logistical and purchasing hub for an international chocolatier, managing their entire group's nut purchasing and logistics for two years, and management of a hazelnut factory in Turkey on behalf of a German manufacturer.

was established in late 2005, it specializes in the production, processing and marketing of organic fruit and vegetables. Name: Fortress20 Global Ltd
Description:
Fortress20 Global Ltd is a trade and export management company dedicated to boosting non-oil exports from Nigeria and Africa. Our mission is to simplify the export process of goods, services, and skills from the region through capacity building, export readiness, hands-on support, and export services.

Our vision is to become the preferred choice for cultivating knowledgeable exporters, promoting and executing trades safely and efficiently, and developing the non-oil export ecosystem in Nigeria and Africa.

We specialize in training, advisory services, and trading. Our training courses cover a wide range of topics, including structured trade and commodity financing, trade promotion and marketing, blockchain and trade, trading within the AfCFTA, export documentation and compliance, green exports, Incoterms and contracts, and logistics and supply chain management. We also design bespoke training programs upon request for organizations.

In collaboration with our partners, we offer a variety of services such as export advisory, market information, product sourcing, training and consultation, export readiness assessment, trade financing, market linkages, cargo claims recovery, and documentation assistance.
Our passion for working with the youths has given birth to a specially designed training on Exploring Exports for teens and tweens to encourage youth participation in international trade and we also host a weekly program - Made for Exports on Instagram Live to showcase value added products made by women in Africa.

WHO WE ARE:
AGRIEX PERU is an innovative exporting company of 100% Organic and Conventional Superfoods Ingredients and High Added Value Products. We have a close relationship with farmers and partnerships with the main and most efficient certified processing plants in Perú and South America, to be able to offer competitive prices and high-quality products, according to the specific requirements of each of our clients. 

OUR HISTORY:
AGRIEX PERU is formed by Senior Traders with vast experience in sourcing, importing and exporting Agricultural Commodities for the Food Industry.
 
Aware that in this type of business the most important factors are truthful information, the detection of market opportunities and the development of strategies, we decided to apply that expertise in the Andean Grain and the Superfoods market, which are still very traditional.

THE MARKET OPPORTUNITY:
On the one hand, we noticed that in the Superfoods market there is a lack of strategic and reliable information, which is vital for any client to make wise purchasing decisions. On the other hand, we realized that many big exporting companies were not competitive since they had to deal with high overheads. Therefore, AGRIEX PERU is not just an exporting company, it is actually a commercial arm and a partner in origin for its clients to whom they give full support in their decision-making process by sharing them Monthly Market Reports and providing them Business Consultations and Market Advisory, as an added value. 

OUR PURPOSE:
In AGRIEX PERU we feel responsible for contributing in the success of our clients by supplying them high quality ingredients at competitive prices through the detection of market opportunities, by creating long-term and supportive relationships. That is how we Develop Healthy Opportunities!

Попе КОМПАНИ ДОО Скопје, е трговско друштво кое веќе долги години наназад нуди комплетно рекламно решение и реализиција на сите идеи за рекламирање на своите клиенти.

Се започна во 1997-та година како мал фамилијарен бизнис, за во 2002-та година фирмата прерасне во претпријатие со сигурно поставени основи и нови инвестиции во опрема за работа. Секоја наредна година со се поголеми инвестиции, со повеќе работни саати, постојана обука и учење за работата, ангажирање на дополнителна работна сила, се повеќе завземавме дел од пазарот.

На почетокот печатењето беше нашата основна дејност.  Со достигнување на совршенството на сито печатот, неопходно беше дополнителен развој како со сопственото производство така и со почеток на увоз на рекламни материјали преку застапување на повеќе светски брендови во нашата земја меѓу кои:

– Tекстилниот гигант од САД – FRUIT OF THE LOOM, маички, блузони, кошули… RUSSEL, јакни, елеци…
– Италијанскиот синоним за капи ATLANTIS, со најголем избор на капи, шалови, ракавици…
– Германскиот производител RITTER PEN, прибор за пишување со висок квалитет,
– Шпанскиот производител GAMAX, беџoви, привезоци и значки кои се секојдневие во промотивниот свет.
– UNILITE и TOM високо квалитетни запалки незаменлив дел од секоја рекламна кампања
– BEST сопствен бренд за чаши, хартиени кеси, пенкала, врвки, ИД картички со најдобри цени на пазарот и постојано проширување на сегментот.

Name: 中国中纺集团公司，Chinatex Corporation
Description:
中国中纺集团公司创建于1951年，是国务院国有资产监督管理委员会管理的大型企业集团。成立六十多年以来，中纺集团逐步从一家传统的纺织外贸进出口企业转型发展为广泛涉足纺织、粮油主业相关上下游产业、具有供应链管理能力、在国内外享有良好品牌声誉的大型企业集团。

中纺集团拥有分布在国内外的140余家贸易子公司和各类生产企业，是中国最大的棉花贸易商和大豆贸易商，中国棉花交易市场发起人之一，澳大利亚羊毛拍卖市场重要的采购商之一，同时也是国家三家粮食直属加工企业之一，压榨能力位居国内粮油加工行业前三位。

中纺集团秉承“衣食天下，造福民生”的企业文化理念，愿与各界朋友诚信合作，携手开创更加光辉灿烂的未来！

Established in 1951, Chinatex Corporation is a large-scale group corporation under direct administration of the State-Owned Assets Supervision and Administration Commission of the State Council. During the past 64 years, Chinatex has been transforming itself from a traditional textile foreign trade company into a large-scale group, which majors at bulk agricultural products in cotton and oil industry including a series of upstream and downstream industry sectors and supply-chain management. Nowadays, Chinatex is an outstanding corporation which enjoys an excellent brand reputation in relevant business sectors at home and abroad. 

Chinatex has more than 140 affiliated companies at home and abroad. As China's largest cotton trader and soybean trader, it is one of the initiators of China National Cotton Exchange. In global fields, Chinatex is one of the key buyers in the wool auction market in Australia. What’s more, Chinatex is one of the three key state-run foodstuff enterprises, with a Top Three grain and oilseeds crushing capacity out of all oil & foodstuff industries in China.

Chinatex put it as our mission to contribute to people's livelihood by supplying foods and clothing, and to keep improving people’s life quality as our responsibility. We are looking forward to cooperating with overseas and domestic partners, and creating a brilliant future with our double-win cooperation.

Portal is also a one-stop point for information relating to export from and import into Bangladesh. Click on the relevant links on this page to look for the Tariffs relating to each commodity, any special measures, the procedures for applying for permits, licenses and Customs clearance, and much more. The Guide to Trade, on the top menu of this page, provides a comprehensive set of instructions and guidelines in plain language and conveniently organized by topic. The Trade Portal is in line with the government’s commitment to facilitating information sharing, the 7th Five Year Plan which focuses on accelerating economic growth, as well as compliance with Article 1 of the Trade Facilitation Agreement with the World Trade Organization.

Use the links below for information about the import-export transit process, the regulatory requirements the relevant laws, regulations, compliance procedures as well as other useful trade-related information. 

With thousands of links between its content elements, as well as external links to relevant ministries and online services, BTP is not only presented traders with comprehensive trade-related information, but It also acts as a tool for the Government and other stakeholders to help reduce, modernize and simplify regulations in accordance with international best practice. The portal provides an accessible, logical, helpful window for traders to access important regulatory and procedural information needed to export and import. This is in line with the government’s commitment to facilitating information sharing, the 7th Five Year Plan which focuses on accelerating economic growth, as well as compliance with Article 1 of the Trade Facilitation Agreement with the World Trade Organization.

By registering as a Member you will be able to take advantage of additional services such as subscribing to news and announcements or receiving alerts every time something that interests you in relation to your business is published.

Name: Saygılı Rulman
Description:
Saygılı Rulman faaliyetine 1986 yılında İzmir Basmane’de 50 m2’lik küçük bir dükkanda "Saygılı Ticaret" adıyla sıfırdan başladı. Aynı yıl Ortadoğu Rulman Sanayi’nin (ORS) ilk bayisi olarak ticaret hayatında ilk adımlarını attı. Faaliyete geçtikten 2 yıl sonra Kurucu Eflatun Saygılı’nın oğlu Bilal Saygılı yeni projeleriyle Saygılı Ticaret’e taze bir soluk getirerek firmanın vizyonunun genişlemesinde büyük katkı sağladı.

Bilal Saygılı İstanbul Teknik Üniversitesi’nden 1991 yılında mezun olduktan sonra Saygılı Ticaret’in yönetimini devir alarak Türkiye pazarında aktif oldukları rulman satışına başlandı.

1993 yılında Saygılı Ticaret unvanı “San. Ltd. Şti.” olarak değiştirildi ve şirket İzmir Gıda Çarşısı’ndaki faaliyet binasına taşındı.

 1994 yılında Saygılı, başta Almanya olmak üzere birçok ülke ile ticaret yaparak, yurtdışına açılma sürecini başlattı.

1996 yılında başta Dubai olmak üzere, çeşitli Uzakdoğu ülkelerine açılım devam etti. Bunun sonucunda ise Dubai’den ilk ithalat gerçekleştirildi. Yapılan bu ithalat aynı zamanda Türkiye’de bir ilk olmasından dolayı rulman ticaretinden bir örnek teşkil etmektedir.

2013 yılında Saygılı Rulman, Kemalpaşa Organize Sanayi’ndeki yeni tesisine taşındı. Saygılı Rulman bugün yenilenen ruhuyla faaliyetine yeni tesisinde devam etmektedir.

Saygılı Rulman, hızla büyümenin verdiği yol haritasıyla bugün İzmir merkez ofisiyle ve İstanbul şubesiyle tüm Türkiye’ye ve Orta Asya Cumhuriyetleri’ne rulman ve güç aktarım ürünlerinin tedarikini yapan ve kendi markası olan “Eterno” markası ile üretim yapan Türkiye’nin en büyük firmalarından biri konumundadır.

Name: Landport Batteries (part of Louwman Group)
Description:
Landport Batteries is a European battery specialist offering a wide range of batteries and chargers for motorcycle, automotive and industrial applications.
Founded in 1993, we have over 30 years of experience in importing and distributing batteries, supplying more than 1.5 million units annually.

Our Vision
We believe in growing together through long-term, mutually beneficial partnerships. Customer satisfaction is central to our approach, supported by a dedicated and professional team. Our culture is informal, reliable, driven and customer-focused. We serve manufacturers, importers, wholesalers and retail chains across more than 35 European countries.

Our Products
We deliver reliable starting power and high performance across a broad assortment of batteries and chargers. Our portfolio includes starter, start-stop, semi-traction, deep-cycle and industrial (VRLA) batteries with technologies such as calcium-calcium, silver-calcium, EFB, AGM, gel and lithium. Applications range from motorcycles and scooters to cars, trucks, marine, lawn mowers and mobility scooters.

Louwman Group
Since 2002, Landport Batteries has been part of the Louwman Group, one of Europe’s largest automotive distributors. Founded in 1923, this family-owned company represents brands such as Toyota, Lexus, Morgan and Suzuki (including motorcycles and marine engines) and operates in retail, leasing, finance, logistics, and parts supply.

Since 2001 and until 2005, the company began working in Goodyear Tires for truck as its exclusive distributor in the Egyptian market.

2003 the company became the exclusive agent for the Malaysian Tires equipment Simex of continental factories.

Description:
Fruit Lilly began its journey in 2011.

We are a global import, export and distribution company of fresh fruits and vegetables.

Name: Oud & Partners
Description:
Did you know pure Oud Oil is ounce for ounce more expensive than gold.
Agarwood Oil, also known as Oud oil, or Aloeswood oil, is one of the rarest and expensive essential oils found on planet earth. Because of its rarity the oil has obtained a mythical status in many of the world’s religions. Buddhists use agarwood for transmutation of ignorance while Tibetan monks use it to calm the mind and spirit. The Sufis and Japanese Shaman use agarwood oil to enhance mental clarity and open the third eye.  Agarwood has been said to calm the nervous system, expel negative energy, relieve anxiety, and enhance cerebral function.  Non-traditional religions prize agarwood because it’s highly psychoactive allowing it to assist them in spiritual journeys, enhance awareness to enlightenment, and to bring a deep peace which is necessary for meditation. Buddha was to have said that the smell of agarwood burning “is the scent of Nirvana”.

Name: POLCAR
Description:
We have been specialists in distribution of body parts, thermal parts, lighting and many other so called crash parts (e.g. control arms, mirrors, shock absorbers) for 28 years now. We also dynamically develop an offer of wear parts. Since few years time we have also been a producer of car parts. The production is led mainly in Poland, but not only there…

Polcar is one of the biggest suppliers of car body parts in Europe.

Our warehouse is based on logistic solutions that are unique in Europe, with the 61,000 m2 of storage area, adapted to keep huge-sized body parts.

We are an exclusive representative in Poland or Europe for many of our 350 suppliers.

Our main policy is to provide to the customer a choice between different product lines and qualities, including original parts, thus different price levels for each spare part. For this reason we offer the widest range of many product groups on the market.

All spare parts in our DVD catalogue eCar are categorized in accordance with the Quality classification of the EC Block Exemption Regulation 1400/2002 (GVO) replaced in 2010 by 461/2010 (GVO). These quality categories are applied also to wear parts. Thanks to this unique solution, we are able to provide to the customer most suitable choice for his needs, e.g. quality/price and the age of the car ratio.

Our distribution of car parts in Europe is based on cooperation with independent regional partners, who possess experience and knowledge of local markets.

In order to facilitate parts searching we developed our own e-catalogue eCar that is constantly updated with new items and high-quality pictures (made in our own photo, DTP studio) and sketches. At the moment there are 60,000 graphic files available.

Name: KINOBÉ GROUPE
Description:

Chez KINOBÉ, nous faisons passer la qualité avant tout et c’est d’abord une question d’éthique. Nous pensons que, sans engagement et sans respect, il n’est pas possible d’avancer. C'est pour cela que nous avons mis en place une politique de responsabilité sociétale engagée à la fois auprès de nos salariés, fournisseurs, mais aussi des acteurs de notre territoire et ceux de nos fournisseurs.
Si nous vous proposons une gamme importante et large de produits d’importation à travers 3 structures commerciales spécialisées, nous vous offrons aussi et surtout un service personnalisé et des relations humaines.

Pour les entités du groupe, la qualité, c’est proposer un produit qui n’a rien à cacher. C’est pour cela que nous avons comme principe l’exigence de la transparence : traçabilité, outils spécialisés, achats de produits responsables …

Grâce à notre culture d’entreprendre, où chacun est intéressé à la réussite de l’entreprise, une structure peu développer son réseau et partager ses valeurs. 

C’est cela, pour KINOBÉ, la création de richesse.

Name: Akturk Group
Description:
AKTÜRK Group, 1988 yılında AKTÜRK Ticaret olarak elektronik, saat, kozmetik perakende satışı ile ticaret hayatına başlamıştır. 1993 yılında AKTÜRK Elektronik ünvanı ile elektronik sektöründe toptan satışa yönelik Gaziantep te faaliyet göstermeye başlamıştır. Firmamız kuruluşundan itibaren ses, görüntü ve iletişim sektöründe göstermiş olduğu üstün performans neticesinde ülkemizin sayılı firmaları arasına girmiştir. 2002 yılından itibaren cep telefonu sektöründe ithalatçı ve satış sonrası hizmetine başlamıştır.

2007 yılından bu yana Türkiye de teknoloji alanında kalitesini tescillemiş CONCORD cep telefonlarını ve son dönemdeki teknolojik ürün Tablet Pc, Akıllı Saat ürünlerini en uygun fiyatlar ile sürekli değişen teknolojiye ayak uydurarak en son geliştirilen özellikler, satış sonrası hizmet ve yılların deneyimiyle kazanılmış olan profesyonel servis imkânı ile yurtiçi piyasasına sunmaktayız., Yılların bilgi birikimi ile kazandığımız tecrübe ve konusunda uzmanlaşmış ekibimiz ile müşterilerimizin istek ve beklentilerine uygun hizmetler sunarak müşterilerimizin memnuniyetini artırmayı hedeflemekteyiz.

Yurt genelindeki satış temsilcilerini her geçen gün arttıran, ana hedefi müşteri memnuniyeti olan, çalışma ve kalite prensiplerinden asla ödün vermeyen AKTÜRK Group olarak sizlere genç ve uzman bir ekibin dinamizmi sayesinde en son teknoloji ile üretilen CONCORD ürünlerin kalitesini tanıtmaktan gurur duyuyoruz. Bilişim dünyasında bir çok ürünü bünyesinde bulundurmaya başlamıştır son olarak 2012 yılının ilk çeyreğinde Türk markası CONCORD olarak Tablet pc ürünlerinin ithalat,montaj satış ve satış sonrası hizmetine başlanmıştır

Yine Aktürk Group bünyesi altında faaliyet gösteren Aktürk Sağlık firmamız 2010 yılından itibaren hepimizin benimsediği Adıyla Tadıyla Sevilen Mahbuba Tea çayıyla yine Türkiye ve yurtdışı satışına başlanmıştır. 2015 yılının ilk çeyreğinde Mahbuba Pirinç satışına başlamıştır.

Name: ATS All Tape Supplies B.V.
Description:
ATS All Tape Supplies B.V. ontstond in 2006 als familiebedrijf in België, een nieuwe onderneming met een brok aan ervaring. Oprichters Servaas Dankers en Felipe Muñoz-Mateu brachten meer dan twee decennia ervaring in de tape-industrie mee en begonnen als importeur van zelfklevende tapes. De essentie van ATS is vanaf het begin dezelfde geweest. Een brede en flexibele aanbieder van zelfklevende tape zijn, kort gezegd tape in alle vormen en maten leveren.

Na 1 jaar volgde de oprichting van ATS All Tape Supplies en schafte de onderneming een snijmachine aan om zelf tape te kunnen verwerken. Hierdoor kon ATS All Tape Supplies extra toegevoegde waarde creëren: flexibele private label-mogelijkheden kwamen er als extra service bij. Inmiddels beschikt ATS over drie volledige productielijnen en na 10 jaar zijn onze tape-oplossingen te vinden in 35 landen wereldwijd. We breiden daarbij ons productgamma steeds verder uit en dat doen we niet alleen. Samen met onze opdrachtgevers en leverancier co-creëren we nieuwe innovaties en producten. Onze ontwikkeling staat nooit stil, omdat we voorloper in de markt willen blijven.

Aan de uitbreiding en ambitie komt geen eind. Nieuwe tape-oplossingen hebben altijd onze aandacht, net als verbeteringen in ons gehele bedrijfsproces. Hierdoor willen wij als bedrijf ieder jaar groeien.

Our commitment is to provide a first-class personalised service, driving strong returns for retailers and great value to consumers. Name: ITAGC - International Trade Association of Greater Chicago
Description:
WHO WE ARE: Founded in 1978, the International Trade Association of Greater Chicago (ITA/GC) is a not-for- profit, 501(c)6 voluntary business association dedicated to promoting international commerce in all its forms.

The ITA/GC provides a forum for the exchange of practical information and insight within the international business community.  Members share interests in import and export matters, in international investment, alliance, and licensing opportunities, and – in the broader sense – doing business across the world.

WHAT WE DO: The ITA/GC’s focus is on practicality: on building knowledge and enabling relationships that help people do international business.  While our scope of interest is diverse – all aspects of trading and commercial activity across all geographies and all industries – our work is simple: to help others gain understanding that is personal, current and actionable.
