Asimismo, Hitsein & Gescon asociados, S.A. ostenta la condición de Destinatario Registrado de Hidrocarburos y Bebidas Alcohólicas lo que le permite canalizar a través de sus diversos establecimientos la recepción intracomunitaria en régimen suspensivo de las mercancías introducidas por sus clientes en el mercado nacional. También organiza regularmente jornadas especializadas en colaboración con la Administración sobre los cambios que se producen en el sector.
 
Entre los muchos éxitos de esta fusión se encuentra la reciente obtención del certificado OEA, Operador Económico Autorizado, el de despacho de aduanas centralizado o el de Expedidor Registrado.

A Organização Paulo Rocha, a primeira empresa do grupo, atua há mais de 60 anos no mercado e é uma das principais empresas de assessoria em Comércio Exterior do Norte e Nordeste do país. A Organização Paulo Rocha dispõe de conhecimentos práticos únicos que, aliados a sua eficiente gestão tecnológica, possibilitam atender as mais diversas necessidades de seus clientes.
Única empresa na área de desembaraço aduaneiro no estado do Ceará com certificação ISO 9001/2008. Esta conquista é um notável diferencial em relação à concorrência, uma vez que garante o selo de qualidade internacional na prestação de serviços e assegura a melhoria contínua de seus processos na busca constante de excelência.
A missão da Organização Paulo Rocha é prestar consultoria e assessoria em serviços de comércio exterior com qualidade, satisfazendo as expectativas dos clientes e assegurando a rentabilidade da empresa, contribuindo assim para o bem estar da sociedade. 
Os principais clientes da Organização Paulo Rocha são pessoas jurídicas que se dividem nos segmentos de aço, projetos de implantação industrial, têxtil, construção civil, alimentícios, química, automotivo, fármacos, siderurgia, energia eólica.

A OPR INTERGLOBO é o resultado da união entre duas empresas sólidas, tradicionais e ao mesmo tempo modernas: A Organização Paulo Rocha e a Interglobo, com matriz na Itália mais precisamente em Genova há quase 35 anos. Assim, a OPR Interglobo atua no seguimento de logística internacional Marítima e Aérea tanto na exportação quanto na importação.

Name: Posco International Corporation
Description:
Starting off with the name Daewoo Corporation in 1967, POSCO INTERNATIONAL has played a leading role in Korea’s economic development through export enlargement. As Daewoo Corporation changed its name to Daewoo Co., Ltd. in 1982, the company started to handle the trade business exclusively. Separated as an independent corporation with the name Daewoo International Co., Ltd. in 2000, we mainly operate our business in the fields of international trade, development and management of infrastructure, resource development and so on.

In 2010, the company was incorporated into POSCO Group, gaining solid internal stability. In 2017, through the merge and acquisition of the steel business unit of POSCO P&S, we merged domestic and overseas steel distribution channels of POSCO Group, securing our position as the key subsidiary of POSCO Group. In 2019, we have changed the company name to ‘POSCO INTERNATIONAL’, preparing to take a great leap forward in the future.

Utilizing the international network comprised of more than 80 subsidiaries across the world, POSCO INTERNATIONAL is establishing value chains in various areas of business including steel, energy, agro-commodities, chemical products, machinery parts, infrastructure, and so on, discovering sustainable business models. Through this, we are becoming a ‘Globally Integrated Corporation’ that is directly involved in the entire major business processes beyond the conventional trading business.

Description:
A CLIA Empório é um terminal privado de uso público localizado em Salvador na zona secundária  do porto e criado para atuar como facilitador das operações de movimentação e armazenagem de cargas sob controle aduaneiro, oriundas de importação e destinadas à  exportação.

A empresa é líder no setor de armazenagem da Bahia desde 1974, sendo pioneira no segmento alfandegado no Norte e Nordeste do país, atuando desde 1990 como o primeiro TRA ( Terminal Retroportuário Alfandegado) e desde 1999 como primeira EADI ( Estação Aduaneira do Interior), mediante concessão da Receita Federal.

Vale destacar que em 2013 a Empório deixou de atuar como Estação Aduaneira do Interior (EADI) e passou a atuar como Centro Logístico e Industrial Aduaneiro (CLIA), conforme Ato Declaratório Executivo SRFB/SRF Nº 7. Dessa forma, extingue-se o prazo de concessão de operação, uma vez que o CLIA atua com prazo indeterminado.

Name: InterAmerican Coffee
Description:
Since 1983, InterAmerican has been supplying specialty green coffee to roasters across North America.

Through our 40+ sister companies in 27 countries, as well as through old and new relationships that we consistently seek out, nurture and forge, we source and import some of the world’s best coffees. These include certified Organic, Fair Trade and Rainforest Alliance coffees, quality and price options from traceable blend components to unique small-lot offerings, and coffees through special projects designed to improve both cup quality and the lives and futures of coffee growers and producers.

Our headquarters is in Hoboken, N.J., and we additionally have Trading teams and Quality Control labs in Providence, Houston and San Diego. And proudly, we’re part of the Neumann Kaffee Gruppe (NKG)—the world’s leading green coffee company—which gives us access to numerous other quality-control labs and on-the-ground experts around the globe.

NKG’s global breadth and strength help us to consistently acquire the coffees our customers love—and to keep discovering beautiful new ones. Our decades of experience have refined and strengthened our logistics operations. And the expertise and passion our teams bring to work each day help us to positively impact the supply chain, both locally and globally. Together, these factors make for a company we couldn’t be prouder of.

We invite you to cup with us, train with us and explore with us. And to share how we can help you to keep growing along with us.

Name: Importe Melhor
Description:
Somos um ecossistema completo de importação: integramos sourcing, planejamento tributário, trade finance, compliance, logística e tecnologia em uma operação de ponta a ponta — com inteligência, velocidade e governança.

Atuamos em mais de 20 países, com +1BI em produtos importados e +500MM em estratégias fiscais validadas. Nossos clientes somam +10BI em faturamento e +20k de colaboradores impactados diretamente pelas soluções que entregamos.

Aqui, cada importação é tratada como um ativo estratégico, com foco em ganho de margem, redução de risco e sustentabilidade fiscal. Não vendemos frete, nem promessas fáceis. Oferecemos método, resultado e uma equipe obcecada em entregar 1% melhor todos os dias.

Somos a escolha de empresas que entendem que importar não é sobre preço, mas sobre liderança, timing e estrutura.

Nosso modelo atende desde o primeiro importador até grupos consolidados — com soluções personalizadas para cada estágio de maturidade.

Se sua empresa quer escalar com inteligência, eficiência e segurança: Importe Melhor é a decisão estratégica.

Name: Agarwal Coal Corporation Pvt Ltd
Description: Started as a small trader of Indian coal in 1974, Agarwal has today emerged as the leading importer of coal in India. Name: Hasti Petrochemical & shipping ltd
Description:
Hasti Petro Chemical & Shipping Limited (HPCSL)“Thar Dry Port “ is  one of the most trusted ICD operators across India. We offer the finest and fastest solutions to meet the requirements of the import-export fraternity, we strive for excellence in everything that we pursue. Leaders in the Domestic and International Logistic business, and we firmly believe in delivering high levels of customer delight. 
Our customer-centricity has helped achieve our organisational goals year after year. Our exceptional leaders and their persistent desire to form copper-bottomed strategies and plans to deal with complex situations remain one of the key factors behind our unfaltering growth since our inception.
Journey So Far: HPCSL is a diversified –flagship of different verticals i.e. Petrol Pumps, Gas Agencies, Hotels, IMFL Blending & Bottling Plants, & Real Estates –and possessing unique management expertise to meet the needs of a wide range of customers
The journey began in the year 2000 with our Chairman Mr. Ramesh Parekh focusing on logistics business in Jodhpur comprising of Distribution, Warehouse and Transport under the leadership of his son Mr. Ruchir Parekh the Managing Director.
In the year 2001 HPCSL opened the first privately owned ICD, in Jodhpur, Rajasthan-under the Brand name THE THAR DRY PORT.
Over the years, we substantially improved the quality-of-service levels the quality at ICD Jodhpur to provide amenities par excellence to EXIM customers.
In the year 2009, we established our second ICD at Sanand, near Ahmedabad in Gujarat
The Private Freight Terminal was commercially operational at ICD Sanand on 16th September 2016 Being strategically located our ICDs both in Rajasthan and Gujarat provide seamless connectivity to all gateway ports across Western corridor and allows us to transport goods from one destination to another both via road and rail.
Focusing on expanding a network of Inland Container Depots across Indiato meet the growing needs of the EXIM community .

Türkiye’nin tekstil alanındaki en güçlü ihracatçı şirketlerinden biri olarak Türkiye piyasası yanısıra 6 kıtada 90’dan fazla ülkeye kuruluşundan bugüne 8,7 Milyar USD ihracat gerçekleştirmiştir.

Ak-PA, üretici kardeş firmalar ile kurduğu sinerji ile dünya piyasalarını yakından takip ederek sektörel tecrübesi, hizmet kalitesi ve Holding’ten aldığı güç ile paydaşlarına değer yaratmaktadır.

Name: Horoz Elektrik ve Elektronik Tic. Koll. Şti.
Description:
Horoz Elektrik	; elektrik ve aydınlatma sektöründeki değişimleri sürekli takip eden çağdaş ürün anlayışı ve pazardaki yeni taleplerin farkında olan üst yönetimiyle kısa sürede aydınlatma sektörünün seçkin markalarından biri haline gelmeyi başarmıştır. Ürünlerin her aşamasında kaliteyi bir prensipten öte vazgeçilmez olarak görmüştür. Tüm ürünler uluslararası standartlara uygun olarak üretilmekte olup Avrupa Birliği CE, Ukrayna UKR-SEPRO, Rusya GOST-R belgelerine ve RoHS direktifine sahiptir. sürekli iyileştirme mantığı çerçevesinde kalite yönetimini esas alarak ürün kalitesini yüksek otomasyon ve esneklik kavramlarıyla beraber geliştirmektedir.Değişen dünya standartları ve piyasa değerlerine gore sürekli yenilenmek ve kendini zirveye taşımak düşüncesinde olan tüm yatırımlarını kendi özkaynaklarıyla gerçekleştirmektedir. Tasarımdan sevkiyata kadar olan tüm süreçlerde teknolojiden maksimum düzeyde istifade edilmektedir. mevcut müşterilerine sağladığı kaliteli hizmeti korumanın yanında yeni müşterilere ve pazarlara ulaşarak ihracatını daha da güçlendirmeyi bunun yanında Türkiye ekonomisine, sektöründe daha büyük katkılarda bulunmayı her zaman amaçlamaktadır.

Horozk Elektrik sahip olduğu modern laboratuarı ile ürün geliştirme çalışmalarında büyük bir güce sahiptir. Elektrik malzemeleri satışı ve pazarlaması konusunda deneyimli, müşteri memnuniyetini her zaman ön planda tutan, günün gereksinimlerine gore kendini yenileyen kaliteli hizmetten ödün vermeden ilk günkü şevkle kendi tesislerinde 12.000 M2 alanda hizmetini sürdüren, binlerce çeşit ürün ve geniş stoklarıyla hizmete devam etmektedir.

Satışını yaptığımız, kalitesi tüm dünyada kabul görmüş HOROZK Elektrik ticari markalı ürünlerimizi hızlı ve sürekli hizmetle ihtiyaçlarınıza bağlı olarak size sunmaktan mutluluk duyarız.

Name: China Nuclear Industry 22nd Construction CO.,Ltd
Description:
In March,1958,the 2nd Construction Project Company directly affiliated to Construction Industry Department was established in the northwest of our nation(the predecessor of China Nuclear Industry 22nd Construction Co.,Ltd, referred to as CNI22 hereinafter). From the end of 1950s till now, CNI22 has gained great success in nuclear power construction, industrial and civil construction.CNI22 is not only a key state-owned company, but also an investment institution and asset management unit authorized and approved by the State Council.
      Founded in March 1958,CNI22 took part in the construction of China’s first nuclear power plant, its main businesses now is nuclear power projects , civil projects construction, and the import and export of goods and technology. The registered capital of CNI22 is $ 30,150,000,and the existing assets now is $ 363 million. By 2011,The production value was $ 1.13 billion, including the import and export of goods and technology, whose output value was U.S. $ 100 million.
      During the past 50 years, CNI22 has completed more than 2000 construction and installation works, and the total construction area was over 2 million m2. Our company has undertaken a large number of construction works of power plants, factories, housing, airports, bridges, roads etc, and for the good quality of our projects and technology innovation, CNI22 is awarded more than 80 national and provincial and municipal prizes, including the construction engineering “Luban Prize”. CNI22 have offices in 39 countries, and we still have Projects under construction in Algeria, Sudan, Pakistan, Mongolia, Vietnam and East Timor. In the field of civil engineering, Our company possesses 8 grade-1 qualifications, including housing construction, electrical engineering, mechanical and electrical installation works, steel works, the installation of lifting equipment, blasting and demolition engineering and nuclear engineering and so on.

Name: EMW Fine Wines
Description:
ABOUT US
Foundation
EMW was founded in 2003 with its head office based in Shanghai. The company name “East Meets West Fine Wines” reflects its goal to share and exchange its passion, knowledge and wine culture with wine lovers all over China.
Education
In 2009, EMW became one of the earliest Approved Program Providers for WSET training by providing high quality education and qualifications from Level 1 all through to Level 3.
Network
By 2017, EMW has opened branches in Shanghai, Beijing, Shenzhen, Chengdu, Hongkong and Macao, and established its representative offices in Guangzhou, Chongqing, Suzhou, Hangzhou, Nanjing, Shenyang, Qingdao, and Xi’an.
In 2018, we are celebrating the 15 years of our company, EMW, and the shared passion for wines in Greater China.
Expansion
In 2020, 18 years after its foundation, EMW has grown to over 150 professional employees, providing its services to more than 3500 customers all over Greater China through its 6 offices and 15 representative offices.

Recognition
EMW has been awarded “Best Wine Importer” for ten consecutive years since 2011 by China Sommeliers Wine Challenge/Wine 100 Challenge.

Name: Artisanal Imports
Description:
WHERE EAST MEETS WEST COAST IMPORTS
Artisanal Imports, Inc. is a sales and marketing company specializing in imported alcoholic beverages. Our main office is in Austin, Texas where a full-time staff of experienced logistics, administrative and support personnel provide essential infrastructure. The purchase of inventory from Europe and Asia is coordinated out of this office and all customer purchase orders are processed here. Compliance with Federal and State law is managed for the entire country from Austin, guiding the company through a confusing maze of reporting and legal requirements.

A network of distributors is engaged to offer our brands to the retail – and ultimately, consumer – trade. Some key markets on the coasts are further supported by brokers and salespeople to assist in the effective marketing of our products. Many states have more than one distributor offering our brands and in each case we strive to effectively partner with our distributors to give our beverages the extra attention they deserve.

We maintain inventory in two public warehouses: New Jersey and California. Distributors place orders from either warehouse of their choosing. This flexibility allows them to cost-effectively manage their freight and take inventory when they need it. It’s our goal to allow distributors to carry an adequate supply of product without surplus. By making it easy for them to fill orders as often as they would like, we believe our distributors will always have the freshest possible products in stock and in their markets.

Malcor desarrolla propuestas focalizadas y relevantes, que se adaptan a los requerimientos de la contraparte. La idea es entregar un servicio a la medida del cliente, generando soluciones integrales y de gestión.

Lo importante para Malcor es centrarse en las prioridades que tiene el cliente, en lo que mas le interesa dentro de su terreno de negocios y en como podemos solucionar dichas preocupaciones y/o prioridades.

Nuestros servicios pueden brindarles soluciones integrales a sus necesidades, ya que permiten alcanzar un nivel de gestión empresarial y de competitividad acorde a los desafíos y oportunidades en todas las áreas de Comercio Exterior, ya que todos los servicios que intervienen se canalizan en un solo ente Malcor. Por tanto, se evitan la burocracia, las demoras, etc.

Lo anterior, permite a las empresas poder flexibilizar su gestión de costos, haciendo mucho más eficiente su operación, no incurriendo en gastos innecesarios. Las empresas deben enfocar sus esfuerzos en aquellos procesos en donde es fuerte y que son fundamentales en el éxito de su negocio, es decir, aquellos que le permiten tener ventaja competitiva.

Name: EMBUTIDOS FERMIN
Description:
FERMÍN es la primera empresa autorizada por el USDA para exportar produtos Ibéricos al mercado americano. 

Somos una empresa familiar fundada en 1.956 en La Alberca, un lugar mágico situado en el corazón del Parque Natural de las Batuecas - Sierra de Francia, declarada Reserva de Biosfera por la UNESCO.

A lo largo de estos poco más de 60 años nos hemos dedicado a la elaboración tradicional de productos Ibéricos y a su comercialización por todo el mundo. Estamos presentes en más de 20 países de los cinco continentes. Además de haber sido los primeros en el mercado americano, también fuimos los primeros en llevar el ibérico a Japón (1999), Canadá (2007) y Singapur (2008). Contamos también con una red de distribución en China, Hong Kong, Corea del Sur, Australia, LATAM y, por supuesto, todos los rincones de Europa.

Cumplimos con los más altos estándares de Calidad: USDA, Norma del Ibérico, IFS y BRC, y estamos certificados desde 2016 como Industria Ecológica. 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

FERMÍN is the first producer USDA approved to export Iberico products to the american market. 

We are a family run business founded in 1.956 in La Alberca, a magic place located in the heart of the Natural Park of “Las Batuecas – Sierra de Francia”, named UNESCO Biosphere Reserve.

For more than sixty years, FERMÍN has been dedicated to the artisanal elaboration of Iberico products and its world-wide marketing. We are currently present in more than 20 countries in five continents. On top of being the first in the American market, we are also the first to export Ibérico products to Japan (1999), Canada (2007) and Singapore (2008) and we have a distribution network in China, Hong Kong, South Korea, Australia and, of course, all the corners of Europe.

We meet the most demanding quality standards: USDA, Iberico Quality Norm, IFS and BRC, and we are certified since 2016 as an Ecological Industry.

Name: PRMA Industrial Women's Chapter
Description:
The Industrial Women Chapter of the Puerto Rico Manufacturers Association is committed to foster a comprehensive and inclusive entity which ensures integration, development and accelerates advancement of the Puerto Rico professional women community and their impact to the economy of Puerto Rico, business growth and professional advancement. 

Our Vision is to be the Puerto Rico multi-sector’s industry integrator of the industrial women community by empowering, advancing and promoting influence, inclusiveness, and gender balance. The industrial women chapter will drive economic solutions and business growth through superior industry leading rates of performance, in collaboration with internal and external business sectors and women networks. 

The Industry distinguishes the added value of women leaders as skillful business partners. The Industrial Women Chapter will become a resource for companies and individual members to achieve continuous business and organizational development through structured roadmaps, strategies and initiatives, benchmarking world-class business strategies and methodologies for competitiveness and professional growth.
The Industrial Women Chapter of the PRMA acts as an integrator of multi-sectorial companies and associations that could provide valuable tools and knowledge to enhance organizational structures, encourage collaborations and capability building to ensure the advancement of the women workforce to the most influential positions in the organization. 

We encourage strong mutual support networks among members; development of programs to transform current women challenges into enablers, foster legislation and incentives to facilitate work-family balance, mentoring opportunities for women to share strenghts, talents, and experience; fulfillment of our members leadership potential; career and personal development, and recognition of women;s achievements and of organizations that foster the advancement of women at work.

Name: Plexistab Bulgaria
Description:
Plexistab Bulgaria is a leading manufacturer of PVC reinforced hoses, delivering reliable hose solutions for industrial, agricultural, construction, food, and technical applications worldwide.

Established in 2000, the company was founded through a strategic partnership between Plexaco (Greece) and Stabil Engineering (Bulgaria), combining advanced hose manufacturing know-how with strong engineering and production expertise. This foundation allowed Plexistab to build long-term competence in PVC hose extrusion, reinforcement technologies, and quality-driven production.

Today, Plexistab Bulgaria is part of Stabil Group, a family-owned industrial holding uniting six companies operating on local and international markets, guided by long-term vision, responsibility, and sustainable growth.

Our production facility is located on a 10,000 m² industrial site, including 3,140 m² of modern, purpose-built manufacturing and warehouse space, fully dedicated to PVC reinforced hose production. With an annual capacity exceeding 3,500 tons, more than 90% of our output is exported to over 20 countries across Europe, Asia, Africa, and Australia.

Plexistab is a trusted partner for distributors, OEMs, and industrial clients, offering:
• a wide portfolio of reinforced PVC hoses
• consistent and controlled product quality
• reliable supply and logistics
• professional technical support
• customized solutions based on customer requirements
• a long-term partnership approach

Name: Best Cheese Corporation
Description:
Located in New York’s Westchester County, Best Cheese Corporation is the exclusive importer of Uniekaas Specialty Dutch Cheeses in the United States and Canada.  Uniekaas was founded in the mid 1950’s, when a small humble cooperative of cheese makers joined forces to share their knowledge and resources.  This joint effort produced the leader in the Dutch cheese market, specializing in unique Gouda styles made from cow, goat or sheep milk with Parrano being the flagship brand.  With Uniekaas, the integrity of the Dutch Cheese making process and traditions are preserved for generations to enjoy.

Best Cheese is also the owner and operator of the independently-run Coach Farm, the farmstead goat dairy and creamery.  You can find our products in major regional grocery retailers and specialty cheese shops.

Name: Special Steel Sections Ltd
Description:
Special Steel Sections is one of Europe's leading producers of bespoke special steel profiles, sections and complex shapes, manufacturing around 10,000 tonnes every year for distribution all around the world.

By using a combination of automated production and manual hand rolling, the company has established a niche in the market place whereby it can produce small batches of special sizes in an extremely efficient manner.  By comparison, today’s modern, fully automated, continuous rolling mills are designed for large, high volume production runs where size changing and set up time is slow, expensive and therefore, prohibitive.

Special Steel Sections (formerly Legg Brothers) was incorporated in 1982 and the business has undergone several changes and moves to facilitate its expansion. Today it is located in the industrial heartlands of the UK at Ettingshall, West Midlands.

Special Steel Sections creates the steel for 90 per cent of Britain's horseshoes and crafts the intricate steel used in virtually all window shutters in France.

Other steel products range from basic small angles that are used to manufacture fish tanks to the most complicated lockring sections that are used to lock together the piece built wheels that are typically used on earthmover vehicles.

Special Steel Sections is certified to Lloyd’s Register LRQA ISO 9001:2015 under certificate number LRQ 10047134.

Ulusal ve uluslararası ısıtma sektöründe mekan-kullanım suyu ısıtması, havuz suyu ısıtması ve merkezi uygulamalarda entegre çözümler üretmektedir.

Firmamız, 16 yıllık deneyimine dayanan marka gücünü ve ülke çapındaki satış-servis yetkinliğini, geniş satış ağının destekçisi olan KUZEYMAK yetkili bayileri ile inşa etmiştir. Ülke dahilindeki marka gücünü ve ürün-hizmet kalitesini yurtdışına da taşımış ve çok sayıda ülkeye ihracat gerçekleştirmiştir.

KUZEYMAK A.Ş., Mersin’de bulunan fabrikasında vakum tüplü güneş enerjisi sistemleri, katı yakıtlı kalorifer kazanları, katı yakıtlı-kuzineli kalorifer sobaları ve banyo boylerleri üretmektedir.

Kurulduğu günden bu yana teknolojiye ve inovasyona önem veren Arzu Bisiklet, ERP sistemi sayesinde tüm işlemlerini uzaktan kontrol edebilmekte ve böylece iş süreçleri daha hızlı ve daha güvenli ilerlemektedir.

Adını dürüstlük, güvenilirlik ve kalite üzerine kuran Arzu Bisiklet, tüm hizmetlerinde %100 müşteri memnuniyetini hedeflemekte ve en kaliteli ürünleri en hızlı şekilde pazara sunmaktadır.

Name: St. Lucia Distillers
Description:
St Lucia Distillers Group of Companies emerged from a tradition of the on-site, house-special rum production that was a common feature of the West Indian sugar plantation. Sugar’s by-product, molasses was fermented and distilled to rum, the demand for which has been a constant through the fluctuations of West Indian plantation economies. By the late 1950s, two distilleries remained, one at Dennery, the site of the Barnard family plantation, and the other Geest-owned at Roseau, the location of the now St Lucia Distillers Group of Companies. 

Formed in 1972 when the two distilleries amalgamated producing a now-discontinued blend of rum whose name reflected the merger, Denros Bounty Rum. The Barnard family bought out the Geest shares in 1992 and in 1997 sold shares to Trinidad-based Angostura Ltd., giving the company a wider regional presence and the capital to pursue the product development philosophy which has since characterised St Lucia Distillers Group of Companies. In 2005 the Barnard family, planters and rum distillers for over a century sold to CLICO, with third generation rum-maker Laurie Barnard staying on as Managing Director. 

St Lucia Distillers Group of Companies, has grown from producing a single-label mass-market rum to a portfolio of premium rums and liqueurs. 

Today, St Lucia Distillers Group of Companies boasts a range of over 25 rum and rum-related products which have performed exceptionally and won honours at international competitions.

Name: CFLYWAY Consulting
Description:
Soyez accompagnés dans toutes vos commandes internationales jusqu'à leurs livraisons en Nouvelle-Calédonie.

D’une petite commande sur Internet à une grosse commande, n’avez-vous jamais été frustrés par toutes les règles de transport ?
Choisir le transitaire, choisir le mode de transport, choisir un délai, …
Et le fameux « passage en douane » qui fait bien trop souvent peur … 
Car finalement, à l’arrivée de votre commande :
-	combien allez-vous devoir payer de taxe ?
-	est-ce que votre marchandise va être contrôlée ?
-	vous ne comprenez rien à la douane ?
-	…

Voici une petite parenthèse d'une donnée intéressante :
34% des produits du territoire sont importés d’Europe. La plupart d’entre eux subissent la taxe DD qu’ils ne devraient pas.

Soyez accompagnés.
L'entreprise CFLYWAY a la méthode qui va vous permettre de répondre à toutes ces interrogations car, saviez-vous que :
-	il existe une protection de marché donc une liste de produits interdits à l’importation ?
-	il existe une protection de la faune et la flore donc une liste de produits soumis à des obligations phytosanitaire ?
-	il existe différentes taxations suivant le type de marchandise et son origine ?

CFLYWAY a la méthode pour vous aider.
Sa consultante, Mathilde MAURER est diplômée en Transport International à Nouméa, ça fait plus de 15 ans qu'elle travaille dans l’importation et l’exportation et elle a travaillé plus de 10 ans dans le dédouanement de marchandise.

N'hésitez plus à contacter l'entreprise CFLYWAY pour anticiper vos prochaines commandes ou vous aider avec celles déjà en cours.

Une question ?
Une réponse au 844062 ou par e-mail à contact@cflyway.com.

Description:
Бел'экспорт- это многофункциональная плодоовощная фирма, находящаяся в процветающем регионе Бельгии Хаспенгау, с главным офисом в г. Борглон. Многофункциональность фирмы позволяет нам полностью контролировать производство и коммерциализацию продукции на всех её основных этапах: от культивации до сбора урожая, включая сортировку, хранение, упаковку и транспортировку.
Строгое применение новейших методов культивации и новейшей технологии подтвержденно международными правомочными сертификатами(BRC, IFS, FAVV), признающими достижения фирмы по производству и маркетированию продукции высочайшего качества, отвечающего нормам безопастности.
Бел'экспорт поставляет на рынок приблизительно 80 000 тонн фруктов и овощей в год. Большая часть продукции экспортируется почти во все странны Европы и, частично, за её пределы. Такая международная ориентация стимулирует фирму, которая гарантирует свежую продукцию высокого качества в нужные сроки для каждого клиента.

Name: HARRY F. LONG, INC.
Description:
HARRY F. LONG, INC. is an independent Customs Brokerage firm founded in 1965. Based in Chicago, Illinois offering nationwide Customs services. 


Why Choose Us?
Data / Financial Privacy: We collect only the data required for customs clearance. This narrower scope provides a more controlled environment for privacy regarding financials.

Expertise in Customs Compliance:  We offer unparalleled knowledge of US customs regulations, reducing errors, delays, and penalties for your shipments.

Focused, Personalized Service:  We provide dedicated attention to every detail of your clearance process, ensuring tailored solutions for complex or high-stakes shipments.

Cost-Effective Solutions:  Avoid paying for unnecessary logistics services—our brokerage-only model saves you money by focusing solely on what you need: customs clearance.

Minimized Compliance Risks:  With our deep understanding of customs laws, we proactively manage compliance risks, protecting your business from audits and fines.

Faster Processing Times:  Our expertise and direct relationships with customs authorities enable quicker, more efficient clearance for your goods.

Stronger Advocacy:  We leverage our specialized focus to negotiate and resolve issues with customs, providing robust support on your behalf.

Name: Independent Logistic Solutions
Description:
Like all parts of your business, customs needs a professional approach, especially now, where a lot of customs regulations are changing rapidly, such as AEO, HT, AGS and EORI, and the internal or external audits attached to these.
Are you planning to import or export products? Apply for a customs license? We believe your organization should have customs knowledge because it could reduce cost and would support your logistical process,
Regarding:
•	When applying for a license or an AEO certificate, you will get a reduction of the deposit.
•	Regulations and licenses so you do not pay too much import duty and VAT.
•	An application letter to the authorities if you don’t agree with the import duties or penalties.
•	To support the internal and external audits.
•	Quality management to support your logistic process.

Independent Logistic Solutions (ILS) is a customs broker founded in 2005 and with our qualified staff we are able to solve all your customs related problems for a reasonable fee.
Independent Logistic Solutions (ILS) is specialized in:
•	Import, Export and Transit
•	AGS 1, 2, 3 and 4.
•	Duty Management Systems
•	Applying for a customs license
•	Applying for an AEO certificate
•	Internal and External audits
•	Quality management
•	Application letters for objections and appeals to the authorities
•	Applying for Certificates of origin by Chamber of Commerce
•	Fiscal representation
•	Training and presentation
We could also advice you on Logistic processes, fiscal subjects and all other customs relayed questions.In the broadest sense of the word?
ILS will give you personal service with a solution that suits your company.
If you have questions do not hesitate to contact us. We are happy to help you, because having knowledge ahead is the key to successful import and export.
Independent Logistic Solutions is your local professional expert on customs and the solution for all of  your customs and logistic problems.We will take your frustrations away

After 2 years with success and expansion of staff we moved upstairs in the same office building to an office of about 250 m2. Space, what a luxury ! 

Our newly constructed HQ is located near the 12 Km long river 'Rupel' which is a side river from our big river (Schelde) which brings all huge sea vessels from the North Sea to the actual Port of Antwerp
Furthermore the building itself has been constructed in a durable, renewable and environmentally friendly fashion. Some 90 % of all used construction materials are recyclable.
We as enterprisers have a responsibility towards the next generations, therefore we opted for re-used wood and steel as key materials with extra attention for insulation in order to minimize energy consumption.
Fotographs for your perusal.
We are extremely happy and proud with this achievement. Nothing is as rewarding as starting with an idea, working towards it and making it happen.

Name: Bazar Sazan Avand Herbs
Description:
Iran (formerly called Persia) is located in southwest Asia, within the Middle East region. It covers a territory of 1,648,195 square kilometers and has a population of about 80 million people. Iran’s borders extend 7,774 km, about one-third of which are seacoasts. Northern Iran borders the southern coastal areas of the Caspian Sea (663 km) while southern Iran borders the northern coastal areas of the Persian Gulf and the Sea of Oman (1,952 km).
Iran’s specific geographical position and variable climates make it unique in the world with its diverse climatic conditions. Among its 12 different geographic environments, Iran is divided into 5 major climates including Mediterranean, Desert and Half-desert, Warm-Humid, Warm-Dry, and Mountainous.
Due to this variety of climate, more than 7500 plant species grow in Iran, and about 1800 of those species are considered medicinal. Among these species, some are not found in any other part of the world.

Our Story:
Bazar Sazan Avand company was established in 2008 and has started supplying and exporting medicinal plants and herbs, gums, spices, extracts and essential oils, tea and herbal teas, dried vegetables and dried fruits from Iran since 2018. We have exported more than 500 tons (About 5000 cubic meters) of herbal products to Russia and Turkey so far.

Our vision:
Our vision is very simple: Creating a large business network in the medicinal plants and herbs industry with the help of 10 successful and loyal business partners by 2025. Our customers are our partners.

Our mission:
Our mission is to introduce a wide range of unique Iranian medicinal plants to world markets that are highly competitive in quality and price.

Our values:
For us, there is no higher value than maintaining the interests of our customers. We are honest with our customers and we are loyal to them. All our work is to deliver high quality products according to customer's scheduling.

Name: Buddy Belgium
Description:
Buddy Belgium was founded with the intention to become the first CBD hub in Europe. In April 2019, Belgium was the first country in the UE to regulate the commercialization of dried hemp flowers under 0,2% of THC, considering it as a "tobacco product". Therefore, we have partnered with a Belgian tobacco manufacturer, sharing our knowledge on both the tobacco and CBD markets. This unique association between a tobacco company & a cannabis company has allowed us to conquer the first ever regulated CBD market in UE. We have since gained an unequaled expertise regarding this booming industry by providing a bridge between these two markets.
 
Today, we are leading this revolution, pushing our CBD brands as a tobacco product to supermarkets, gas stations or groceries, while doing the same with our CBD oil brands to drug stores throughout the country. 
 
In the meantime, Luxembourg and Poland have followed Belgium by implementing the same fiscal status and we anticipate that the domino effect is already on the move for the rest of Europe.
 
This legalization also gave us the opportunity to develop our activities abroad, having one of the safest and clearest legal frameworks regarding the CBD products in UE. Therefore, we have now become specialists in importing and exporting such a sensible product.
 
Facts & stats : 
 
-Brussels-based CBD hub & fiscal warehouse founded in 2018
-Official importer of Cannabis Sativa L. licensed by the Belgian custom & excise administration
-Leader of the first fully regulated market of dried hemp flowers for smoking in UE
-6 tobacco brands in the mainstream distribution channels across Belgium, Luxembourg and Poland and currently the first provider for tobacco shops in France (6000+ clients)
-7 Partnerships with hemp growers across Europe & The USA
-+250,000 manufactured packages/ month
-10+ private labels in the tobacco sector
-Subsidiary company in Switzerland (logistic) & Macedonia (hemp production)
-Trainer for the Belgian police

Name: JUMORE
Description:
JumoreGlobal (www.jumoreglobal.com) is a world leading digital platform covering the whole industry chain and whole-process supply chain services. We integrate the entire spectrum of tangible products including raw materials like chemicals, non-ferrous metals, steels, energy, minerals, agricultural products, as well as industrial goods like manufacturing products, consumer goods and foods; intangible products including finance, logistics, big data, technology, consulting and certification, and other services.


With the Premium Membership service launched by the platform, suppliers who join JumoreGlobal as Premium Members can enjoy a range of exclusive privileges and benefits designed to maximize the exposure of their companies and products, and get easy access to more valuable business opportunities, so that they could expand their business across the world more quickly and efficiently.


JumoreGlobal Platforms Advantages



A Safe Cross-Border E-Commerce Platform
Enterprises on JumoreGlobal platforms are all recommended by government institutions, associations or chambers of commerce and authenticated by leading third party certification authorities in the world.


Concentration of Global Resources from 150+ Countries
JumoreGlobal launched National Pavilion for the whole world, which promotes premier industries and enterprises worldwide to do business effectively with advanced suppliers, servicers in global market.

Cover Wide Categories of Goods and Whole Industrial Chain
The line of business in JUMORE covers raw materials including minerals, metals, energy, chemicals, agricultural products, etc., as well as general goods from machinery to consumer goods and foods.

Comprehensive Services
Via service sectors of finance, logistics, big data analytics, Technology, consultancy and certification, JUMORE integrates global high-end services resources to help registered enterprises transform and upgrade.

World-Wide Marketplace Designed for Easy Trade and Cost Saving
As a supplier, JUMORE member can open online store, which allows user to maximize the exposure of products, increase the company’s authenticity to gain buyers’ trust, and display all products and services that have been highly optimized on all major search engines. As a buyer, JUMORE member has the opportunity to receive vast numbers of quotations from potential suppliers located in every corner of the world.

Precise Online Match-Making
As a member of JumoreGlobal platform, both the supplier and the buyer will be privileged with a 1v1 account manager who will match potential online partners that suit specific business the best.

Keep Pace with Latest Market Trend
Up-to-the-minute market and price trends are at suppliers’ and buyers’ hands to secure against loss arising from price fluctuation.

Name: Rent Engros
Description:
Rent Engros er en webshop, som udbyder rengøringsartikler og -udstyr af højeste kvalitet til engros-priser: https://rentengros.dk/

Vi er en underafdeling af rengøringsfirmaet Koncept Rengøring ApS, hvorfra vi har den altafgørende viden og kendskab til vores prisvenlige produkter. 

Vi har alt fra rygstøvsugere, affaldshåndtering, kemi, klude/mopper/pads og diverse former for rengøringsudstyr og -tilbehør.

VORES KONCEPT

1) Engros-priser

Vi kan udbyde rengøringsprodukter til markedets bedste priser, da vores fortjeneste ikke behøver være særlig stor. Da vi selv importerer til eget rengøringsfirma, som anvender alle webshoppens produkter, kan vi også selv benytte alt, vi ikke sælger. Dermed undgår vi alle former for spild og en for stor lagerbeholdning, hvilket betyder, at vi kan udbyde vores produkter til rentable priser.
- Det er Rent Engros

2) Indgående kendskab til kvaliteten

Vi udbyder ene og alene produkter, som vi selv bruger i praksis, hvorfor vi kan stå 100% inde for kvaliteten. En kvalitet som bl.a. har fokus på ergonomi, miljø og effektivitet. Grundet eget brug, ved vi også alt, om webshoppens produkter - dets kvaliteter, dets brug og dets effekt. Vores kunder kan derfor altid få professionel og personlig hjælp.
 - Det er Rent Engros

3) Motiveret af at hjælpe andre erhvervsdrivende 

Rent Engros startede ud fra en ærgrelse over, at indkøbspriserne på rengøringsprodukter har været stigende. Vi følte, at det især gik ud over de små og mellemstore virksomheder, hvilket er en skam. Derfor så vi snittet til at lave en webshop med de bedste produkter til prisen, som vi netop ikke behøver en stor fortjeneste af at sælge.
- Det er Rent Engros

→ Vi tror på, at ærlighed, stort kendskab og gode priser er vejen frem. Vi er fagprofessionelle, der ønsker at hjælpe andre i samme branche.

Har du spørgsmål til vores produkter eller service, så tøv ikke med at kontakte os på: salg@rentengros.dk eller 53842611. 

- Det er Rent Engros

Name: Instalek
Description:
OUR HISTORY:
Instalek started as RubberTech in 1998 founded by Rob Zieseniss focusing
specifically on the tyre and rubber industry. RubberTech secured the agency for McNeil & NRM Tyre Presses and Micro-Poise Measurement Systems (now Ametek Micro-Poise) and to this day still represent these two companies in the industry.

Over the years, the company expanded to take on several other agencies including APV, RRR, Rogers, Sterns, Barco, Personna, Lighthouse and REA JET. In 2008 the company rebranded to Instalek SA. At this point, Instalek was heavily focused and invested in representing brands in SA.

ABOUT US:
Instalek has changed course from its beginnings where we were solely focused on agency-based business, we are now oriented to a service-based business model which is focused on specialized industrial sourcing and procurement services. While we still have a strong presence in the Tyre and Rubber industry, Instalek also operates in the Automotive, FMCG, Steel, Wood
and Mining industries as well as specialized parts for machine builders. With us having national footprint, we are to supply customers throughout South Africa with our head office being based in the friendly city of Port Elizabeth.
In January 2020, Instalek took the decision to begin a new phase in our growth plan. “Instalek SA” has since rebranded to “Instalek” and has concluded a deal to become a Level 2 BB-BEE QSE business to meet the demands our customers in South Africa.

Over the years Instalek has evolved to offer a full outsource purchasing solution covering sourcing, purchasing and logistics to a number of companies within many different industries. Our area of expertise lies in the procurement of maintenance items, equipment and spares, as well as developing a wide range of expertise to assist our customers with product quality improvement and scrap reduction.

THE FUTURE:
Instalek is now aimed at becoming a formidable force in industrial sourcing and procurement.

Name: E Özelçi Otomotiv San. Tic. Ltd. Şti
Description:
Volkswagen Classic Club was founded in 1996 to provide Beetles to the Beetle lovers. In the beginning we were just bringing Beetles to the owners, later on we started to sell VW parts via our web site, do repairs, maintenances and paintjobs to all VW Classic cars. That way we united different jobs to create VW concept garage.

       From spare parts to daily maintenance we provide ANY service that a Volkswagen could ever need. We import spare parts and accessories from all quarters. So you can find any part or special accessory in our garage too. VW Classic Club has proven itself with body works, paintjobs, furnishing interiors and ,electronical and mechanical restorations. We are the one and only company in Turkey that do these work gladly and professionally.

The passion and love of the Beetles haul us away to feel their souls and solve their chemistry. We aspired to bring these lovely endangered creatures to life. We have a huge respect to Volkswagen and we envy its perfection considering the technology back then. No other car in the world has consubstantiated cuteness and brilliance this much.

       We provide every part and equipment that would keep the Beetles alive. We can restore them to their initial roll out state.

       According to the customers desire we restore the cars to the most original state. The vehicles which have been restored meticulously by the experts in our garage, are delivered seamlessly to the customers. Being a Volkswagen owner also means that you have an impeccable taste. While you cant get out of the standards in modern cars, you can decide every single detail for your Beetle from the colors of your upholsteries to the accessories. So when the restoration is finished, your car would be unique.

       VW Classic Club is a special garage that can restore a rust bucket wreckage to the factory new state, back to its roots. If you have any dreams like this, do not hesitate for coming to our garage.

Name: Hands-On Science AB
Description:
Hands-On Science erbjuder spännande läromedel och kompetensutveckling för kreativ inlärning. Vi på Hands-On Science har valt ut intressanta och stimulerande material och produkter så att barn och elever ska få mer Hands-On upplevelser i verksamheten.

2019 blev Hands-On Science ett systerföretag till Lekolar AB med en gemensam ägare Nalka Invest AB. Tillsammans med Lekolar är vi nu marknadsledande i Norden på att skapa lärmiljöer i skolor och förskolor genom att tillhandahålla pedagogiska produkter, möbler, inredning, lekplatsutrustning mm. Som ett fristående bolag inom Lekolarkoncernen fortsätter Hands-On Science att erbjuda sin specialistkompetens och breda sortiment inom programmering, digitala verktyg och kreativt skapande med ett tekniskt och naturvetenskapligt fokus.

Hands-On Science vill tillsammans med Lekolar fortsätta att inspirera pedagoger till en mer "Hands-On undervisning" i skola och förskola - Med en gemensam mission att hjälpa barn att växa.  

 


Hands-On Science erbjuder spännande läromedel och fortbildning för kreativ inlärning. Vi har vad som behövs för att göra matematik, teknik och naturvetenskap roligt. Lär dig programmering och låt skapande, digital förståelse och nyfikenhet förenas.

Hos oss hittar du material för nyfikna i alla åldrar, förskola, grundskola, gymnasium och
högskola. Vi fortbildar pedagoger i alla skolformer i programmering och användandet av digitala verktyg. Våra kurser är verksamhetsnära, hands-on och kopplade till de styrdokument som åligger skola och förskola.

Notre prestation de Sourcing est un moyen efficace pour votre société d'accéder au marché Australien ou encore Chinois, et cela à moindre coût. Kangourou agit comme correspondant et observateur pour votre entreprise.
Une recherche de fournisseurs et de produits correspondant à vos besoins.

Nous nous engageons, au vu de vos besoins et de vos impératifs, à sélectionner des fournisseurs et à vous proposer leurs services. Nous établirons une liste des produits aptes à répondre à vos attentes.
Une communication claire : rapidité, réactivité, flexibilité!

Notre équipe de sourceurs et d'ingénieurs assure le lien avec vos fournisseurs pour vérifier la qualité des produits et respecter les délais.
Profitez de notre expérience et de nos contacts!

La connaissance approfondie des marchés Australiens et Chinois et notre expérience avec les producteurs nous permettent de solutionner les problèmes de façon rapide et de limiter les risques de perte de contrôle et de non-satisfaction.

L'interculturalité "Sino-Franco-Australienne" au sein de Kangourou permet à la fois de répondre à vos besoins et de pouvoir travailler à l'international.

Aujourd'hui Kangourou est complètement intégré en Australie, en Chine et dans les îles du Pacifique grâce à la complémentarité entre les membres de chaque pays améliorant ainsi l'interface entre les cultures.

Nous vérifions donc que les produits réalisés comportent bien les détails nécessaires en vous adressant des photos, schémas détaillés, échantillons ou encore en faisant réaliser des prototypes.

 What Does MDD Do?

MDD is a comprehensive distribution company specializing in food service products. Our carefully curated portfolio caters to the European markets. From Lebanese mouné, spices, and oils to pickles, cheese, nuts, soaps, and other Mediterranean goods, we offer a uniquely diverse range. Fresh fruits and vegetables are also part of our offerings.

MDD aims to thrive in the Belgian market and beyond, positioning itself as the premier distributor of Middle Eastern and other distinctive fresh and food service products across Europe.

Name: OTTO Advisory Consultoria e Assessoria Ltda
Description:
SOBRE NÓS

A OTTO ADVISORY nasceu como uma empresa especializada em importação, representação e distribuição de autopeças atendendo clientes e lojistas em todo território nacional, chamada OTTO Auto Parts.
 
Com a crescente evolução do mercado de autopeças e efeitos da globalização, a OTTO Auto Parts sentiu a necessidade de evoluir junto e focar naquilo que aprendeu a fazer de melhor: o relacionamento B2B. 

Nasce então a OTTO ADVISORY, oferecendo serviços de assessoria em comércio exterior para toda empresa de qualquer setor que esteja interessada ou seja praticante de negócios internacionais, mostrando que a experiência em comex pode ser simples e eficaz.
 
NOSSA VISÃO

A mesma paixão que os move em seus negócios é aquela que nos move para atingir novos mercados e novos horizontes. Rompimento de barreiras e enxergar o mundo como um mercado à ser explorado é o que procuramos transmitir aos nossos clientes.
 
Acreditamos que o foco nos negócios é um dos fatores mais valiosos para qualquer empresa. Economize focando no que a sua faz de melhor e deixe com a OTTO ADVISORY a missão de criar seus relacionamentos internacionais!

NOSSOS SERVIÇOS

- Projetos de importação e exportação: Oferecidos através de 3 etapas simples e eficazes, saiba exatamente quando, onde e como atuar utilizando o nosso processo: Estudo de viabilidade; Análise de Fornecedor e Produto; Assessoria Aduaneira. São 3 procedimentos separados que ajudarão sua empresa ao máximo para obter o melhor e mais eficaz resultado.

- Terceirização de Analista Pleno. Para empresas já atuantes em comércio exterior, trabalhamos em total conjunto otimizando ao máximo a eficiência e manutenção dos negócios internacionais já em andamento. Reduza custos e aumente a eficiência focando sua empresa e funcionários naquilo que eles fazem de melhor!

Becoming a member with ACIT officers many benefits including:
Access to regular business seminars, breakfasts and lucheons which deal with 'doing business' in the international trade arena
Member discounts on ACIT networking events, training and trade publications
Quarterly newsletter that provides valuable information and news on international trade related issues
The opportunity to network with fellow importers and exporters to exchange ideas and share information

Special offers from ACIT sponsors and partners

Name: Buhr Agenturer AB
Description:
Vi är stolta över att leverera högkvalitativa och prisvärda produkter inom restaurang- och storköksbranschen sedan 1954.

Bolaget grundades av den tyska handelsmannen Jürgen Buhr i början av 50-talet. Tre decennier senare, närmare bestämt 1987 tog Hans Johansson över bolaget tillsammans med sin dåvarande kompanjon Bertil Hellström.

Idag jobbar Hans son Marcus (VD) på bolaget tillsammans med Oskar, Niklas, Maria och Maja. 

Vi jobbar som generalagent för de varumärken vi representerar och försäljning sker via ett brett återförsäljarnät i Sverige, Norge och Danmark. Vi hjälper gärna till med att ta fram konceptlösningar, specialdekorer, logotyper och offerter på våra produkter via önskad återförsäljare. Det är bara att kontakta oss för mer information.

Vi erbjuder allt för det dukade bordet (porslin, glas & bestick) för hotell och restaurang, men har även ett komplett sortiment för vård och omsorg. I tillägg till detta har vi produkter för frukostbuffén, baren och till köket.

De varumärken vi representerar har ett starkt miljöfokus och kan tillhandahålla önskade certifikat och dokument som bekräftar deras åtagande för att ständigt minska sin miljöpåverkan.

Slutligen strävar vi på Buhr alltid efter att erbjuda den bästa servicen vid varje tillfälle. Vi finns här för att svara på alla typer av frågor, följa upp leveranser och hjälpa dig att hitta rätt produkt för just din verksamhet.

Tveka aldrig att kontakta oss på telefon (031-802370) eller mail (info@buhr.se). Vi ser fram emot att höra ifrån dig!

Med vänliga hälsningar

Buhr Agenturer

Name: Elegant International
Description:
Elegant International, established in 2010, is a premier import-export and trading company based in Bangladesh, specializing in the sourcing and distribution of high-quality industrial products. Over the years, the company has built a strong reputation as a reliable importer and reseller, catering to various industries with a focus on oleo chemicals and other essential raw materials.

Our core product range includes Stearic Acid (rubber grade and cosmetic grade), Glycerin, Palm Wax, and Hydrocarbon Resin, which are widely used in multiple sectors such as rubber, cosmetics, pharmaceuticals, and manufacturing. These products play a crucial role in industrial applications, ensuring superior quality and performance for end-users.

At Elegant International, we prioritize quality, consistency, and customer satisfaction, ensuring that all our products meet international standards. Our strong sourcing capabilities allow us to procure premium-grade chemicals from globally recognized manufacturers, primarily from Malaysia, Indonesia, and China. We have developed long-term partnerships with trusted suppliers, enabling us to offer competitive pricing and reliable supply chains to our clients.

With an unwavering commitment to excellence, Elegant International has positioned itself as a trusted partner for businesses looking for high-quality raw materials. Our expertise in import and distribution, coupled with a deep understanding of industry trends, enables us to provide tailored solutions that meet the evolving needs of our clients.

As we continue to expand, we remain dedicated to upholding the highest standards in product quality, logistics efficiency, and customer service, reinforcing our status as a market leader in the chemical trading industry in Bangladesh and beyond.

Name: Portrade - Portuguese Australian Chamber of Commerce
Description:
Portrade is about many things. Like any international business chamber it seeks to promote cultural and social interaction between countries and amongst the expat or heritage based communities. That interaction creates understanding and communication which is the secret to all successful business activity.

And business activity is what we are about.

Both Portugal and Australia of necessity are export driven economies. Economies which Portrade thinks do not compete with but in fact complement each other. Portuguese products and services have much to offer the Australian market. Motor vehicles, cork, wine, food products, textiles, water products, home wares, linen and haberdashery, and of course tourism are all consumables that Australians will embrace with the right marketing and government support. These are all consumables that Portugal can offer at competitive prices and quality.

We cannot do it all. We will however lay the groundwork to raise awareness of Brand Portugal. We will also establish a network of government and business contacts which can clear the way for Portuguese businesses wishing to trade with Australia.

So if you are an Australian company wanting to know more about Portuguese products let us know and we will put you in touch with the right people. And if you are a Portuguese company with goods and services to sell have a look at Australia. There is a market waiting for you.

If you need more information about doing business in Australia with Portuguese companies give us a call.
We hope you enjoy our website and visit us often.

Bu sebeple ABD ve Avrupa pazarına uygun olan firmalarla çalışıyoruz. Yalnızca sürdürülebilir ticaret modelini geliştirebileceğimiz firmalar ile partnerlik yapıyoruz.

Sektörde öncü güvenilir partner firmaların araçlarını kullanarak verdiğimiz hizmeti güvence altına alıyoruz.

Misyonumuza bağlı kalarak bütün çalıştığımız firmalarla, 2013 yılından beri, İnsana değer veren Fark yaratan hizmet anlayışı ile danışmanlık hizmetlerimizi devam ettiriyoruz.

STRUCTURE, CARE, INVESTMENT, AND TRADITION

The vision of Cajugram and all its associates revolves around accountability, ethics, professionalism, innovation, profitability, and active environmental responsibility.

UDI-ES

UDI-DF

This facility was the first slab distribution center in the Midwest region of Brazil. Its main objective is to supply a variety of materials from all over the world in one location. Thus, fabricators, architects, and interiors designers have a single source for their needs, instead of resorting to other states when searching for a product.

UDI-PE

Recently, we opened up a Distribution Unit (UDI) in Recife that offers directly to the Brazilian northeast all the diversity of the national and imported commercialized by Cajugram.

Furthermore, this Unit was structured to optimize the deliveries via a munch truck to make easier the unloading of the materials.
POLÍTICA DE QUALIDADE

Always evolving through the satisfaction of our clients and associates.

We are a second-generation family business with over 25 years of experience connecting Europe and Asia. In 2001, we founded ACTIA to offer tailor-made solutions that combine sustainability, reliability, and excellent value for money.

While we supply a wide range of sustainable products for sectors such as retail, promotional, and cultural, since 2008 we have specialized in our core line: certified, eco-friendly, and customized earphones for tourism, culture, and events.

We design and manufacture in Asia under European supervision, ensuring:
• Certified earphones (CE, RoHS, UKCA, REACH, WEEE)
• Use of recycled materials and biomass, compostable packaging, eco-efficient logistics and transportation operations, and carbon offsetting
• Full customization of product and logistics
• Guaranteed deliveries either from factory or from our local stock in Barcelona

How do we work? Our 5-step process:

1. We select the most suitable model based on your technical requirements and user experience.
2. We validate the applicable regulations in your country to ensure compliance and avoid legal issues.
3. We customize the product (logo, colors, packaging, presentation) to align with your brand.
4. We manufacture under European control, ensuring quality and transparency throughout.
5. We deliver with no surprises—on time and with a smooth, reliable process.

If you're looking for an expert partner in responsible sourcing and hassle-free solutions, welcome to ACTIA, Sourcing for Solutions.

Name: Bhagwan Saw Mill
Description:
BSM is a prominent company specializing in import services and products, with a focus on KD Lumbers and Logs. With a commitment to quality and reliability, BSM has emerged as a key player in the international trade of wood products. We aim to set new standards for excellence and environmental responsibility, fostering a world where our timber products contribute to sustainable development and responsible resource management.

Founded in 1956, Bhagwan Saw Mill embarked on its journey with the establishment of Mahadev Saw Mill in Villupuram, Tamil Nadu, specializing in sawmill job work. Over the years, the company evolved and expanded its expertise, marking significant milestones in the timber industry.

In 1964, the inception of New Patel Saw Mill in Villupuram, Tamil Naidu. Trading of Balharshah, Kerala & Andaman Wood. As the decades progressed, Bhagwan Saw Mill continued to diversify its product range, adding White cedar, Kerala mahogany, and Rosewood to its trading portfolio in 1986 in Delhi.

The company’s commitment to meeting customer demands led to a specialization in offering Burma Teak tailored to buyer requirements in 1992. Notably, the introduction of Rubber Wood in 1996 showcased Bhagwan Saw Mill’s adaptability to market trends.

In the new millennium, Bhagwan Saw Mill expanded its horizons by importing American, European, and African Hardwoods in 2000. The strategic move to set up a sawmill in Gandhidham in 2006, followed by subsequent extensions in 2010, underscored the company’s dedication to growth and innovation.

Name: Export Control Webinars
Description:
Managing Global Supply chains in today's quickly changing world is a real challenge.  Exports of products, services and technologies are subject to controls from multiple jurisdictions including the International Traffic in Arms Regulations (ITAR), Export Administration Regulations (EAR), and Office of Foreign Asset Controls (OFAC) Sanctions and Embargoes. Information Technology and Encryption products create an additional level of complexity.  Export Control Webinars will keep you informed on the latest regulations changes and give practical advice on how to stay in compliance.   

Export Control Webinars is a service of Export Strategies, LLC, a trade compliance consultancy created by Felice Laird. 

Felice has over thirty years’ experience helping companies comply with the US Export Administration and International Traffic in Arms Regulations. Felice specializes in transactional work, reviewing clients’ product lines to establish licensing requirements and then providing guidance on how best to deal with any government restrictions on export. Felice is a subject matter expert in encryption export controls and has helped both large and small firms navigate the complex restrictions on data security technologies.

Prior to becoming a consultant, Felice worked at the Department of Commerce in what is now the Bureau of Industry and Security. She also worked as an International Trade Analyst at the law firm of Paul, Weiss, Rifkind, Wharton and Garrison and as an Export Compliance Administrator for GTE Corp (now Verizon).

Felice served on the encryption working group of the President’s Export Council Subcommittee on Export Administration (PECSEA), as well as serving as a PECSEA member during the Bush Administration. Felice is active in the National Council on International Trade and Development and TechAmerica’s Export Committee. She has a BA from the University of New Hampshire and a MS in International Business from the American University.

Name: UniCom for Trading , Import and Export.. LLC
Description:
Established in Alexandria in 2015, Unicom is a marketer and distributor of quality industrial raw materials.
Our products range from Fine Chemicals for highly specialised applications, to bulk Metals and Alloys delivered in shiploads to major steel mills and smelters.
Unicom’s business traverses a broad range of industries including steel, aluminium, foundry, welding, and construction, building materials, water treatment, plastics, agrichemicals, refractories and ceramics.
Our goal is to provide a complete package of technically outstanding products, supported by proficient, responsive staff and first class logistics.

Our Value Proposition
We pride ourselves in our ability to add value and create synergies for our supplier and customer partners. 
Our End To End Advantage
Our people are professionals who understand the intricacies of your industry and how to help and solve problems, not just write orders.
Value Beats Price

Naturally, you have to be price competitive to stay in business. But we also know that to really thrive in business you need to add value beyond price.
At Unicom we’ll strive to achieve that “great deal” for you. But with that comes a relationship and a commitment to delivering real value - the best ongoing technical and product support, logistics, and insight into what’s new and significant in materials for your industry.
Understanding Before Answers
We don’t believe in generic solutions. So before we jump to make recommendations or compile a quote, our first step is always to understand your needs.
We’ll take time to come to explore what’s important to you in a supply relationship - what’s working well, what you’re struggling with, and where you’d like to go with your business.
This way we can be confident we’re not just quoting the right products, but providing you with long term solutions that bring demonstrable value and minimise your risk - without any guesswork.

Numbers echo our tale. Producing around 50,000 pieces monthly, we craft possibilities. Hand-painted sketches transform into tangible art, and 50-100 styles redefine fashion landscapes.

Environmental responsibility is core to our values, exemplified by our GRS certification. Our dedicated QC team conducts meticulous inspections, ensuring excellence.

Timeliness is our promise. Updates on production progress and stringent quality checks guarantee punctual delivery.

In a realm of transformation, we stand out by forging direct connections with fabric manufacturers, securing cost advantages. Peers' brilliance fuels our pursuit of excellence.

At L&S Fashion, we craft narratives. Passion, innovation and craftsmanship run through our creations and capture the hearts of countless people.

Kablosuz iletişim, otomotiv, aydınlatma, beyaz eşya, askeri, sağlık, güvenlik, sayaç, araç takip, otomasyon , terazi , ups, akaryakıt , telekom ve interkom hizmet vermekte olduğumuz başlıca sektörlerdendir.

Sektöre girdiğimizden bu yana kazanmış olduğumuz bilgi birikimi ve dünya teknolojilerinin yakından takip edilmesiyle oluşan geniş vizyonumuzla müşterilerimizin en uygun çözümü bulmasında ve Türkiye Elektronik Sanayisi’nin gelişmesinde rolümüz büyüktür.Biwin SSD (Katı Hal Diskleri) Cebit Eurasia fuarında ilk kez sergilenmiş olup, başta Biyometri olmak üzere, Wifi, Bluetooth, Zigbee Modules, SDIO, ARM Boards ve Sensör konularında yeni ürün ve markaları duyurmaktayız.

İNTRADE BİLGİSAYAR VE ELEKTORNİK SANAYİİ TİCARET A.Ş, .Türkiye’de elektronik sektörde faaliyet gösteren üretici firmalara, Türkiye distribütörü olduğu firmaların;

•	Analog mixed signal, 
•	Power management, 
•	Motor control, 
•	Display dirver, 
•	Lcd, 
•	Battery management, 
•	MIMIC circuits, LNA, PAM, PLL synthesizer, 
•	Quartz crystal, thermal, voltage and current protection devices, 
•	Batteries, 
•	Led drivers, 
•	Wireless modules & ics (blutooth,ZigBee, 868Mhz, GSM/GPRS/EDGE), 
•	Thermal printers, printer mechansim, cable label printer, 
•	RFID & NFC ics& cards, vehicle tracking, 
•	Active&Passive components, antennas, connectors, 
•	Pcb ürünlerini sunarak arge ve üretim aşamalarında bu ürünlerin teknik destek hizmetini vermektedir.

Name: Mollica C.A.D. S.r.l.
Description:
Mollica C.A.D. vanta competenze uniche nel settore dell'assistenza doganale ed un prezioso know-how costruito in più di 50 anni di attività. Certificata AEO, grazie alla sua esperienza, organizzazione e dimensione, è in grado di proporre i migliori servizi del settore a prezzi assolutamente competitivi. 
La competenza in materia di tecnica e legislazione doganale, i tanti anni di professione a costante contatto con le amministrazioni dello Stato e con le problematiche del commercio con l’estero in tutta la sua complessità, ci hanno permesso di acquisire una completa competenza professionale in grado di soddisfare le esigenze delle maggiori aziende commerciali ed industriali del ns. territorio. 
Vanta personale di grande esperienza con provate conoscenze tecniche, con uffici a Milano, presso l’aereoprto di Malpensa e a Firenze, corrispondenti diretti nei porti di Genova e La Spezia. Nella struttura di Milano c'è un magazzino di ca. 2.000 mq attrezzato e strutturato in diverse aree doganali sia come deposito di temporanea custodia, che deposito IVA, oltre ad aree libere a disposizione della ns. clientela utili per ogni specifica necessità. 
Dispone inoltre, di un reparto Intrastat dedicato esclusivamente alla gestione degli adempimenti connessi con gli scambi intracomunitari, e una gestione in via telematica della registrazione delle singole fatture.

Mollica C.A.D. boasts unique expertise in customs assistance and valuable know-how gained over more than 50 years in business. AEO certified, thanks to its experience, organisation and size, it is able to offer the best services in the industry at extremely competitive prices. Its expertise in customs technique and legislation and the many years in business in constant contact with government departments and with the problems of foreign trade in all its complexity have enabled it to acquire comprehensive professional expertise able to satisfy major commercial and industrial companies in the area.

Name: Growplus Exports Private Limited, India
Description:
GrowPlus Exports Private Limited is one of India’s leading family-owned table grape grower–exporters, with a farming legacy dating back to 1985. From an initial 1-hectare vineyard, we have grown into a professionally managed operation cultivating grapes across 40+HA, dedicated exclusively to premium-quality production.

With over 25 years of experience supplying grapes aligned to European supermarket specifications, GrowPlus operates under a strict export-oriented production model. Our farms integrate modern viticulture practices, advanced crop management technologies, and responsible labor and environmental standards to ensure consistent quality, food safety, and traceability.

We are now expanding our direct presence in the EU and UK markets, building a transparent farm-to-market value chain that connects our vineyards directly with importers, retailers, and end consumers. This approach ensures tighter control over quality, continuity of supply, and long-term program reliability.

Our APEDA-approved packhouse operates in full compliance with Indian export regulations and international market requirements, supporting efficient post-harvest handling and export logistics.

GrowPlus Exports Pvt. Ltd. is a long-term, program-focused partner—combining scale, experience, and reliability to deliver Indian grapes that meet the expectations of demanding European and UK retail markets. 
As part of its next growth phase, GrowPlus is actively investing in:

Modern farm technologies
Improved varietal performance
Sustainable and socially responsible production systems
Direct international market integration

The company is now positioning itself as a strategic cultivation and commercialization partner for:
International breeding companies seeking reliable test and commercial-scale growing partners in India.

Based on our close and long-term relations with the European, and especially German, multinational chemical industry, we are in an advanced position to supply branded products, often geographically unrestricted. All inquiries are welcome.

Since its foundation in 1954 OPC O. PRIESS has developed three business lines.
EXPORT:  Acting as Exporter, Buying Office or Distributor for technical items, machinery, tools, spares, sundries etc. in the Latin American Market (mainly Argentina, Brazil and Chile).
QUARTZ: Major supplier of quartz to the world market specialized in natural quartz crystals, quartz sands, as well as quartz glass products.
CHEMICALS: Specialized in the international supply of chemical and pharmaceutics.

HELLMUTH CARROUX:
For over 85 years Hellmuth Carroux has been a specialist for spices, herbs, medical and chemical raw materials and is a key supplier in all Latin American and Sub-Saharan African markets. Our special strengths are consolidated shipments.

For further information visit our website or contact us with your inquiries.

Furthermore we provide a high-quality service, making sure your machine is always in the best shape and the operator has knowledge on how to operate the 3D printer or 3D scanner.

We realize AM (Additive Manufacturing) is not only a far away future technology, it is a current day tech that already has proven itself in dozens of industries. It doesn't just provide 'the edge' companies are looking for to keep ahead in the competition. It is a way to make a giant leap without making the usual costs for such progress.
Costs reductions from 50% to 95% are not an exception, they're the reason the industry is booming.
The level of freedom in designing and manufacturing complex parts is far beyond that of conventional technology.
Furthermore lead-times are cut short to days or even hours, instead of the weeks in can sometimes take to have a part delivered.

These are the prime reasons companies look for 3D printing and having more than a decade of experience with AM we can advise and support your company on every level. From rapid proto-typing to production-scale 3D printing farms, together we can do it.

Name: BAYAMTAŞ İTHALAT İHRACAT A.Ş.
Description:
Kökleri 1945 yılında dayanan BAYAMTAŞ A.Ş, Mehmet Bayam tarafından Siirt’te kurulmuştur.

1970 yılından itibaren Türkiye’nin dünyaya açılan ihracat kapısı olan Mersin ilinde faaliyetlerine devam etmektedir.

70 yılı aşkın bir süredir hizmet veren firmamız babadan oğula geçerek ayakta kalan nadir kurumsal aile şirketlerinden biridir.

BAYAMTAŞ A.Ş mevcut tesislerinde günlük 500 ton işleme kapasitesiyle Türkiye’nin önde gelen bakliyat, pirinç, baharat, gıda ve orman ürünler konusunda üretici ve ihracatçı firmalar arasında yer almaktadır.

BAYAMTAŞ A.Ş 80.000 m2 alan üzerine kurulu 40.000 m2 kapalı alan tesislerinde toplam depolama kapasitesi 100.000 tondur.

BAYAMTAŞ A.Ş tesislerinde nohut, fasulye, kırmızı mercimek, yeşil mercimek, keçiboynuzu, bulgur ve pirinç gibi ürünlerin eleme, ayıklama, sınıflandırma ve paketleme işlemleri el değmeden son teknoloji kullanılarak özenle yapılmaktadır.

BAYAMTAŞ A.Ş yıllık üretim kapasitesi 180.000 ton olup; dünyanın dört bir yanına yıllık 100.000.000$ dış ticaret potansiyeline sahiptir.

BAYAMTAŞ A.Ş iç piyasadaki organize perakendecilere hizmet konusunda uzun yıllara dayanan tecrübesi olup bu konuda gerekli altyapıya ve deneyimli personele sahiptir.

BAYAMTAŞ A.Ş saatlik paketleme kapasitesi 20.000 paket olup; günlük paketleme kapasitesi 450.000 pakettir.

BAYAMTAŞ A.Ş temel prensibi; asla kapasitemizi aşan işlere girmemek, bunlarla ilgili söz vermemek ve verilen taahhütleri her ne şart altında olursa olsun eksiksiz olarak yerine getirmek üzere kurulmuştur.

BAYAMTAŞ A.Ş ISO22000:2005 Gıda güvenliği yönetim sertifikasına, üretim izinlerine ve kalite belgelerine sahip olup tüm ulusal ve uluslararası gıda hijyenine uygun altyapıya ve üretim ortamına sahiptir.

BAYAMTAŞ A.Ş bir çok insani yardım projelerini hayata geçirerek sosyal bir şirket olarak yoluna devam etmektedir.

BAYAMTAŞ A.Ş Birleşmiş milletler örgütü (UN), Dünya gıda programı (WFP) ve Kızılhaç’ın Türkiye’deki devamlı tedarikçilerindendir.

Şirkət, ildə 100.000 ton keyfiyyətli örtüklü qaynaq elektrodları, lehimləmə çubuqları, təmir və texniki xidmət üçün xüsusi əşyalar, həmçinin qorunan qaz mühitində arklar, flüsaltı arklar, toz qaynaq məftilləri, düzəldicilər, qorunan qaz mühitində və flüsaltı arklar üçün generatorlar istehsal edir.

Gedik Kaynak şirkəti qaynaq avadanlığı istehsalı sahəsində Türkiyənin lider təşkilatı olmağı bacardı. Qaynaq aparatları istehsalında uzun illər təcrübəsi olan Gedik Kaynak, GeKaMac brendi altında ən son invertor texnologiyalarından istifadə edərək örtüklü elektrodlar ilə əl ark qaynağı, toz məftilləri ilə qaynaq, argon ark qaynağı və flüsaltı qaynaq üçün aparatlar da istehsal edir. GeKaMac, məhsulların keyfiyyətini artırmaq və çeşidini genişləndirmək üçün R&D tərəfindən dəstəklənən fəaliyyətlərini davam etdirir.
