Description:
Jesteśmy firmą doradczo-szkoleniową specjalizującą się w obsłudze procesów towarzyszących wymianie handlowej pomiędzy Polską a Wielką Brytanią.

Naszymi Klientami są operatorzy logistyczni, firmy spedycyjne, transportowe i produkcyjne, które oferują swoje usługi na obu rynkach.

Naszymi Partnerami są agencje celne w obu krajach dzięki czemu potrafimy zorganizować kompletną obsługę celną w formule SPOC [Single Point of Contact].

Dzięki temu współpracujące z nami firmy, mają możliwość załatwienia wszelkich procedur celnych w jednym miejscu, poprzez jeden kontakt, a nad ich sprawami zawsze czuwa ten sam zespół.

Jeśli produkujesz żywność, dzięki nam uzyskasz możliwość załatwienia wszystkich formalności, po obu stronach w jednym miejscu - jeśli chcesz zorganizujemy transport, odprawę eksportową w Polsce, tranzyt, gotową instrukcję dla kierowcy, zgłoszenie IPAFFS, zgłoszenie GVMS i importowe...

Wspieramy firmy transportowe w rozwiązywaniu problemów z Border Force, bierzemy udział w komunikacji ze służbami celnymi Wielkiej Brytanii gdy z różnych powodów doszło, np. do zajęcia pojazdu lub przewożonych towarów.

Działamy kompleksowo - jeden kontakt, jeden punkt styku, jedna faktura... spokój nie ma ceny!

Organizujemy szkolenia z zakresu obowiązujących i zmieniających się procedur celnych w wymianie handlowej z Wielką Brytanią.

Szkolimy kierowców, uczulając, jak należy postępować aby uniknąć dotkliwych kar.

Projektujemy i wspieramy we wdrażaniu konkretnych procesów i procedur w firmach.

Wspieramy w dobrym przygotowaniu, bo dobrze przygotowane firmy minimalizują ryzyko utraty kontrahentów, przepadku towarów, wydłużenia czasu procedur celnych czy poniesienia znaczących kosztów związanych z błędami lub wynikającymi z niewiedzy.

Dzięki szerokiej sieci Partnerów oferujemy bardzo konkurencyjne ceny przy zachowaniu wysokiej jakości świadczonych usług, bo możemy sobie pozwolić na rezygnację z usług Partnera jeśli poziom obsługi nie dorównuje naszym standardom.

Sprawdź nas!

Description:
SGK Global Shipping services offers a broad range of services to meet our customers needs including but not limited to Air freighting, warehousing services, Procurement, Door-to-Door deliveries, cargo insurance, crating/packaging, Package consolidation, documentation, export packing and other logistics services.

Air cargo
SGK Global shipping is top notch when it comes to air transportation. We understand why you choose air transportation and strive to justify that choice. We stay in communication with our customers throughout the process by phone, electronic communication and our online tracking system. We don’t just say this, we do it; take the hassle off air cargo shipment.

Ocean Freight
Complete ocean freight services is at our finger tips. Utilizing high productivity carriers in all trade lanes between ports throughout the world, SGK can handle your shipment from port-to-port or door-to-door on a single Bill of Lading.
Through its comprehensive service of integrated logistics, the company is able to provide domestic and international transportation of containerized (Full Container Load (FCL) and Less Than Container Load (LCL)), Oversized Cargo, Roll On – Roll Off (ro-ro) Cargo by ocean, air, rail or highway carrier.
We handle a wide variety of wheeled, trucked and non-wheeled cargo

Trucking Services
SGK Global Shipping specializes in inter-modal transportation by providing inland and local transportation for both domestic and international shipments. We perform Less Than Truck Load (LTC) / Truckload ground transportation at pick up or drop-off location.

Warehousing
Complete warehousing, crating and storage for shipments at any point along the transport route within our global network.

Packaging
We provide packaging for simple and complex cargo. we are able to provide adequate packaging for all cargo types as needed ranging from boxing, palletizing, crating and dangerous goods packaging.

Procurement
Shop and we will ship or we can shop for you.

With the production facilities in Suriname and Hardenberg ( the Netherlands) we are able to provide our customers with high quality products. We give our customers the opportunity to have high quality hardwood species such as IPÉ, Basralocus and Massaranduba in their product range. We can deliver rough sawn and moulded hardwoods from our stock in Hardenberg, and on demand from South-America. 

THPS is a producer and exporter of a wide range of tropical hardwood products. All our products are produced from sustainable and well controlled forests in Suriname which guarantees the balance between economic, social and environmental motivations.

Besides producing and exporting we participate in concessions and we run several production units like log yards, sawmills and moulding facilities. With these production units we are able to deliver our customers on demand whether it are squares, rough sawn timber and moulded products like decking material.

Most of our wood species we can deliver both in non-FSC as well as FSC-certified. Above all our timber will be delivered according to the EUTR, which means all our timber is provable legal

The main wood species we deliver are Angelim Pedra, Basralocus, Bostamarinde, Ipé, Kopi, Purperheart, Tanimbuca, Pakuli, Massaranduba, Wana and Wallaba. Of course we can deliver other available wood species on your demand!

Description:
Sea Queen sells frozen fish. Too simple? Perhaps. But behind an apparently straightforward statement there is a set of skills, passions and professionalism that lead our Company to always strive for the best. The best in the choice of products, suppliers, and markets to be developed. But that's not all. There is also the constant stimulus for continuous updating, commercial enthusiam and creativity. In short: we love our work and we do nothing to hide it. A business with its core being in the Frozen Fish market, but still attentive to everything related to the world of food import and distribution which is why we have also increased our range of products to include Preserved Vegetables and recently also Dried Fruits and Nuts. All this with a very specific directive: attention to the customer and strict compliance with the standards of quality. Our mission is above all aimed at the development of each market. We don't like to just be present in the market. We aim to expand it, to build it using creativity to find new products.

Based in Milan, Sea Queen has its operational offices in Genoa, with the goods being stored in the warehouses of Eurofrigo Vernate where all safety standards are met and are quality certified. Sea Queen operates over five continents through contacts with the major producing and exporting countries of frozen fish and meat products, preserved vegetables, dried fruits and nuts and is constantly looking for new markets to expand or to develop. Our aim is always focused on the quality of the products, trying at all times to maintain a close and updated contact with the market trend, with the support of the most advanced forms of communication and the commitment of periodic trips to the various suppliers: condition which is essential to be able to offer our customers the best products, whilst maintaining competitive prices.

Our primary objective is to improve working conditions within foundries and elevate casting quality, all while upholding stringent environmental standards.

Our parent company, IDEAL MODEL, established in Turkey in 1981, has a rich history of over 40 years in the industry. This legacy has enabled us to evolve into a global brand, recognized for our technical prowess and the trust we have garnered from our clients worldwide. IDEAL MODEL’s longstanding commitment to excellence and innovation underpins our operations at Qingdao Ideal Engineering & Technology, driving us to continually push the boundaries in foundry solutions.

We take pride in our role as industry leaders, constantly striving to improve and adapt to meet the ever-changing demands of the foundry sector. Our dedication to quality, environmental sustainability, and customer satisfaction remains unwavering, as we look forward to many more years of success and growth on the global stage.

Name: Scanlico Denmark A/S
Description:
Scanlico Denmark A/S er en 100% dansk-ejet handelsvirksomhed med kontor og lager i Herlev. Virksomheden blev grundlagt i 1992 med udgangspunkt i en målsætning om at kunne levere kvalitetslygter til alle håndværkere uanset erhverv. I dag repræsenterer Scanlico flere førende brands hvor specielt lygter og pandelampe. Igennem årene er nye produktgrupper kommet til bl.a. faldsikrings- og klatreudstyr med tilhørende stort indendørs uddannelses- og træningscenter, batterier og batteriopladere, renseservietter, halsbeklædning, drikkedunke, termokrus, køletasker, låsetænger, udendørsbelysning, indendørsbelysning og havebelysning.

Scanlico Denmark A/S har Danmarks største sortiment af professionelle lygter – et sortiment, der består af en unik kombination af produkter udvalgt fra de førende leverandører world-wide, hvor vi vægter den høje kvalitet ekstremt højt. Vi skal være de første til at indrømme, at vi absolut ikke har de billigste produkter – tværtimod – men pris og kvalitet hænger nu engang sammen og Scanlico vil altid være kendetegnet for produkter af den allerbedste kvalitet. En kvalitet som vi til enhver tid kan, tør og vil stå inde for. Flere af vores produkter har garantier på 3, 5 og enkelte helt op til 10 år, hvilket dufter langt væk af kvalitet.

Det kræver kundelogin samt være registreret virksomhed for at handle i vores B2B webshop på scanlico.dk

Description:

Com sede em São Paulo, Capital, a BRANGEX é uma empresa brasileira especializada em comércio exterior.

Fazemos a logística completa, porta a porta, e os serviços de despachante aduaneiro para desembaraço e liberação da sua carga. Solicite uma cotação com todos os custos inclusos e iremos lhe enviar uma planilha completa gratuitamente: inclusos o custo dos produtos, frete, serviços aduaneiros e cálculos de todos impostos.

Possuímos em nosso quadro de colaboradores profissionais com larga experiência nas áreas de compra internacional, de logística, de consultoria e de prestação de serviços para o comércio exterior.

Proporcionamos suporte total desde a cotação de produtos, a compra no exterior, logística internacional e desembaraço aduaneiro de pequenos pacotes, pequenas cargas à containers completos. E também consolidamos cargas para empresas nacionais de pequeno, médio e grande porte (bem como para o comércio em geral e indústrias do Brasil e do exterior) e também prestamos serviços para pessoa física.

Nós também exportamos para você, solicite uma cotação completa inclusos: Frete Terrestre e Internacional, Despesas Aduaneiras e Serviços. E nós não cobramos a elaboração da planilha de custos de exportação.

Name: Shankar & Co Limited
Description:

Are you looking for a wholesaler that carries the well-known brands your customers want at the lowest possible prices in the industry? Do you value quality and exclusivity in the products you sell? Partner with Shankar & Co Ltd and stock your shelves with name brand Asian ethnic grocery products today. The Shankar & Co Ltd Mission
Headquartered in Hanwell, Ealing and serving retailers across the UK, Shankar & Co Ltd is a customer centric company dedicated to providing higher levels of customer service and product support. We offer an exclusive line of brands including our own premium quality Shankar brand. As the UK’s leading wholesaler of quality Asian ethnic food products, we have made it our mission to carry only the best products the industry has to offer and continue growing our business to add value to our product line and sustainability for our employees.

Shankar & Co Ltd was originally founded in 1987 as a Shankar Super Store in South Harrow. We were the UK’s first Asian ethnic retail shop and pioneered the introduction of many South Indian and Sri Lankan grocery brands to the UK’s Asian market. We are the sole traders of Kings brand products, ITC’s brands including Sunfeast, Aashirvaad, Kitchens of India and Yippee, along with our own brand of premium quality products.

Our state of the art, modern warehouse contains more than 300 product lines that are in stock and ready to ship today. Before, during and after every sale, the Shankar & Co Ltd team will be there to guide you and to help you choose the products you need for your retail locations.

Contact Shankar & Co Ltd
To learn more about Shankar & Co Ltd and how you can become a part of the Shankar wholesale community, contact us today and let one of our representatives assist you and answer any questions you might have.

Description:

SAGEM srl si occupa di tutte le attività inerenti il settore della logistica: import/export, riconsegne fianco camion, spedizioni, pratiche doganali, gestione di magazzini, ispezioni e controlli. Ha, inoltre, messo a disposizione dei propri clienti un gestionale online aggiornato quotidianamente sui quantitativi di merce messi a disposizione a fronte dei contratti di compravendita e dei saldi/ritiri giornalieri; il gestionale garantisce la tracciabilità in tempo reale. Inoltre, grazie alla partnership con altre società, fornisce i servizi di agenzia marittima e noli marittimi, consulenza, broker assicurativo e risk management. Tutte le società partner di Sagem sono soggette, infatti, alla gestione ed al coordinamento di SMC - Santi Marine Consulting.

Sagem tratta una vasta gamma di prodotti che vanno dall'agroalimentare (cereali, frutta, erba medica, farina di pesce, oli vegetali), ai minerals ed energetici, fino ai prodotti industriali, ai fertilizzanti ed ai prodotti forestali.

Name: Onur Dış Ticaret
Description:
Onur Dış Ticaret 1998 yılında İstanbul da kurulmuştur. Şirketimiz imalat, ithalat ve ihracat yapmaktadır. Firmamıza ait olan Tozmatik üniversal Toz torbası üretildikten sonra tüm Türkiye’de satışına başlamıştır. Türkiye genelinde çok büyük rağbet görmüştür.Ayrıca tüm Avrupa ülkelerine ihracatımız sürmektedir.  Türkiye’nin önde gelen büyük market ve hipermarketlerinde satılmaktadır.Her gün milyonlarca kağıt toz torbasının çöpe atılması çevre kirliliğine neden olmaktadır.  Bu nedenle tozmatik yıllarca kullanılacak, atılmayacak, yıkanabilecek ve yüksek toz tutma kapasitesi sağlayacak şekilde üretilmiştir. TOZMATİK DOĞA DOSTUDUR.
Tozmatiği, tüm dünya ülkelerine  tanıtmak ve satışını yapmaktır. Yaşadığımız modern dünyaya ayak uydurabilmek ihtiyaçlara farklı çözümler sunabilmek en büyük gayemizdir.
Onur Dış Ticaret çalışanları ile birlikte, müşterilerinin tatminini sağlayarak sağlıklı gelişmeyi, evrensel kalite ve standartlarda ürün ve hizmetler sunmayı amaçlar. Bu suretle müşterileri, ve bayileri için güvenilirlik, devamlılık ve saygınlık simgesi olmayı hedefler. 
Türkiye ve dünya için, çevre koruma bilinciyle davranmak ve bu bilinci yaymak görevimizdir. 
Müşterilerimiz için değer yaratmak, beklentilerine kalite ve istikrarla karşılık vermek ilk önceliğimizdir. Ürünlerimize sahip çıkmak ve satış sonrasında da müşterilerimizin yanında olmak görevimizdir. Kalitede, hizmette ve bayi ilişkilerimizde güvenilirlik şirket esaslarımızdandır.

Name: Wooden Homes India
Description:
At Wooden Homes India, we craft more than just houses—we create sustainable havens that blend nature with cutting-edge design. Part of the renowned Camilsons Group, our expertise spans five generations of fine wood craftsmanship. Whether it's a bespoke wooden villa, a modular cottage, or a serene eco-resort, we offer custom-built wooden structures that are durable, eco-friendly, and built to last.

Founded in 2010 by Mr. Caesar Fernandes, after being inspired by a personal experience, Wooden Homes India has become a leader in delivering strong, cost-effective homes across India, especially in Goa. Our interlocking technology enables us to build even in coastal and restricted zones, offering luxurious living while protecting the environment.

With a fully-equipped factory and innovative building techniques, we ensure that every project is tailored to your exact needs, all while supporting green, sustainable practices. Whether you dream of a tranquil retreat or a stylish home, we are here to make it a reality.

Choose Wooden Homes India for a home that’s crafted with passion, designed for comfort, and built to leave a lasting legacy.

Discover more and build your dream wooden home with us today!

Name: Chinz NZ Ltd
Description:
CHINZ has been supporting New Zealand companies to do business in China for over eight years.

CHINZ work with both importers and exporters to go navigate this difficult but very lucrative market.

Many of our clients have been in the food & beverage and health sectors but the experiences we have learned from cross all industries and we are finding an increasing diversity in product opportunities coming out of China.

Our view has always been that having access to your resource on the ground should be fundamental to your risk management strategy in China, someone who can understand and inform you what is happening on the ground, independent of your importer/distributors who, as we know, are all capable of telling you what they want you to hear rather than what is actually happening.
CHINZ  employ a great network of english speaking Chinese based contacts and together we can support the setup and ongoing needs of your business in China.

CHINZ are your link to great resources where you pay a monthly fee in NZ dollars with no employment issues.

Name: Al Majd Shipping & Customs Clearance - المجد للشحن والتخليص الجمركي
Description:
Provide an integrated service in the shipping and customs clearance as soon as possible and the best features
Shipping Services (land - air - sea)
Customs Clearance
Logistics & Warehousing
نشأت شركة المجد للشحن والتخليص الجمركي عام 2000 كإحدى شركات الشحن الدولى والتخليص الجمركى والتصدير. ومنذ ذلك الحين والشركة تعمل على تقديم أفضل وأسرع خدمات الشحن والتخليص الجمركي في آن معاً.
سواء في مجال الشحن الجوي أو البحري أو البري تمتلك الشركة فريق عمل يمتلك من القدرة والمهارة العلمية والعملية التى تؤهله لتقديم أفضل الخدمات في أسرع وقت ممكن،
اكتسبت الشركة السمعة التى تؤهلها للتنافس مع اكبر الشركات التي تشاركها في نفس المجال، و حازت على شرف التعامل مع أكبر الشركات فى مجال التصدير والاستيراد، لذا تسعى الشركة لتقديم أفضل خدماتها وكذلك توسع قاعدة عملائها بما يتماشى مع متطلبات السوق.
ما تقدمه شركة المجد للشحن والتخليص الجمركي ليس مجرد عملية شحن، بل هو عمل متكامل من الخبرة والإتقان والاحتراف وسرعة التنفيذ، إنه يسير قدماً مع التطور الدائم ومواكبة التكنولوجيا المعاصرة مما يتيح للعميل الإستفادة من حلول ملائمة للشحن تناسب وتوافق أدق شروطه ومتطلباته.
ولتوفير أقصى ما يمكن للزبائن من خدمات وتسهيلات تميزت شركة المجد بالحرص الأكيد على سلامة البضائع المشحونة والعناية بها أثناء التداول وتأمين معلومات مستمرة عنها خلال عملية الشحن بالإضافة للاختصار الأمثل للوقت بكافة مراحل الشحن، والتعاون والاتفاق مع الزبون للتوصل لأفضل برنامج توريد أو تصدير كامل لبضاعته والالتزام به .
إن شروطكم ومتطلباتكم أصبحت قواعد عمل لنا تواكب تعاوننا ضمن خدمات الشحن الدولي والترانزيت مهما كانت معقدة وتفتح كل يوم آفاق لحلول مبتكرة.
نحن نضع بين ايديكم شبكة عالمية ومحلية من وكلاء الشحن المحترفين تغطي كل بقاع العالم، تعمل بتناغم مطلق لتصل بضائعكم الى مقصدها بسلامة وضمن شروطكم مهما كانت الظروف.
السرعة، الأمان، الخدمة والأسعار المنافسة … هي رمز العمل المتطور المتكامل وهي ما تقدمه لكم شركة المجد في سوريا وحول العالم.

Cette dernière est l’art de dialoguer et de découvrir ce que cherchent  nos clients afin de déboucher sur un accord aux intérêts communs et d’obtenir un meilleur rapport Qualité-Prix-Service.

Name: Stichting Martinikerk Groningen
Description:

De kerk vervult een brede publieke functie en is de afgelopen decennia uitgegroeid tot een veelzijdig en uniek podium voor congressen, diners, jubilea, lezingen, concerten en tentoonstellingen. Het schip, het hoogkoor, de kapel, de Librije  en de Fredericikamer kunt u huren voor uw evenement. U kunt er ook trouwen: de Martinikerk is een officiële trouwlocatie van de Gemeente Groningen. Het schip leent zich perfect voor grote evenementen tot maar liefst 1200 gasten. Met een kleiner gezelschap (12 tot 100 personen) kunt u terecht in de Fredericikamer, de Librije of de kapel. Elke zondag wordt de Martinikerk gebruikt voor het doel waarvoor deze  is gebouwd: kerkdiensten. Een unieke ambiance in het hart van de stad. Martinikerk, ruimte voor inspiratie.

Name: Hand Touch
Description:
Hand Touch – Sustainable Handicrafts from the Heart of Bangladesh

At Hand Touch, we are more than just an exporter — we are a mission-driven brand empowering rural artisans and promoting sustainable living through handcrafted decor. Based in Bangladesh, we specialize in the manufacture and export of natural fiber home, garden, and lifestyle products. Our range includes eco-friendly baskets, planters, nursery pots, mats, tableware, kitchen linens, and other decor items, all made from materials like jute, seagrass, kaisa grass, cane, bamboo, rice straw, date palm leaf and Handloom. 

Our production process is built around a home-based artisan model. Women in rural villages handcraft products in their free time after household work, while our dedicated village production centers—managed by trained supervisors—ensure proper coordination, raw material supply, and timely collection of finished goods.

 What We Offer:
Custom & private label handicrafts
Handmade baskets, nursery pots & planters
Kitchen & home textiles from natural materials
Fair trade, sustainable sourcing
Flexible MOQs for small and large buyers
 Certified & Trusted:
We are proud to be SEDEX SMETA (4 Pillars), ISO 9001:2015, and GRS certified. Our practices meet international standards for ethical production, quality assurance, and sustainable sourcing.

 Who We Serve:

Name: MFC SRL
Description:
Il Gruppo MFC affonda le sue radici nel passato, infatti da generazioni la famiglia Calò, che è alla guida, è stata una famiglia di allevatori e macellai. L’ingrosso carni nasce nei primi anni ’90, quando i fratelli Calò, Domenico e Francesco decidono di mettere a frutto la lunga esperienza accumulata. Da una piccola macelleria nel grazioso borgo di Frigento ad un ingrosso di carni, l’Azienda è riuscita a ritagliarsi una buona fetta di mercato che ha portato alla nascita di un nuovo impianto innovativo e moderno che potesse soddisfare al meglio tutte le richieste della GDO. Oggi, oltre ad essere un’Azienda consolidata sul mercato, è una realtà in netta crescita figurando come punto di riferimento nel settore delle carni in Italia. Il processo di diversificazione e integrazioneha portato nel 2013 alla nascita del salumificio Irpinia Salumi e, nel 2014, all’acquisizione di una delle aziende leader in Campania per la distribuzione alimentare poi ribattezzata MFC Ho.Re.Ca.

Innovazione, sostenibilità, attenzione e cura del cliente accompagnata da un’attenta selezione dei  prodotti garantiscono una qualità superlativa dell’intera offerta.

Non a caso la vision aziendale è: diventare azienda leader nell’intero settore alimentare in Italia. 
Il profilo aziendale Linkedin nasce per un recruitment professionale, specializzato nella promozione e la vendita di quelli che sono i prodotti aziendali.

French Managed inspection company with offices in Paris, Nanjing and Guangzhou, Luxiberg Inspection is well-aware of European and American consumers quality standards and helps buyers since 2005 to ensure the quality, safety and compliance of their imports from China.
In 2013, Luxiberg Inspection began to extend its inspection services to many other Asian countries and today we can help also you to check your suppliers and productions in Vietnam, Bangladesh, India, Indonesia, Pakistan, Philippines, Turkey, Cambodia, Sri Lanka, Taiwan, Thailand and Malaysia. 
With 15 years of experience in quality control inspection service  in China and an  extensive background in quality management in Europe and China, we can advise the buyer all long the purchasing and producing process in China and in other Asian countries, providing to international buyers a complete range of  high quality customized inspection services from the factory audit services to the pre-shipment inspection and the container loading inspection  services.
No junior inspectors, none outsourcing of inspection service or hiring of freelance inspectors on the spot of the inspection. AT LUXIBERG, WE ONLY HAVE FULL-TIME EXPERIENCED INSPECTORS SPECIALIZED BY PRODUCTS FAMILY.

Luxiberg Inspection makes sure that your quality standards, specifications, requirements and expectations will be fully understood and respected by your suppliers in China and Asia.
 
Each inspection is conceived in base of  the client's needs, concerns and requirements and the auditing and quality inspection protocols adhere to the strictest international standards.

Concerning our inspection rates they are very competitive, less than US$ 190 USD in China coastal provinces and US$258 USD in the main industrial cities of Vietnam, India, Bangladesh, Pakistan, Indonesia, Philippines, Thailand, Cambodia and Sri Lanka.

Name: Sophia Global Trading Corporation
Description:
We are SOPHIA GLOBAL TRADING CORPORATION. 
We are the legacy and the rebirth of Queen-S International Trading Company, Inc. – built on the latter’s strong foundations and worldwide network in the steel and construction industries, but remade to better serve the fast-changing needs of the globalized market. 
QUEEN-S INTERNATIONAL TRADING COMPANY, INC. (QUEEN-S) was founded in 2007 by the late Ms. Sofia Dela Cruz Tundag after almost two decades of experience in the tin can manufacturing industry. It began as a local trading company for tinplate, tinplate scrap, copper wires, easy-open-ends, and other can manufacturing requirements. 
After establishing itself as the leading supplier of the local tin can manufacturing industry, Queen-S then reached out to the international market and formed cooperation with major principals from the USA, Brazil, Europe, India, Japan, Korea, Taiwan, and China. Its wide-ranging network and strong partnerships enabled Queen-S to provide its customers with premium quality materials at competitive prices.
With its continuous success, the company then ventured into other products and industries. Queen-S became a leading indentor and distributor not only of Electrolytic Tinplate and Tin-Free Steel, but also of other flat steel products such as Galvanized Coils, Galvalume Coils, Prepainted Coils, etc. It then added long steel products, semi-finished steel products, industrial machineries, and construction products to its offerings. 
Queen-S also became an active member and officer of several renowned organizations: Treasurer / Board of Director of the Philippine Iron & Steel Institute (PISI), Philippine National Committee Secretary for the Southeast Asia Iron & Steel Institute, and member of the Tin Can Manufacturers’ Association of the Philippines, Inc.

Name: Reliance Export S.A.
Description:
RELIANCE nació en el año 2000 como una compañía agrícola de exportación de productos especiales. La empresa es enteramente administrada por una familia de origen Francés establecida en la Argentina desde 1950.
La empresa procesa y exporta exclusivamente productos producidos en sus propios campos situados en la estancia SAN ANTONIO DE LOS TRECE, ofreciendo así garantías de trazabilidad.
En 2009, la empresa tiene previsto procesar y exportar más de 13.000 toneladas de maní alto oleico, pop corn, garbanzos y otros productos agrícolas menores.
El objetivo de la empresa es desarrollar una relación estable y sustentada en el tiempo para proveer con excelencia a sus clientes industriales.
El 70% de sus productos son exportados mayoritariamente a clientes industriales de la Unión Europea. La compañía exporta también a mercados en fuerte desarrollo tal como el Medio Oriente, América Latina y Australia.
Todos los productos de RELIANCE son rigurosamente controlados por surveyors internacionales que certifican su calidad y propiedades en cualquier instancia del proceso de producción y exportación.
SAN ANTONIO DE LOS TRECE, la empresa Agropecuaria, opera en Argentina desde 1950 y sus oficinas principales están situadas en la provincia de Córdoba, en el corazón de la región pampeana.
La compañía explota un área de aproximadamente 8000 hectáreas en una región conocida por sus optimas  condiciones de clima y suelo.
Sus productos son mayoritariamente no-commodities, tales como Maní Alto Oleico, Maíz Pisingallo y Garbanzos. SAN ANTONIO DE LOS TRECE también produce commodities tradicionales como soja, maíz, trigo y carnes.
Toda la producción de no-commodities de SAN ANTONIO DE LOS TRECE está libre de OGM.

Name: HI PRO
Description:
HI PRO is an Exporting company registered under the Ministry of Micro,Small & Medium Enterprises and Coir Board of India. We are authorised exporters of Coir based products who have collaborated with coir products manufacturing industries based on Pollachi, Theni and Coimbatore. We also export other Agricultural products, FMCG and electronics. We are here to bridge the gap between the demand in foreign countries with the supply from India and vice versa.

About Coir Industry:

Coir- Export oriented sector: 
Coir and coir products are now exported to 110 countries all over the world. It is interesting to note that the export of coir and coir products from the country touched an all-time high record of 756153 MT valued at Rs. 2192.45 crores during the year 2018-19.

Women empowerment: 
Most of the coir units in the country are located in rural areas and the workers belong to economically and socially weaker sections of the Society. It is estimated that 80% of the workforce in this sector are women and hence the industry contributes significantly to women empowerment.

Coir- ethnic, eco-friendly, hygienic and versatile: 
Going green is the call of 21st century. Coir, extracted from coconut is the fibre of the future. Thus, continuous efforts have been made to meet the needs of the industry in sustainable manner. The R&D efforts of the Coir Board of India were successful in developing a coir composite that can substitute wood, plywood and MDF boards (medium density fibre-boards).

Save nature, use Coir

With such a good potential for eco-friendly products from a renewable resource like coir, one would expect things to go smooth in the context of widespread debate on sustainable development. Coir is one of the most versatile fibre extracted from the Mother Nature. Today having multitude of applications, it touches every facet of man’s life and activity. Thus, due attention is required to be paid to the promotion and development of coir products.

Through personalized, five-star service we’ll make your entire logistics journey, from pickup to port, ocean and air to land, and delivery-to-door, a seamless and worry-free performance. To support this process we’ll provide exceptional communication, updating you daily on the progress of your shipment, so you’re never left wondering where your valuable goods may be.

How do we do this?

Our experienced ownership and management team implements a service-first philosophy into our operations, and only hires people who live their lives with a service-first approach. This ensures that our company philosophy is a natural mirror of the owners, managers, and employees who serve you. By thinking service-first, our customer’s needs are always at the forefront of our efforts.

World-wide, World-class

Whether you’re importing or exporting, clearing customs or moving freight, by air by sea or by land, our entire team around the globe is ready to deliver fast, reliable, world-class service for your organization.


With headquarters in Roselle, Illinois (Chicago/Greater O’Hare Region) and Kalamzoo, Michigan, Charter 3 Global provides a full range of services and expertise to the importing and exporting community. Charter 3 Global is licensed by the U.S. Dept of Homeland Security/U.S. Customs and Border Protection to operate as a Customs Broker and is licensed by the Federal Maritime Commission to operate as an Ocean Transportation Intermediary, serving as an Ocean Freight Forwarder and a Non-Vessel Operating Common Carrier.

Description:
Företaget
Lampia AB startades 1993 och är ett företag som i första hand importerar kvalitetsljuskällor åt återförsäljare, större slutförbrukare och andra grossister. Distribution och leverantörer

Sortiment
Vi är måna om att snabbt kunna leverera alla typer av ljuskällor. Därför lagerför vi c:a 1200 olika typer av ljuskällor. Skulle vi sakna det Ni behöver beställer vi hem det snabbt. Normalt sett tar det inte mer än c:a 1 vecka

Information
Lampia förmedlar information om nyheter och förändringar på marknaden. Vi håller även koll på nya tekniker och är snabba med att kunna leverera det senaste inom ljuskällor. på vår hemsida, www.lampia.se, finns mycket nyttig information om ljuskällor. Här hittar Ni också våra kataloger. Ni kan alltid få tekniska data på de ljuskällor vi tillhandahåller. Givetvis kan Ni alltid ringa oss för ett snabbt svar.

Serviceorganisation
I dagsläget är vi 3 heltidsanställda som jobbar med ordermottagning/försäljning och lager.

Tack vare vårt goda samarbet med en lång rad tillverkare kan vi alltid erbjuda ett mycket brett sortiment och en hög teknisk kunskap.

Ordermottagning kan idag ske via e-post, fax eller telefon.

Det finns alltid minst 1 person tillgänglig för mer avancerad teknisk rådgivning och support.

Företaget är anslutet till Repa-registret och Elkretsen.

Name: AREDICI SRL
Description:
Aredici srl è un distributore indipendente di componenti elettronici industriali a Bologna dal 2002. Nel tempo abbiamo potenziato gradualmente ma costantemente la nostra presenza sul mercato dell’elettronica industriale, approvvigionandoci direttamente presso i produttori e i franchise internazionali, nonché attraverso i canali del brokeraggio, accedendo alle eccedenze di una grandissima quantità di aziende nel mondo. Rivendita all'ingrosso di componenti elettronici: acquistiamo abitualmente componenti elettronici regolarmente in produzione solo da distributori autorizzati e da utilizzatori che possano garantirci la provenienza da canali ufficiali ed autorizzati delle merci presenti nei loro magazzini. Brokeraggio di componenti elettronici: interveniamo sul mercato del brokeraggio quando le abituali fonti non sono in grado di rispondere alle vostre esigenze di approvvigionamento o quando le vostre esigenze di budget vi impongono prezzi migliori di quanto abitualmente pagate. Per i componenti obsoleti e di difficile reperibilità ci rivolgiamo a fornitori selezionati e continuamente monitorati sulla qualità. Trattiamo quotidianamente componenti elettronici attivi (processori, analogici & lineari, memorie, logiche, discreti), passivi (condensatori, resistenze), elettromeccanici (relais, potenziometri) e di interconnessione (connettori) per vari settori quali automotive, elettromedicale, telecomunicazione, illuminazione, strumentazione di misura, controlli industriali. Gestione delle eccedenze di componenti elettronici: il vostro magazzino trabocca di componenti in eccedenza e desiderate rivenderli al miglior prezzo, risparmiando i costi di un eventuale smaltimento? Noi abbiamo la soluzione giusta per voi. Qualità: siamo stati tra i primi broker italiani ad avere la certificazione di qualità ISO 9001, ottenuta già dal 2003. Attualmente siamo certificati ISO 9001:2015

#componentielettronici
#obsoleti
#distribuzioneglobale
#industriaelettronica
#innovazionetecnologica

La conservación del medio ambiente es un punto importante dentro de la cadena comercial de nuestra compañía, cumpliendo con las normas aduaneras chilenas y del mundo, respetando dictámenes sanitarios y la capacidad de adaptarnos a régimen variados por la tecnología, profesionalismo y dedicación de nuestros proveedores extranjeros.

Hoy en día seguiremos trabajando con un mix comercial que beneficie a nuestros clientes en todo ámbito, brindando confianza, seguridad y transparencia en todas las operaciones mercantiles que existen y las que vendrán en el futuro.

Name: IranDeliver
Description:
گروه ایران دلیور یکی از زیر مجموعه های شرکت شومیکس تریدینگ (شماره ثبت ۵۴۱۶) در کشور امارات متحده عربی است که خود نیز با نام شرکت سامان بازرگان داتیس (شماره ثبت ۳۷۵۸۸) در ایران به ثبت رسیده است.

سوابق شرکت

ایران دلیور جزء اولین گروه از پایه گذاران سرویس های پرداخت آنلاین و خریدهای بین المللی در ایران میباشد. شروع فعالیت اعضای گروه به صورت غیررسمی به قبل از سال 1382 برمیگردد و بعد از چند سال فعالیت، این گروه به صورت رسمی فعالیت خود را از سال 1388 و با هدف اصلی خرید انواع کالاها از وب سایت های فروش کالا در سرتاسر جهان و ارسال آن به ایران آغاز نمود، فعالیتی که تا به این لحظه ادامه دارد.

هدف ما در این راه صرفه جویی در وقت مشتریان, کاهش هزینه ها و همچنین تهیه کلیه اقلامی است که تهیه آن در ایران به راحتی امکان پذیر نمی باشد.

تعدادی از خدمات ایران دلیور:

خرید از وب سایت های معتبر جهانی همانند Amazon، eBay
خرید انواع پوشاک به صورت تک یا تعداد از تمام نقاط دنیا
انجام کلیه پرداخت های بین المللی، حواله های بانکی و شارژ حساب های مالی
پرداخت هزینه های مربوط به ثبت نام دانشجویی یا مقالات بین المللی
همکاری در فروش محصولات داخلی در وب سایت برتر دنیا


چرا ایران دلیور!؟

گروه ایران دلیور با مرکزیت کشور امارات متحده عربی و ترکیه به همراه بیش از 30 نماینده در کشورهای امریکا، کانادا، انگلستان، آلمان، ایتالیا، فرانسه، اسپانیا، روسیه، ژاپن، چین، هنگ کنگ، سنگاپور، مالزی، هند و ... این امکان را دارد که حتی کالاهایی که فقط در داخل این کشورها عرضه میشوند را خریداری کرده و به آدرس شما ارسال نماید. همچنین امکان خرید بصورت محدود از استرالیا، کره جنوبی و تایلند نیز وجود دارد.

لوگو

طبیعتا لوگوی هر شرکت می بایست نشان دهنده زمینه فعالیت آن باشد. در طراحی لوگوی ایران دلیور این موضوع بخوبی در نظر گرفته شده، فلش هایی که مفهوم انتقال و جابجایی ( خرید و فروش ) را بخوبی نشان میدهند آنهم با رنگ هایی متفاوت که خود نشان دهنده تنوع می باشد، ضمن اینکه "سادگی" فاکتور بسیار مهمی در طراحی آن بوده است. نکته دیگر نمایش حرف "S" در میان لوگوست که برگرفته از نام شرکت ثبت شده ما در ایران یعنی سامان بازرگان داتیس می باشد.

Moore Equipment Sales (MES), New Jersey, USA, has built up trusted, mutually-beneficial commercial partnerships within the Southern Africa Development Community (SADC) through working with government procurement departments and representatives so they can invest in durable quality and value for money.

Moore Equipment Sales, which was founded in 2008, assists SADC government representatives by sourcing and supplying high-quality products and services cost-effectively to enable key countries, including Zimbabwe, Malawi and Namibia, to develop their military efficiency and is now doing the same with satellite telecommunications.

Tel-Plus Communications Ltd, Zambia (Subsidiary)

Moore Equipment Sales has established a new satellite voice and data communications company, Tel-Plus Communications LTD, Lusaka, Zambia, which is working alongside Cygnus Telecom, the biggest partner of global satellite telecoms giant Thuraya, Dubai.

Tel-Plus Communications and Cygnus Telecom will distribute telecoms across the wide and rugged terrain of the SADC regions to revolutionise communications while much of Africa is without fibre telecoms installation which could be 20 years behind schedule.

2010. godine proširili smo svoju ponudu i započeli suradnju sa velikim japanskim brandom Sharp. 2011. godine smo uveli još jedan veliki svjetski brand iz područja potrošačke elektronike, LG Electronics.

Name: Vantage Point Services
Description:
Vantage Point Services is a full-service Customs Brokerage firm, air and ocean Freight Forwarder with all the latest in automated features. As an ABI broker, Custom's Automated Broker Interface allows us to present your documents and clear your shipments in a timely manner. With our experience we go beyond just the simple clearances of your import cargo. We make available to our import clients the highest level of expertise required to comply with existing Customs regulations. Regardless of commodities being imported, or volume of imports, we are ready to serve. Employing friendly, capable and knowledgeable brokers is the first step that Vantage Point Services takes to insure the highest level of U.S. Customs compliance.

At Vantage Point Services, we know that the speed of the transaction and our expertise, not just of the transport vehicle, is what defines our success. Our primary goal is to achieve customer satisfaction through attentive customer service, which is achieved by simply talking to and updating our customers. Our international services also include air export, ocean freight, crating services, export documentation, all-risk cargo insurance, consular documentation, and international banking services. Currently we have 5 office locations worldwide. We also have a network of Agents worldwide to assist in meeting your transport requirements. Please contact us any time to put our team to work for you.

1996 yılında Samsun tesisleri ile, Akabe Madencilik A.Ş. firması, hizmet ağını genişletmiş, 2000 yılında demiryolu bağlantılı Sivas tesisleri ve 2001 yılında Miryak Kömür A.Ş.  ile, yine demiryolu bağlantılı Erzurum tesisleri ile faaliyetlerini büyüterek, Karadeniz, İç Anadolu, Doğu ve Güneydoğu Anadolu bölgelerine, 700 ü aşkın satıcı firma ile ısınma sektöründe en kaliteli Rus Kömürünü halkımızın, kurumlarımızın ve fabrikalarımızın güvenini kazanarak AKABE  markasını Türkiye ye kazandırmıştır.

24 yıldır hizmet veren firmamız bünyesinde halen, Samsun, Trabzon ve Sivas tesisleri ile toplam 1.000.000 ton kapasitesi ile, 300 çalışan personel ve 700 satıcı firmaya iş imkanı sunmuş, Türkiye'nin gelişmekte olan ekonomisine ve sanayisine katkıda bulunarak, katma değerini arttırmakta dır.

Firmamız bünyesinde Gümrük ve diğer Dış Ticaret Mevzuatları kanun yönetmelik,kararname,genelge ve tebliğleri sene içinde tüm değişiklikleri düzenli bir şekilde takip etmekte ve bu konular üzerinde ihracatçı ve ithalatçılara danışmanlık hizmetleri vermektedir.

Iremos cuidar de cada etapa: embarques, transportes especiais, desembaraços especializados e alinhamento com o planejamento tributário previamente estabelecido. Iremos economizar o seu tempo e rentabilizamos seus processos, mensurados em relatórios e KPI´s. Além disso, nossa remuneração é variável, baseada no volume de processos, eliminando os custos de manutenção de uma estrutura fixa.

Name: TELEIMPEX SA
Description:
Η TELEIMPEX A.E ιδρύθηκε το 1985 συνεχίζοντας τις δραστηριότητες των βασικών μετόχων της, που προυπήρχαν στην ελληνική αγορά απο το 1976.
Οι δραστηριότητες ξεκίνησαν με την εισαγωγή ανταλλακτικών για τηλεοράσεις (Οθόνες-Λυχνίες-Πληκτρολόγια) και την χονδρική διάθεση των προϊόντων αυτών σε εξειδικευμένα καταστήματα ηλεκτρονικών καθώς και σε εργοστάσια κατασκευής/συναρμολόγησης τηλεοράσεων της Ελλάδας.
Έχοντας πολυετή και ραγδαία ανάπτυξη η εταιρία επεκτάθηκε σε όλη την γκάμα των εξειδικευμένων ηλεκτρονικών προϊόντων, όπως επίσης σε συστήματα ασφαλείας, συστήματα ήχου, ναυτιλιακά-ηλεκτρονικά, ηλεκτρολογικό υλικό και διάφορα ηλεκτρονικά καταναλωτικά προϊόντα.
Η γκάμα των προϊόντων αυξήθηκε και σήμερα περιλαμβάνει περισσότερους από 6.000 κωδικούς στις κατηγορίες των επαγγελματικών ηχητικών συστημάτων, ήχος και εικόνα, συστήματα ασφαλείας, εργαλεία, αναλώσιμα και ναυτιλιακά είδη.
Το 1988 η εταιρία για να καλύψει την αυξανόμενη ζήτηση μετακόμισε σε ιδιόκτητες εγκαταστάσεις στον Άλιμο 3.000τμ.
Η εταιρία μας συνεχίζοντας τις επενδύσεις και επειδή οι εγκαταστάσεις στον Άλιμο υπερκαλύφθηκαν, το 2006 αγόρασε έκταση 22.000τμ κοντά στην 4η έξοδο της Αττικής Οδού στην εμπορική ζώνη Ασπροπύργου. Ανέγειρε νέες υπερσύχρονες εγκαταστάσεις 12000τ.μ και εξυπηρετεί καθημερινά κατά μέσο όρο 150 καταστήματα πελατών  με παράδοση εντός 24ωρών σε όλους τους συνεργάτες μας και με μηδενικό ποσοστό σφάλματος στις παραδόσεις μας.
Θέλοντας να παρέχουμε όσο το δυνατόν καλύτερες υπηρεσίες η εταιρία λειτουργεί με βάση το πρότυπο σύστημα διαχείρισης ποιότητας ISO-9001:2008
Τον Ιανουάριο του 2011 ξεκίνησε η νέα δραστηριότητα της εταιρίας στην διάθεση υψηλής ποιότητας προϊόντων ξενοδοχειακού εξοπλισμού και εξοπλισμού μαζικής εστίασης.
Για τον σκοπό αυτό δημιουργήσαμε τον νέο δικτυακό τόπο www.ready.gr
Το 2020 ανακαινίσαμε τις πρώτες μας εγκαταστάσεις στον Άλιμο δημιουργώντας τον μεγαλύτερο εκθεσιακό χώρο προϊόντων εξοπλισμού HO.RE.CA. στην Ελλάδα.

Name: First International Corporation
Description:
Your Global Partner for Premium Japanese Exports

Founded in 1994 in Hachinohe, Aomori, First International Corporation (FIC) is a trusted Japanese trading company specializing in the export of premium food products, fresh produce, and seafood to markets worldwide.

From renowned Aomori apples —including Sun Fuji, Orin, Meigetsu, Toki, and Haruka — to Wagyu beef, matcha green tea, yam potatoes (nagaimo), pears, peaches, persimmons, grapes, and apple juice, our produce reflects Japan’s unmatched quality and freshness. Our seafood exports include mackerel, yellowtail, scallops, cod, sardines, and more, sourced from trusted suppliers across Japan.

We also import lumber, onion, olive oil, wine, ferro silicon, and carbon additives, building strong global supply chains that link Japan with North America, Europe, China, Southeast Asia, and beyond.

At FIC, we combine authentic Japanese quality, sustainable sourcing, and reliable global logistics to ensure our clients receive products on time and in perfect condition. With multilingual support and long-term relationships with producers, we are committed to being a dependable partner for international trade.

“JAPAN QUALITY with GLOBAL REACH” — That’s FIC.

Name: Winton Stock Feed Ltd
Description:
Winton Stock Feed is the only wholly New Zealand owned molasses importer and has experienced massive growth in recent years due to the growth in its molasses operation.

The company has innovated the use of using dry goods containers to import molasses originally from the sugar mills in Fiji.
Now the product is sourced from a variety of countries, including Thailand, Indonesia and the Philippines.

The Company grew from being a Feed Mill based in the Southland and has become a New Zealand wide supplier and now serves many hundreds of farmers and Feed Mills and manufacturers. The company employs over 20 people including sales reps, covering the regions nationwide and molasses plants are run with a combination of contractor and company owned trucks.

Seven depots located throughout New Zealand ensure ease of supply for farmers nationwide.
The company supplies PKE throughout Southland and South Otago and the rest of NZ through our Partner Stores.
WSF purchased PFC Stock feeds in Feb 2014, to take advantage of the growing pelleted feed market in Southland.

Name: Snow Business USA Inc
Description:
Our Story: Graeme moved to Colorado from Southern Australia after he married Alison's mother, Diane, in the May of 1985. Prior to that, he spent nearly 10 seasons chasing snow between southeast Australia and the home of the Colorado Rockies. He started out in the photography business, where he met Diane, skiing in the outback at Keystone Mountain. He then transformed his photography talents into a top of the line postcard business. 

Graeme's first souvenir he ever created/sold was none other than pure Rocky Mountain snow in a can. Hand collected from the Arapahoe Basin ski area, visitors and locals could take home a piece of the Rockies with them. As the ski industry in Colorado got bigger, so did the business. He expanded into fashion items, custom print jobs, and became a preferred vendor for the regions Wal-Mart and Kroger brand stores.

He has since scaled the business back and primarily focuses on Summit County and the surrounding ski resorts. His daughter Alison has officially come on board to help out with the company. With a background in digital advertising, graphic design, and creative writing, she will be handling all of the online inquiries and product management. Contact her today if you have any questions, comments, concerns, or to say G'Day!

Description:
FERMÍN is the first producer USDA approved to export Iberico products to the american market.

Embutidos Fermín is a family run business founded in 1.956 in La Alberca, a magic place located in the heart of the Natural Park of “Las Batuecas – Sierra de Francia”, named UNESCO Biosphere Reserve. A place where fresh, cool breezes blow through the windows of the curing rooms, contributing to the slow curing process of our artisanal products.

For more than sixty years, FERMÍN has been dedicated to the artisanal elaboration of Iberico products and its world-wide marketing. We are currently present in more than 20 countries in five continents. On top of being the first in the American market, we are also the first to export Ibérico products to Japan (1999), Canada (2007) and Singapore (2008) and we have a distribution network in China, Hong Kong, South Korea, Australia...

We meet the most demanding quality standards: USDA, Iberico Quality Norm, IFS and BRC, and we are certified since 2016 as an Ecological Industry.

Name: Method Enterprise Sdn Bhd
Description:
Incorporated in 1990, Method Enterprise initially operated as a trading entity primarily focusing on supplying laboratory service fittings. Back then, most of these products were imported to Malaysia.

Realizing the vast potential to manufacture these products, Method Enterprise in 1994, pioneered the manufacturing of Laboratory Service Fittings in Malaysia. With the strong support from our customers and our uncompromising commitment to high quality, competitive prices and timely deliveries, Method achieved swift success. Subsequently, Method expanded into the manufacturing of other laboratory related products, namely Emergency Drench Shower, Emergency Eyewashes, and Chemical Waste Discharge System.

Soon after, Method involvement in laboratory furniture was inevitable. With the acquirement of exclusive distributorship from HyChem Chemical Resistant Epoxy Resin Worktop as a stepping stone in the laboratory furniture fabrication sector, it did not take long before Method’s aspiration became a reality.

Despite servicing a niche market and a modest turnover, Method Enterprise is today one of the main manufacturers of superior quality Laboratory Control Fittings, Emergency Drench Showers and Eyewashes in the ASEAN region.

Name: BONWAY
Description:
A empresa Bonway Brasil foi fundada no ano de 2016 na cidade de São Paulo tendo como sua principal atividade a importação de produtos de iluminação em LED.	
Visando a oportunidade gerada pela demanda de uma nova tecnologia no setor de iluminação, o LED (Light Emitting Diode, que significa “diodo emissor de luz”), que proporciona melhor desempenho, durabilidade, economia e sustentabilidade, surgiu a Bonway Brasil.
Com o objetivo de crescer no mercado de iluminação em LED, a empresa vem conquistando espaço devido à qualidade dos seus produtos, representados nas prateleiras  pelas marcas Roya e Rey, ao atendimento e ao preço acessível. Trazendo hoje um excelente custo benefício para o consumidor.
Além de abastecer o mercado atacadista com produtos de excelente qualidade, a Bonway Brasil dispõe de excelentes profissionais em seu quadro de colaboradores.
Apesar de recém chegada ao mercado, a Bonway conta com uma equipe experiente no ramo de importação e iluminação e  vem construindo uma relação sólida com seus parceiros que demonstram-se satisfeitos com os produtos e serviços da empresa. 
A tecnologia de iluminação LED está presente em todos os produtos da nossa linha de vendas e esses produtos geram boa economia já que reduzem muito o consumo de energia elétrica. São mais duráveis que as lâmpadas convencionais e não emitem radiação infravermelha nem ultravioleta o que os torna produtos ecológicos e sustentáveis. 
Atuando com seriedade, compromisso e respeito, a Bonway Iluminação Absoluta tem o que é necessário para crescer e impulsionar seus parceiros no mercado.

Name: JVN Papéis de Parede
Description:
A JVN é uma marca que conta histórias por meio de seus papéis. Mas vai além. Ela constrói as narrativas junto com seus funcionários, parceiros, clientes (lojistas, arquitetos e decoradores) e consumidores finais.
Conversa com todos, ouve o que têm a dizer, entende seus momentos, abraça suas dores, sonha junto, dá um jeito de realizar.
Aqui existe pouco não e muito sim.
Impossível? Só até conseguir concretizar.
Por isso, os papéis são extensões de criações coletivas, repletos de referências importantes. Eles trazem o passado, o presente e o futuro da Célia e da Mariana Vianna, mãe e filha. E de cada um de nós. Célia e Mariana atravessam a parede, para abrir espaços de conteúdo, conhecimento, desenvolvimento.
De conversas e diálogos relevantes. Não se restringem ao produto, nem mesmo ao negócio. Entendem o papel como parte de um ecossistema maior.
Apaixonadas por papéis, compartilham o que aprenderam ao longo de 30 anos, fazendo muitos mais se apaixonarem junto com elas.
Entenderam, afinal, que se trata de gente.
Pessoas com seus múltiplos papéis, com suas infinitas histórias.

Through our Canadian Partners and European Workshops we manufacture a series of high grade Cutting Boards and Chopping Blocks. All the wood which we use is FSC certified. What you prepare and serve on our boards is not always consumed in one time. Therefore we offer a broad range of eco-friendly packaging and storing products. You can store vegetables, fruit, cheese, bread, etc. for a much longer time and keep it in a far better condition than when stored in plastic foil or containers. Our products let your product breathe. Check our eco-kitchen section and you will find bee’s wraps, Food Huggers, Avocado Socks, Veji and Stasher bags. Great solutions to use at home, take to work or give to school.
Our European workshop can make more than boards and blocks. But all they manufacture is do in the most artisan way. Great craftsmanship, which makes us proud and happy to sell you our products.

Name: CustomsMobile
Description:
CustomsMobile, a first-of-its-kind free service, provides a wide array of US customs and trade data in one easy-to-navigate location.  The service, available via website (https://www.customsmobile.com) or via Android/iOS app (https://www.customsmobile.com/apps.html), is designed to give on-the-go access to US government workers, the trade community, and the general public, with unprecedented speed and searchability in a user-friendly smartphone and tablet-oriented layout.

CustomsMobile is available to users at no charge.  It provides: access to over 190,000 (and counting) legal rulings issued by CBP; Notices (CSMS messages); AD/CVD messages; the Harmonized Tariff Schedule of the United States; a database of Code of Federal Regulations, Titles 1 through 50 (administrative laws); Titles 1 through 54 of the U.S. Code; and contact information for all US ports. 

CustomsMobile is powered by a commercial-grade search engine, and its website ensures visitor privacy by securing connections with bank-level SSL encryption.  CustomsMobile outperforms all similar government sites not only in speed, but also with enhanced features.

Name: Internazionalizzazione Digitale - Vendere all'Estero
Description:
L‘internazionalizzazione digitale riguarda tutte quelle strategie che, nell’ambito del marketing online, si pongono l’obiettivo di promuovere un prodotto o far conoscere un marchio sui mercati esteri.
Operare con strategie di web marketing internazionale ben pianificate significa avere la concreta possibilità di analizzare le potenzialità dei mercati esteri e i profitti che possono derivare da una serie di azioni di ricerca di nuovi business (lead generation) e dalle vendite online (ECommerce B2B / B2C).

Le attività di internazionalizzazione digitale hanno lo scopo di portare nuovi visitatori al sito web e generare contatti da parte di potenziali clienti provenienti dai paesi target.

In una fase di studio preliminare, infatti, è necessario investire tempo e denaro per selezionare accuratamente i mercati online con cui si vuole dialogare, per individuare quello con il ritorno economico più immediato e il miglior rendimento. A questo punto della pianificazione della strategia di internazionalizzazione occorre fare attenzione a diversi aspetti, che devono essere valutati con cura.

Dopo aver eseguito con attenzione questa prima fase di studio, in base all’obiettivo che si intende raggiungere e al target di pubblico con cui si vuole dialogare, si procede con la pianificazione della strategia di internazionalizzazione più adatta al tipo di prodotto o servizio da commercializzare.

Lightweight and mold-resistant, these mats come in a range of textures and natural tones from the Saien Sparkle, Saien, Seiryu, Sazanami, and Honami collections. They are ideal for meditation spaces, tea rooms, and modern interiors. Sample tiles are also available for easy selection.

We also offer sealing systems named M.A.P. system powered by Maxell, which is famous for cassette tapes. Recently, damage to buildings due to air leaks has become a big problem for builders and architects. As a solution to this problem, Maxell has developed high quality easy to use products for airtight and moisture management for exterior and/or interior membrane, sheathing, and pipe penetration. M.A.P. system has complied with American standard and contributes to building the sustainable houses.

For interiors, our volcanic ash–based wall panels are fire-resistant and lightweight. DAIKEN MDF panels meet both FSC/PEFC and CARB-P2 standards. Additional offerings include eco-wood cabinets, minimalist faucets, perimeter ventilation systems, and protective materials such as corner guards and non-slip sheets.

Through our direct-to-consumer platform, we make high-quality, Japan-made tatami mats accessible to homeowners, builders, and designers across the country. From traditional aesthetics to construction essentials, Interra USA brings Japanese excellence to everyday American spaces.

Name: Meditaste
Description:
The Mediterranean Sea for thousands of years nourishes, connects, shelters its people. The favorable climate and geography have distinct importance to the way people lead a life by the Big Sea. The warm welcoming, the long Sunday lunches, the way to connect and share food, thoughts, laughs, dance, and even bittersweet moments of life. The Mediterranean is a street life, midday naps, shimmering beaches, cool breezes, emerald waters, sunbathed patios, after-work drinks. Where wine is considered food and it perfectly complements tapas, aperitif, and mezes.

We profoundly believe, the Mediterranean is not just a geographical region; it can be carried within no matter where you are.

Meditaste is created from the passion that we carry from our motherland.
Our nostos gave birth to this project to bridge our modern rhythm of life, with the essence of authentic living.

Our core value to our clients is our commitment to providing the best products in the swiftest time and handling orders of all quantities efficiently and smoothly as we push to create long-term partnerships with our farmers and clients.

Sudan contains one of the vastest fertile agricultural lands in the world with diverse soils and climates that are adequate for the production of a variety of agricultural crops and products. Sudanese agricultural exports are world renowned for being organic and of the best quality

Name: World Siam Group
Description:
World Siam Group co., ltd. (WSG) was founded on 2 February 1994. WSG started its business as an authorized distributor representing chromatography products from Agilent Technologies such as Gas Chromatography, Liquid Chromatography, Mass Spectrometry, Capillary Electrophoresis and UV Spectrometry.

With over 15 years of experience, WSG has been trusted with strong relationships by more than 150 organizations around Thailand including government, state enterprise, academic institute and private company. Today, WSG also offers a wide range of consumables and supplies from Agilent Technologies comprising of GC and LC columns, general chromatography supplies, instrument parts and sample preparations. Also, WSG provides post–sales service and maintenance support in packages of Service Contract, Preventive Maintenance, and Operational Qualification/Performance Verification (OQ/PV) in order to allow customers to conveniently manage their chromatography analysis so they can focus on their core works. Moreover, in late 2009, WSG was authorized as Frontier Laboratories distributor in Thailand offering Multi Functional Pyrolyzer, Microjet Cryo-Trap, Micro-UV irradiator, Auto–shot sampler including F-Search System Software.

Almost two decades in the industry, WSG is now the leading provider of comprehensive range of scientific instruments with effective sale, service and support, and distribution to customers all over Thailand.

Description:

Tüm yenilikleri kendi çalışmalarına entegre ederek yüksek performansla çalışmaktadır. Monad verdiği hizmetle; memnuniyeti, sürerliliği, uluslararası standartlara uygun ve kaliteli ürün bandıyla projelere değer katmayı, dürüst çalışma prensibiyle tarafsız olmayı ve sorumluluk bilinciyle hareket etmeyi önceliklileri arasında tutmaktadır. Birincil hedefiyse üstlendiği projeleri doğru süreç yönetimi çerçevesinde ve talep edilen kalitenin üstünde tamamlamaktır.

Ankara’da faaliyet gösteren Monad elektrik malzemeleri, OG/AG ve Zayıf Akım Kabloları, Aydınlatma Armatürleri, Elektrik Anahtar-Prizleriyle sektöründe Türkiye’nin ve dünyanın önde gelen üreticilerinin çözüm ortaklığını yapmaktadır. Hizmet verdiği tüm müşterilerine teknik destek sağlamaktadır. Müşterilerinin projelerini tekliflendirme aşamasından başlayıp, gerçekleşme aşamasına kadar yüksek kaliteye sahip ürün tedariği ve bütçelendirmesi konusunda da hizmet sunmaktadır.

Ürettiği malzemeleri ve çözümleri tek bir çatı altında toplayan Monad, kritik projelerin parçası olduğu için ürün seçimlerini uluslararası standartlara uyumlu gerçekleştirmektedir. Uzman ekibiyle talep edilen gereksinimlere göre hareket etmektedir ve üretici partnerine de danışmanlık sağlamaktadır. Süreç yönetimini hızlı ve güvenilir bir anlayışla tek kaynaktan çözümlemektedir.

Name: ELEGANT I.G. SUPPLYLINE
Description:
Elegant I.G, a small family-founded company, is today Australia’s largest supplier of IG consumables.
Elegant I.G’s history dates back to August 1996, when the owner and director, Sandro Ianni, founded the company with the vision of providing Australian manufacturers of insulating glass units (IGUs) with a complete line of quality components.
 
Starting out in a small warehouse, located in the outer Sydney suburb of Dee Why in New South Wales, Australia, as the outset Elegant I.G consisted only of Sandro, his wife and a part-time warehouse assistant. Between them they focused on supplying only the best IG consumables from around the world and providing an unrivalled level of service to the company’s handful of customers. It didn’t take long for word of this to spread and Elegant I.G’s customer base grew at a rapid pace.
 
As a result of this growth, in only its third year of operating, Elegant I.G purchased its own 210sqm warehouse a short distance away in Cromer. 
At this time, the company also expanded its staff with the addition of a product manager and full-time warehouse manager.
 
Over the next few years Sandro worked diligently to strengthen his knowledge of all aspects of the insulating glass industry, to solidify existing customer relationships and to form many new ones. Sandro’s tireless work cemented Elegant I.G’s reputation as an industry leader, and, in 2007, 
the company again relocated o accommodate its growing size.
 
The new site in Belrose, approximately 30 minutes from Sydney’s CBD, was selected with future growth in mind and Elegant I.G continues to operate from the 1300sqm facility, which is spread over three warehouses.
 
Currently employing six people, Elegant I.G’s small staff, made possible through efficient internal processes, is deceptive of the company’s stature in the market. Representing a range of leading manufacturers, Elegant I.G is proud to be the largest supplier of double glazing consumables in the Australian market.

Além disso, valorizamos a relação com os parceiros que nos representam e que reconhecem a G20 como “a marca parceira do representante”.

Contamos também com uma equipe interna integrada entre si e empenhada na busca pela fidelização com a marca, o que proporciona agilidade e eficiência no atendimento, suporte e apoio aos clientes e consumidores finais dos produtos G20. O projeto visual da marca possui padrão elevado, apresentando design funcional e de alto valor estético. Nosso cuidado com a imagem reflete no ponto de venda, proporcionando melhor aproveitamento do espaço físico disponível.

A G20 disponibiliza amplo mix de produtos em constante atualização, para oferecer ao mercado a melhor escolha. A linha de produtos é desenvolvida com foco no cliente sob rigoroso controle de qualidade, garantindo aos consumidores segurança, qualidade e confiabilidade. Esta história de dedicação e ética garantiu à G20 ser uma marca consolidada como referência em seu setor.

Name: Technology Global Trade Consulting

MK Technology’s staff includes professionals with extensive Government and private sector expertise in export controls and enforcement, including former senior export control and enforcement officials of the U.S. Departments of State, Commerce, Defense, Homeland Security and Treasury; former Congressional staffers; and senior level export compliance managers from leading defense and high technology firms.

Headquartered in Washington, DC, with offices in Texas, New England and the West Coast of the USA, our consultants also are based in Japan, Germany and the UK.

Our close collaboration with Trusted Trade Alliance, an import and supply chain security consultancy, gives MK-TTA a broad reach in the full spectrum of international import/export trade controls.

MK's worldwide clientele in the dual-use and munitions export sectors includes small, medium and multinational enterprises, think tanks, research universities and leading law firms. A major element of our practice is crafting Internal Control Plans (also called Export Control Management Systems), Technology Control Plans, trade-compliance programs for clients worldwide, and advice on national export-control regimes throughout the world.

Name: Sun Flare Systems Inc.
Description:
Sun Flare Systems Inc is a North American Renewable Energy and Solar Research & Development Company.

When giving the right opportunity Sun Flare Systems Inc goes to all ends of the solar spectrum to invent consumer powered products. The SOS in a Box was built to support and aid in teaching efforts in countries like Africa were power is generated solely by fossil fuels such as diesel generators. Our SOS in a Box is more than just for use in relief efforts. It has evolved into a portable solar generator that can power up first responded communication. It can also be adapted for marine, RV and consumer recreational efforts, such as camping, hunting or fishing. It also is a good alternative to gas generators for those times when your home power goes down. We have been given an opportunity to work with companies that provide vital equipment like wireless systems, first responded equipment and remote satellite communications.

The company continues to gain the “notice” of the media being aired on CNN’s “Road to Rio” in April 2012. This was seen in over 200 countries around the globe launching the start of the success of their business platform.  Sun Flare Systems Inc. is “A Company on the verge of taking off” as written in the summer edition in “US Business Executive Journal” pages 88-89.  Sun Flare Systems Inc. has the innovation to change outdoor media forever.  Think of all those outdoor billboards that are still the world’s largest media advertising avenues.  These all come with a cost of electrical consumption.  If we were to take one illuminated outdoor billboard at a time and take it off-grid using our latest technology think about the carbon offset we could achieve.  This would help reduce the consumption on energy that strains our electrical grid today.  We can take any size static board with the graphic image on the solar and have it still illuminated.  Now that is a way to change media.

Name: DASILVA Industries
Description:
DASILVA Corporation was established in the heart of London in 2000. In 2012, we restructured our operations and relocated our head office to the United Arab Emirates to better serve the growing demands of our clients across Europe, the Middle East, the Far East, and the United States. Our marketing offices remain based in London and Portugal, supported by representative offices around the world.
Originally focused on heavy machinery for international trade, DASILVA has since evolved into a global enterprise with a strong network in ferrous and non-ferrous materials. Through strategic partnerships with leading suppliers, we have expanded our activities into a wide range of sectors including metals, minerals, ores, and the production of primary ingots.
With facilities in several countries collecting and processing our own scrap materials, we handle every step of the trade process ourselves. There are no third parties involved—our clients deal directly with us, and all responsibilities rest with DASILVA.
We are committed to excellence, reliability, and customer satisfaction, ensuring security and transparency from the first enquiry to the final delivery. We guarantee consistent supply and offer clients the option to select preferred origins for all materials.
Dedicated to sustainability, DASILVA is guided by environmental responsibility and partners only with clients and suppliers who share the same values. All our operations comply with international legislation, and we continuously strive to contribute to a cleaner, more sustainable future as new technologies emerge.

Inovação e qualidade – LPA Despachante Oficial constitui-se no facilitador de desalfandegamento de mercadorias e bens, sempre com muita responsabilidade;

Name: APERT Engenharia de Avaliações e Assessoria Empresarial
Description:
A APERT surgiu no ano de 2000 quando seu fundador vislumbrou a oportunidade de aplicar seus conhecimentos e experiências profissionais anteriores em um mercado em expansão. O panorama empresarial da época que envolvia negociações entre empresas, privatizações, fusões etc, era favorável àquela que era uma das especialidades do seu criador: a avaliação de ativos (tangíveis e intangíveis).
Com demanda crescente, a APERT foi se especializando em Inspeção e Avaliação para transferência de ativos (no Brasil e no exterior), tanto na modalidade de aval. patrimonial quanto na avaliação do negócio, intensificando sua participação no ramo de consultoria.
Como forma de viabilizar a demanda dos clientes, se especializou em processos técnico-administrativos para importação de máquinas e equipamentos novos e usados como: classificação fiscal, pleitos de Ex-tarifários e Pareceres Técnicos, com diversas finalidades (admissão temporária, Importação de máquinas usadas, perícias judiciais, etc).
Com novas especializações, surgiu a consultoria voltada a Eng. de Segurança do Trabalho, focada nas indústrias e condomínios residenciais e comerciais.
Devido a uma atividade institucional e acadêmica de seu fundador e demais profissionais do staff técnico, a APERT oferece também cursos e palestras nas áreas voltadas a: Contabilidade, Comércio Exterior e Eng. de Segurança.

MISSÃO
Oferecer soluções técnicas e financeiras para as áreas Contábil, Financeira e de Comércio Exterior, Eng. de Segurança do Trabalho e de Seguros, que tragam benefícios competitivos aos nossos clientes e que sejam consoantes com as normas e legislação em vigor.
 
VISÃO
Ser reconhecida como empresa que agrega valor ao negócio, fiel e comprometida com as Normas e Leis nacionais e internacionais, transformando oportunidades em melhoria de eficiência e rentabilidade.

VALORES:
• Compromisso com a necessidade e o resultado do cliente
• Excelência com a simplicidade adequada
• Competência Técnica

Name: Kiwi and Associates
Description:
Are you a New Zealand, Australian or Pacifica based food or beverage business and would like to export your goods to the USA?  
 
With the right business guidance, your organisation can succeed. Let us help you to take one step closer by navigating U.S.A. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) rules and regulations, making it easier for you to export to the States.

How can we help you?

 FDA Registration - we provide a registration service for your organisation with the FDA, including the required provision of a US-based physical office through our USA-based office. 

 FDA Prior Notice Service - Prior Notices are required for each type of product within every shipment of commercial food and beverages entering the U.S.A. 

 FDA inspections in New Zealand - we work together with MPI and the US Consulate to make this process as simple as possible for your business.

  USA 'on the ground' services - we have a USA-based office and provide on the ground services, including a representative to assist with knowledge and support.

Additionally, the benefits of working with Kiwi and Associates are:
 A single point of contact in your time zone – our New Zealand market

 Free updates on any changes to the FDA system (every two years, the FDA require re-registration which we do for you at no additional cost)

 Notifications of any FDA requirements changes

 Should you change contacts or addresses, we will update your details with the FDA

 Freedom to choose and change your freight company and to use multiple agents/points of contact in the U.S.A.

If you need help expanding your product range into the USA please contact us today.

Name: Deng Ocean Beijing Trading LTD.
Description:
Deng Ocean Beijing Trading LTD. has to be seen as the collaboration of the second and third generations’ effort of a family business.  In the 1970s and 80s first trade business with China focused on the export of textiles and running a flourishing wholesale business in Hamburg, Germany. The changing global market and the new generations’ preferences lead to a shift in the core product supply towards food supplements.


In 2011 the time was finally ripe to turn the trade business around and use the accumulated knowledge to advance into the demands of global trade in the 21st century. It was time to start the import business to China. As could be expected we faced a number of challenges whilst applying existing knowledge to a close but not similar trade. First and foremost a Chinese legal entity had to be established. This happened in the Form of Deng Ocean Beijing Trading LTD.. The second phase mostly concentrated on acquiring the necessary license to be a general importer. Once this was achieved a product line had to be fixed to enter the Chinese market. By here at the latest our existing knowledge of the dynamics of the Chinese market proved to be extremely valuable. Furthermore, all products demand specific import processes which have now to be established to fully concentrate on the distribution.

At present we are running an office with a storage unit in Beijing with a young and motivated team to conquer the Chinese consumer market and expand our knowledge and position every day.

Name: Laureate Imports Company
Description:
Laureate Imports Company has a longstanding tradition of importing Slovenian premium wines in the US. 
The company was established in 1979 as a subsidiary of The Coca-Cola Trading Company. Its original mission was to generate counter-trade benefits for The Coca-Cola Company in several European Countries where Coca-Cola was expanding business. Laureate imported wines to the United States Market and portions of the hard currency generated were used in the host countries to buy ingredients to further the soft drink business there.

In 1991, Coca-Cola sold Laureate Imports Company to a major wine supplier at that time in Slovenia named Slovenijavino. In 2000, Slovenijavino’s trademarked wines were acquired by the very well known and highly regarded winery, Klet  Brda in Dobrovo on the Italian border.

Our Brands Avia, Traviata, Colliano, Bagueri, Quercus and Motnik are produced by Klet Brda, the leading winery in Slovenia. The winery unites 400 families, who have been working together for over fifty years and have turned local wine making into a success story.

Name: garba srl
Description:
Fondata nel 1996, Garba è un’azienda che opera nel settore cartoleria, materiale per la scuola e l’ufficio.
La società si avvale per la distribuzione dei propri prodotti, oltre che di un sito internet per le vendite on line, di 12 agenti plurimandatari, Tra i principali clienti della Garba figurano alcuni ipermercati (Iper, Panorama, Gigante), grossisti a livello nazionale (Polyedra, Berni), gruppi di acquisto (Pool Over, Ciack, Top Quality), dettaglianti sparsi su tutto il territorio italiano e circa 300 negozi specializzati (copisterie, librerie universitarie).
Carlo Modonesi, assistito dal suo team, gestisce personalmente l’importazione di prodotti di alto standard qualitativo, cercando di trasformare la propria azienda in un vero e proprio anello di congiunzione tra consumatore italiano e produttori stranieri. 
Tra i beni distribuiti da Garba spiccano le lavagne ed i prodotti in polipropilene realizzati dalla Datazone, società taiwanese con sede a Shenzen, in Cina, che da tempo, e con una particolare attenzione per il rispetto dell’ambiente e la salubrità e la completa riciclabilità dei materiali utilizzati, opera nel mercato come terzista di grandi multinazionali. 
Proprio in collaborazione con la Datazone,  nel 2009, grazie all’impegno in prima persona di Carlo, è stato bandito un concorso per gli studenti della facoltà di Disegno Industriale della Università di Firenze e quattro giovani universitari su duecento partecipanti sono stati scelti per svolgere uno stage di un mese a Shenzen; segno questo del particolare interesse mostrato dalla Garba e dalla dirigenza cinese per l’innovazione e lo sviluppo di una politica aziendale globale.
