Name: Vendere in Sud America
Description:
A differenza degli altri export manager od agenzie di export, noi NON ci limitiamo soltanto ad individuare degli importatori e distributori, i cosiddetti “agganci giusti sul posto”, ma ci focalizziamo invece nel costruire la strategia necessaria per far sì che tu ti impadronisca della rispettiva nicchia di mercato in diversi paesi latinoamericani. 

Questo perché spesso e volentieri l’importatore ha interessi ben opposti a quelli dell’esportatore, e l’ultima cosa che egli vorrebbe è quella di farti diventare il numero 1 nella tua nicchia di mercato.

Perché la realtà dei fatti è che se ti limiti a mandare semplicemente dei campioni da “far provare” o continui nel tentativo di convincere l'importatore di turno, magari mentre lo trovi alla prossima fiera di Torino o Milano, l’unica cosa che otterrai è che ti chieda sconti, ricattandoti con il fatto di poter comprare da altri.

A breve dimostreremo come tali personaggi non siano proprio le pedine più adatte a cui affidare le tue speranze ed i tuoi buoni propositi per fare del business laggiù. 

In questo momento, stiamo ultimando dettagli per far spaccare il vino italiano di fascia alta in Sudamerica, che come ben saprai è una potenza economica emergente e pertanto uno dei mercati più fertili e prolifici al mondo. 

Questo nostro modo di lavorare è la diretta conseguenza di innumerevoli test che abbiamo già effettuato per convenzionare gli importatori latinoamericani e far penetrare diversi prodotti italiani in quella regione.

E si potrebbe anche fare tramite loro, per carità. Ma riteniamo moooolto più efficace e redditizio adottare strategie che li tengano ben lontani, nel possibile, per i motivi descritti sopra.

Con “Vendere in Sudamerica”, abbiamo creato un sistema efficace e testato per espandere la tua azienda in quel mercato, senza problemi e bastoni tra le ruote, ed è quello che vogliamo condividere con te.

Continua a seguirci. ;)

Name: Unicorn Group Inc
Description:
Unicorn Group Inc. and its U.S. affiliate, Acanthis LLC, specialize in providing comprehensive consulting and operational services for businesses looking to expand into the U.S. market—particularly through major online marketplaces like Amazon and Walmart. We bridge the commercial gap between Turkey and the United States by offering end-to-end solutions in investment strategy, cross-border logistics, brand development, and marketplace success.

Unicorn Group Inc., based in Turkey, brings years of experience in retail and business consulting. Our team manages the entire pre-export process, including labeling, barcoding, quality checks, packaging, customs documentation, and international freight logistics via air and sea. We ensure that every product shipped from Turkey is fully compliant, efficiently handled, and ready for U.S. market entry.

Acanthis LLC, operating since 2021 in the U.S., delivers hands-on services such as marketplace account setup, listing optimization, product launch strategy, ad campaign management, account health monitoring, and warehouse coordination. From port arrival to delivery at fulfillment centers or direct-to-customer shipping, we handle every step of the supply chain on behalf of our clients.

In addition, we offer:
• U.S. company formation and business banking setup
• Advisory on Turkish government export incentives (ad subsidies, rent support, trademark aid, storage funding)
• In-depth U.S. market research, competitor analysis, and industry data reporting
• Trade show representation when clients are unable to attend due to scheduling conflicts or visa issues—our trained staff attend in your name, manage your booth, and represent your brand professionally.

Our vision is to empower brands and entrepreneurs by taking the operational burden off their shoulders and enabling them to focus solely on growth. We don’t just advise—we execute. Let us be your launch partner in the U.S. market.

Name: Albatroz Comércio e Serviços Ltda
Description:
EMPRESA

Ao estabelecer uma parceria com a Albatroz Trading, sua empresa irá encontrar novos horizontes de negócios, expandindo possibilidades e ultrapassando fronteiras para alavancar sua marca e seus produtos a um nível superior. 

A Albatroz Trading é uma empresa brasileira, que atua a mais de 15 anos no Comércio Exterior e tem o privilégio de dispor dos melhores contatos do mercado. Isso a coloca em posição favorável diante de oportunidades únicas e imperdíveis.  Considerando que vivemos em um mercado competitivo, quem tem acesso rápido a este tipo de vantagem também está predestinado ao sucesso. 

Com foco principal em projetos de internacionalização, a Albatroz Trading oferece completa solução de suprimentos "door-to-door", garantindo que o produto desejado será entregue dentro do prazo, com preço competitivo e na qualidade esperada. 

Pode parecer redundância, mas é apenas uma questão de lógica: bons negócios somente são possíveis quando feitos com quem é bom em negócios. Quem tem excelentes contatos e estreitou relacionamento com quem pode abrir portas, também tem totais condições de oferecer o mesmo para a sua empresa. 

Missão 

A missão da Albatroz Trading é otimizar a performance de exportação e importação, encontrando novos horizontes de negócios, expandindo possibilidades, ultrapassando fronteiras, minimizando riscos e agregando valores para seus clientes, parceiros e colaboradores.

Visão

A Albatroz Trading visa ser reconhecida entre as empresas mais íntegras, responsáveis, éticas e comprometidas do seu segmento, contribuindo para o engrandecimento de seus clientes, parceiros e colaboradores.

Valores

O papel da Albatroz Trading é minimizar os riscos da transação para os nossos clientes e proteger os seus interesses. Para isso, promove uma cultura corporativa baseada nos princípios da ética, integridade, confiabilidade, responsabilidade e comprometimento.

Name: Beijing Uec Corporation-VICTANK
Description:
Victank, a brand born for microbulk, the first and only factory focusing on microbulk in the world!

With more than 15 years professional knowledge and experience on industrial gas and natural gas equipment, especially due to the business expansion for microbulk system, the team from SinoCleansky develops a new brand "Victank" which concentrates on microbulk storage and delivery system only. 

Instead of operating numbers of high-pressure gas cylinders or dewar cylinders, Microbulk provides solution for filling gas on-site. It is an ideal solution for medium size customers in industries, medical, cutting, lab and etc. More reliable, safe, efficient and economical. Victank offers all models of storage system for selection: capacity 1000L, 2000L, 3000L, 5000L, 7000L; Working pressure 16bar, 25bar, 35bar and more. Victank delivery system (lorry tanker with auto filling by pump and metering) is under development now. 

Victank microbulk tanks benefits:
1）It is an on-site filling solution for gas cylinder users.
2）The charge loss is low or even zero.
3）Longer liquid gas hold times.
4）Extraordinary thermal quality (multi-layer high vacuum insolation)）assures very little gas loss.
5）The boost speed is fast and the gas flow is large.
6）Quick recharge to save time and reduce costs.
7）Multiple pressures, different volumes, more choices.
8）Brand valves HEROSE, REGO, accessories, high reliability.
9）Small footprint, convenient transportation, simple installation.
10）Less operation and maintenance needed.

"When others try to sell everything, we focus on making the real microbulk only for you.” With Victank microbulk only, you can handle your gas distribution business with efficiency, economy and effectiveness. No more costs and headaches brought about by cylinders. 

Victank, making victory by microbulk!

We are proud of our core values of quality and durability as we increasingly strive to bring pioneering design into the heart of the everyday. We continually re-invest in research to evolve every aspect of every product. We listen, we observe, we test and then we test again. Our goal is simply to improve the everyday.

Traemos juguetes que respetan los ritmos de crecimiento, que permiten la exploración e incentivan la imaginación y creatividad, pues creemos que es algo fundamental en sus primeros años de vida. En general, trabajamos con juguetes de líneas Montessori, Waldorf y Reggio Emilia, pero solo como referencia y sin limitarnos a dichos paradigmas, pues estamos en constante exploración para traer juguetes que nos hagan sentido a nosotros mismos como mamá y papá en primer lugar.

Para nosotros es fundamental que los juguetes sean simples, que no tengan instrucciones, que sean de materiales nobles y que se utilicen pinturas, tintes y barnices no tóxicos, asegurando que se que cumplan las normativas más estrictas de seguridad.

As a supplier of probably the best paper straw on the market, our goal has been to make your sipping experience GREAT! While at the same time we're able to save the planet one straw at a time.

90% of all floating trash on the planet is comprised of plastic. A problem that Ecologista is fighting against by donating a GREAT AMOUNT of our profits into different charity projects.

By joining forces we're able to accomplish great achievements, things that we're never able to achieve by ourselves. Thanks to our customers Ecologista is able to:
- Plant new trees
- Pick up plastic debris
- Compensate for our carbon footprint

So... Are you tired of toxic plastic straws, or why not soggy paper straws? Why not try Ecostraw by Ecologista?

Name: MIF 68 - Marseille International Fashion Center
Description:
Le MIF 68 est né de la rencontre entre Dingguo Chen, commerçant de la rue du Tapis vert à Marseille et Président Association des commerçants chinois de Marseille, et du groupe immobilier Resiliance représenté par Xavier Giocanti et Gurvan Lemee. Le centre a été pensé par des grossistes de Marseille. Plus de problèmes de circulations et de parking, un service clé en main ainsi qu’un accompagnement pas à pas.

Marseille étant un point stratégique des échanges commerciaux en Méditerranée, le MIF 68 vient faire echo à l’initiative de la Nouvelle route de la soie par la Chine pour intensifier ses échanges commerciaux. Idéalement situé à proximité du 1er port de commerce Français, facile d’accès pour les commerçants, le centre a vocation à devenir une plateforme d’échange de référence en Europe.
Réalisé uniquement en containers maritimes, le MIF 68 est l’un des plus grands centres commerciaux au monde à utiliser ce procédé de construction. Il est composé de 620 containers repartis sur 17 500m2

Evolution du site:
Ce projet « MIF68 », objet de la présente demande de Permis de Construire est conçu comme la première phase d’un projet plus vaste se développant sur l’ensemble des 2 plate-formes PIE85 et PIE95, avec à terme le développement d’un pôle d’échange novateur en liaison avec la ville et le monde. Ce projet d’ensemble, sera le support à une mixité des activités.
Le jeu de volumes et de textures plus complexe dans l’assemblage des containers en phase 2 & 3 permettra de proposer une dynamique d’ensemble du centre d’activité grossiste complété par les activités de proximité, en profitant des vues formidables depuis le terrain.

What's our range?

Baby Bodysuits/Sleepsuits, Backpacks, Bags, Bath Robes, Dresses/Tunics, Flip-Flops, Hosiery (Socks/Tights), Leggings, Outerwear, Pajamas, Ponchos, Raincoats, Shorts/Skirts, Slippers, Sunglasses, Sweatshirts, Swimming Suits/Trunks, Towels, Trousers, T-Shirts, Umbrellas, Underwear (Boxers/Briefs/Sets), Wellingtons (Rain Boots), Winter Accessories (Gloves/Hats/Scarves).

Need to complete your inventory?

Name: International Cigar Croup Inc.
Description:
Sole Distributor of Dona Flor and Alonso Menendez Brazilian Cigars.

nteraialCar oup has a passion for the art of making cigars - a passion that began when Alonso Menendez perfected the art of cigar making in Cuba during the 1930s. Alonso guided lush tobacco crops from farm to factory—to be meticulously cured, hand selected and rolled. This attention to detail led him, alongside his brothers and business partner Jose M. Garcia, to produce the internationally acclaimed brand of cigars known as Montecristo.
 
With Dona Flor cigars, Alonso's son Félix and Master Blender Arturo Toraño guide expatriate Cuban craftsmen and highly skilled Brazilians in fusing these passions and Brazil’s Dark Treasure - the Mata Fina and Mata Norte tobacco, sun-grown in the rich soil of the Recôncavo Basin. The result is the unique experience of smoking of a Brazilian Puro. 

With the makers celebrating a 35 year anniversary, now is the time to discover Dona Flor cigars - and Dona Flor USA is proud to bring them to you.

•	Ceylon Black Peppercorns – Grade 1 quality
•	Ceylon Black Pepper Powder
•	Ceylon White Peppercorns
•	Ceylon Cinnamon Quills- C5 Special Quills
•	Ceylon Cinnamon Powder
•	Premium Roasted Curry Powder
•	Premium Unroasted Curry Powder
•	Ceylon Chili Powder

The ecosystem that the company has built supports the local farmers and promotes the organic production of food.  Farmers are graded based on their manufacturing procedure, farming techniques, harvesting procedure, and quality of the produce. This enables Seilan to produce the highest quality spices in the world.

While helping the farmers, Seilan has ventured into organic farming using advanced technology.  The introduction of IoT devices to measure the chemical composition and soil balance, introduction of drone technology for crop management are some steps the company has taken to transform traditional agricultural practices in Sri Lanka.

The company plans on rapidly expanding into the natural oil extraction market and become a leading manufacturer of oil extracted products.

Name: Dutch Perfect BV
Description:
Dutch Perfect develops bicycle tires you can rely on for anyone who loves
cycling. We specialize in durable anti Puncture ‘No Flat’ tyres with ozone protection. These tyres we produce in different types and sizes: for E-bikes, city bikes, sports bikes, ATB's, but also for cross-BMX bikes, strollers and wheelchairs. 

Rely on our tires, Rely on us.

Not only can rely on our tires, you can rely on our company also. 
Dutch Perfect is an innovative company with more than 25 years experience in the bicycle tyres business. January 1998, Jan Hunneman marketed the first Dutch Perfect tyre with one year No Flat guarantee. We develop and design the bicycle tires in the Netherlands and produce them under strict quality control. 
 
Our headquarter in the Netherlands has an extensive  stock, so we can quickly deliver throughout Europe. 

For us, quality and cycling fun are number one. That’s why we have a comprehensive testing unit where we test our current series, but are also testing new materials. Thanks to numerous studies and tests we have developed extremely good puncture protection combined with low rolling resistance.

The Dutch Perfect bicycle tyres are particularly suitable for people 
who use their bikes much. All Dutch Perfect tyres are durable and use OPS ozone protection to provide early aging and cracking. Besides our normal tyres that we have for City and Tour biking,  we have ‘No-Puncture” and ‘No flat’ tyres. 
The latest innovations are the E and E-tiger-tiger S. These tyres are specially designed for E-Bikes and handle the additional forces of electric bicycles easily.
since 2012 we also sell colored tyres in our program nad in 2014 we started with colored saddles and grips for the bicycle.

Whilst making rugs and saddles,the best available fabrics in India and abroad is used. Some buyers prefer to have special saddles made of an imported fabric called Cardura which too is available to them on request.
Most of the equestrian products need strength to hold the power of the horse and weight of the rider- that is the reason each and every item which needs strength has the best quality Stainless Steel fittings and branded nylon thread for durability.

To ensure this Kamaal Corporation  has selected a team of highly skilled workmen to make every item with expertise and piece by piece, and every part is hand made.  
The next step after completing the piece is to pack it for shipment to ensure the buyer receives it in the best condition. Lastly, before it leaves the factory,their specialists inspect each and every piece personally to ensure every piece is specific to its specified design, size, colour and last but not the least the workmanship.
The most difficult phase comes is the delivery of the shipment to the buyer as per the
schedule and mostly it is the main set back of most businesses. This is where they never falter and due this commitment to their buyers they always have their support.
The company is based on the belief that the customer's needs are of the utmost importance. The Company's entire team is committed to meeting those needs. As a result, a high percentage of our business is from repeat customers and referrals.

Når du køber varer og ydelser fra 2K ApS, køber du fra en virksomhed, som tilbyder innovative og miljøvenlige løsninger til køling, klima og varmepumper, som hjælper med at reducere dine omkostninger i form af den rigtige løsning, høj leveringskvalitet og professionel service, både før, under og efter købet.

Vi bidrager med professionel rådgivning om produkter og løsninger til dit køleprojekt og er ofte på besøg hos vores leverandører, hvor vi blandt andet får uddannelse i produkter og kendskab til nye produkter.
 
Vision:
Vi vil opfattes som den mest professionelle distributør i Danmark indenfor vore områder (komponenter til Køl & Klima området), der skaber konkurrencedygtig og dokumenterbar værdi for kunderne og virksomheden. Dette vil vi sikre ved altid at stræbe efter at være på forkant med den køletekniske udvikling med speciel fokus på miljørigtige og energieffektive løsninger. 

Vores værdier:
- Vi er ansvarlige og engagerede i det, vi foretager os
- Vi har respekt for det, vi laver, og for vores kunder
- Vi er en troværdig partner
- Vi er udviklingsorienterede i måden vi agerer på, og stilstand er lig tilbagegang hos os
- Vi værner om miljøet og ressourcerne via ”grøn adfærd” i vores dagligdag
- Vi synes det er sjovt og spændende at arbejde med vores kunder
- Vi holder os løbende opdateret med information om produktnyheder og trends.

Name: Bon-fire
Description:
Bon-fire ApS er udvikler af bål- og grilludstyr, som sælges til forhandlere i Danmark samt flere andre lande i Europa. Bon-fire ApS har derudover agentur på Amazonas og Nexgrill i Skandinavien.

Det er kokken René Stage og designeren Torben Eriksen, der har skabt og udviklet Bon-fire og virksomhedens produkter. Ved firmaets start i 2006 blev Bon-fire bygget op omkring familiens bålkøkken, hvor udgangspunktet for de to virksomhedsejere og venner var at skabe et funktionelt, prisbilligt og all-round udendørskøkken, som også designmæssigt kan være en pryd i haven, på terrassen eller ved sommerhuset.

Sidenhen har Bon-fire udviklet sig til meget mere end familiens bålkøkken. I 2008 fik Bon-fire Aps agentur på Amazonas, som på verdensplan er et af de førende brands inden for hængekøjer og hængestole inkl. en designlinje til baby og børn samt en udendørs linje med ekstra lette hængekøjer og tilbehør til friluftseventyr. 

I 2011 kom agenturet på det engelske brand Hedgehog til, udviklet af High & Dry - nu Easy Innovations Ltd. Hedgehog er en smart funktionel løsning til at holde tagrender fri for nedfaldent løv.

I 2012 indgik Bon-fire ApS samarbejde med Massco Enterprises om salg af Bon-fire gasgrill, og i 2015 blev Masco til Global Leisure Group Limited, som Bon-fire nu samarbejder med omkring udvikling af private label gasgrill og brands. Herunder har Bon-fire Aps fået agenturet på Nexgrill, der er et af Nordamerikas største brands inden for gasgrill.

Bon-fire Aps står for funktionelle kvalitetsprodukter, der er prisvenlige, og som fremmer det gode udeliv. 
Med Bon-fires bål- og grilludstyr er du sikker på hyggelig udendørs madlavning tilberedt på redskaber af høj kvalitet, og som tåler at blive brugt.

Objectives: 
To promote fellowship among Filipino and Canadian professionals and businesspersons in Canada and the Philippines. 

To encourage and foster the advancement of understanding and goodwill among the Filipino and Canadian professionals and businesspersons.

To represent, express and give effect to various opinions of the Members and the Philippine business community in Canada regarding trade, commerce, finance, industry and other related matters.

When you export or import, complying with export and import regulations is your responsibility.  Sure, you use a freight forwarder, or a customs broker, but like your tax accountant, they just push the papers around.  YOU have to provide the details.  What details?  Tariff classification.  Valuation.  Country of origin.  License determination.  Restricted party screening.  Restricted party what?
 
But you have a product to make.  You have a business to build.  You don’t have time to figure out all of that stuff.  You’re also a small company that can’t afford a full time trade compliance geek employee, that can’t afford an attorney, but neither can you afford the the potential penalties if you get it wrong.  That’s where the Trade Compliance Geek comes in.  He’s been there, he’s done that, and he can do that for you.

-          Integrity: Fostering a culture of trust, respect, and employee satisfaction as one of the basic building blocks of our business.
-          Customer service: Continuously adding value to our customers by finding the best ways to answer their needs, while ensuring the highest quality of service, assistance and professionalism.

Name: WOD VALVE GROUP CO..LTD
Description:
Being established in 2008, ZHEJIANG WOD VALVE CO。，LTD(hereinafter referred to as “the company”) is a manufacturer engaged in research, design, production, marketing, independent import and export, customs declaration, and inspection. Located in Wenzhou Economic & Technological Development Zone, also known as “China Valve City”, it is only 5-minute drive from Wenzhou Longwan International Airport, 30-minute drive from Wenzhou CRH Railway Station, and 5-hour drive from Ningbo Port and Shanghai Port. The unique cultural environments and economic conditions lay a solid foundation for the development of the company.
The company’s main products are low- and medium-pressure ball valves, gate valves, globe valves, check valves, filters, quick couplings, manhole covers, and supporting facilities for water supply installations, etc., which are mainly made of ASTM304, ASTM 316 and WCB compliant materials. All products are in strict compliance with international and national standards such as API6D, ASTM, MSS, ANSI, JIS, DIN, ISO, and GB. The company’s products are widely used in various sectors involved in petroleum and gas, chemical engineering, electricity, metallurgy, lifting, water supply, automobile manufacturing and ship building, heating system controls for oil and water pipelines, food, pharmacy, daily chemicals, urban construction, machinery and equipment, etc. The first-class quality products and perfect after-sales service are highly appreciated by customers.
In 2012, the company was awarded with certificates such as Pressure Equipment Directive (PED) CE and ISO 9001, and reports such as TUV, SGS.
Over the years, the company has constantly communicated and cooperated with multiple worldwide valve research institutions based on the worldwide advanced technologies and techniques. With the advanced technologies, sophisticated equipment, excellent quality, perfect service, and rigorous management system, it constantly grows and transforms into a comprehensive technology-based entity from a trading company since its inception. Its products are available all over the world. “Pioneering innovation and heartfelt service” are deemed as the company's gist of production and service philosophy.
We actively advocate proactive exploration of worldwide markets and heartfelt service for every customer by adhering to the market-oriented, technology-based and innovative principle, and considering product quality as a way of business survival and customers as the source of cooperate development. We sincerely welcome worldwide customers to our company for visits and technical exchanges.

Name: Clearlight Customs
Description:
Clearlight Customs Ltd offers support and a bespoke approach to customs compliance, as well as import and export processes. We help you navigate the complex world of customs regulations, often acting as a liaison between relevant authorities for compliance. We specialise in advising companies and organisations on both International and EU Trade, especially within logistics, freight forwarding, transport and shipping. Being fully compliant will avoid delays, legal issues and expensive costs. By doing it right at the start, you will stay compliant and your business will stay afloat.

Drowning in Customs Compliance?
Whether you’re importing or exporting goods, we can advise you on customs regulations and declarations, codes, procedures, taxes, tariffs, duties, VAT, licensing, auditing, IT systems and processes, as well as dealing with HMRC. 

Is your business ready for Brexit?
Many companies are worried about how their business processes may change when the UK leaves the EU. This includes how they work with suppliers and customers, and possible changes in tariffs and duties. This complex situation is far from clear. Clearlight Customs will guide you through these murky waters, as we monitor trade negotiations.

Becoming an AEO (Authorised Economic Operator)?
Being an AEO gives your business credibility by showing supply chain compliance. Using first-hand knowledge, we will give you the right information to submit a successful AEO application so your company can become certified.

Clearlight Customs provides one-off support, in-house training and consultancy services on the complex world of customs legislation. We will help you review your processes, identify issues and seamlessly improve your shipments from end to end.

Call our team on 01283 553099 to discuss any area of customs compliance.

Name: Butler Sourcing
Description:
Butler Sourcing has a long tradition of providing a risk free environment that allows small and medium sized American companies to source products from Asia.

We pride ourselves on our understanding of both American business culture and Asian business culture, and our ability to create a symbiotic relationship between both interests.

Purchasing directly from Asia can save your company anywhere from 20% to 75%, as opposed to having the product produced in the United States or from purchasing from a US based supplier. Therefore, for any company to stay competitive and to maximize profits it is essential that your company create a strategy to procure goods from Asia.

Butler Sourcing directly controls a cap factory, apparel factory, embroidery factory, ipod accessories factory and a digitizing center. However, if your products are out of the scope of our factories, we have a dedicated sourcing department which can help you source your product from China.

Name: Livos Canada
Description:
Chez Livos, tout se conjugue au naturel : peintures, huiles, cires, laques, colles, de même que produits de nettoyage et d'entretien. Conçus pour diverses utilisations intérieures et extérieures, nos produits servent notamment à protéger, embellir et décorer le bois sous toutes ses formes. Nous offrons par ailleurs de nombreux produits destinés à être appliqués sur d'autres supports, tels le métal, le béton et le placoplâtre.

Nous vous proposons une vaste gamme de produits issus de matières premières renouvelables, fabriqués selon des principes écologiques exigeants, qui accordent une place fondamentale à votre santé et au respect de la nature. Ainsi, les produits Livos contribuent à la protection de l'environnement et à faire de votre milieu de vie un endroit sain et sécuritaire.

Mais Livos, c'est aussi la transparence… Chez Livos, il y a longtemps que nous jouons franc-jeu sur la composition de nos produits. Vous ne retrouverez aucun terme évasif suggérant le « naturel » sur les contenants Livos, mais plutôt une déclaration intégrale des substances entrant dans la composition du produit. Vous pourrez ainsi appliquer nos peintures naturelles en toute confiance.

Les peintures naturelles Livos, fabriquées en Allemagne, sont distribuées au Canada, en Europe et dans le monde entier. Utilisées par les particuliers, les artisans et les professionnels de l'industrie, elles sont le signe que, lorsque sérieux et qualité vont de pair avec authenticité, le naturel sait convaincre partout.

Découvrez la large gamme naturelle Livos et jugez-en par vous-même !

Name: Russia Forwarding
Description:
Fin dagli albori il trasporto in Russia non è mai stato cosa semplice dovuto a una molteplicità di barriere, climatiche, strutturali nelle vie di comunicazione e linguistiche. Venivano utilizzati carri di legno con enormi botti poste sotto il carro che ospitavano acqua per i conducenti e per dissetare i robusti cavalli. Si narra che viaggiavano per migliaia di chilometri sfidando le più impervie e proibitive condizioni climatiche dettate dai lunghi inverni russi viaggiando dal grande Impero Russo attraverso le regioni del Kazakistan, Uzbekistan, Tagikistan, fino al Celeste Impero. Con l’avvento della ”perestrojka” molti cambiamenti sono avvenuti ma le difficoltà nel trasportare sono rimaste.
Rappresentiamo una giovane e dinamica Società di Spedizioni Internazionali specializzata da oltre dieci anni nelle spedizioni nel complesso e variegato mercato russo. Abbiamo nel tempo ampliato i nostri servizi sul Kazakistan, Uzbekistan, Tagikistan, Turkmenistan, Kyrgyzstan.
Semplicemente, abbiamo fatto della Russia la nostra professione.

Name: Source One India
Description:
Source One is trading organization with a strong focus on top quality hose. Our range encompasses Stainless Steel Flexible Hose, Stainless steel assemblies, rubber hoses, industrial rubber hoses, hydraulic rubber hoses composite hoses and related end fittings. 

Our range of rubber hoses are for a variety of applications. We provide rubber hoses for steam, air, gas, water, petroleum, acids, chemicals, slurry, shot blasting, sand blasting and for automotive applications. Rubber hoses can be provided with reinforcements (wire, textile, other materials). These can be used in many high temperature and high pressure environments. Hoses are also available for highly corrosive environment e.g. mines. Various diameters and end fittings are available.

Our range of SS hoses includes, SS Wire Braided, Teflon corrugated and various other stainless steel hose assemblies with customised end fittings. Stainless Steel corrugated flexible hoses are offered from size: 6mm NB(1/4”) to size: 200mm (8”). The annular hose body provides the flexibility and pressure tight core of the assembly. We also provide highly flexible close-pitch hoses for special applications.  

We also supply all kinds of customized end fittings. These can be provided as a part of the hose assembly and/or separately as well.

Source One is an organization dedicated to showcase and trade in Indian products internationally. Our expertise lies in sourcing required products at the cheapest possible price from reputed suppliers. We aim to serve our associates and clients in an honest, sincere and transparent manner. The aim is to build trust and develop long term relationships and gain from each other areas of expertise.
